stardewcraft.forge.description:
Place weapon or tool in the left slot. Place gemstone in the right slot.

Cinder Shards are spent from your backpack. You don't put them in a slot.

You can also combine two rings.
stardewcraft.forge.unforge_no_room: Not enough room for the unforged items.
stardewcraft.forge.unforge_right_slot: Clear the right ingredient slot before unforging.
stardewcraft.forge.valid: Press the power button to begin forging!
item.stardewcraft.prize_ticket.desc: Bring this to the prize machine in Lewis' house for a special reward.
item.stardewcraft.calico_egg.desc: A unique egg that can be found during the Desert Festival.
item.stardewcraft.golden_tag.desc: Turn this in to the Trout Derby booth for a reward.
item.stardewcraft.skill_book_0.desc: Read this to gain some farming experience.
item.stardewcraft.skill_book_1.desc: Read this to gain some fishing experience.
item.stardewcraft.skill_book_2.desc: Read this to gain some foraging experience.
item.stardewcraft.skill_book_3.desc: Read this to gain some mining experience.
item.stardewcraft.skill_book_4.desc: Read this to gain some combat experience.
item.stardewcraft.purple_book.desc: Read this to gain some experience in all skills.
Read this to open Marnie's animal shop.
item.stardewcraft.book_artifact.desc: You will fetch a better price when selling artifacts.
item.stardewcraft.book_bombs.desc: Bombs deal 25% less damage to you.
item.stardewcraft.book_crabbing.desc: Crab pots have a 25% chance to yield double.
item.stardewcraft.book_defense: Jack Be Nimble, Jack Be Thick
item.stardewcraft.book_diamonds.desc: All stones have a chance to drop a diamond when mined by hand.
item.stardewcraft.book_friendship.desc: You become friends with people a little faster.
item.stardewcraft.book_grass.desc: You will now run a lot faster through grass and crops.
item.stardewcraft.book_horse.desc: You gain a little extra speed when riding a horse.
item.stardewcraft.book_marlon.desc: You get a 50% discount on Marlon's item retrieval service.
item.stardewcraft.book_mystery.desc: You have a slightly greater chance to find Mystery Boxes.
item.stardewcraft.book_queen_of_sauce.de: Learn any Queen Of Sauce recipes that you don't already know.
item.stardewcraft.book_roe.desc: Fishing treasure chests have a chance to yield roe.
item.stardewcraft.book_speed.desc: You run a little bit faster.
item.stardewcraft.book_speed2.desc: You run a little bit faster.
item.stardewcraft.book_trash.desc: You have a greater chance to find items in the trash.
item.stardewcraft.book_void.desc: Monsters have a small chance to drop double loot.
item.stardewcraft.book_wild_seeds.desc: Weeds have a greater chance to yield mixed seeds.
item.stardewcraft.book_woodcutting.desc: Felled trees have a 5% chance to yield double the wood.
stardewcraft.trinket.fairy_box.desc: Summons a level %1$s fairy companion that heals you in combat situations.
stardewcraft.trinket.ice_rod.desc: Shoots an ice spine every %1$s seconds, freezing any enemies in its path for %2$s seconds.
stardewcraft.trinket.iridium_spur.desc: Critical strikes give you a speed boost for %1$s seconds.
stardewcraft.trinket.magic_hair_dye.desc: Your hair shimmers with all the colors of a prismatic shard.
stardewcraft.trinket.magic_quiver.desc: Shoots a magic arrow at nearby enemies every %1$s seconds, dealing %2$s-%3$s damage.
stardewcraft.trinket.parrot_egg.desc: Summons a level %1$s parrot companion, who grants you a %2$s chance to find gold coins when slaying monsters.
block.stardewcraft.auto_grabber.desc: Automatically harvests from your animals each morning. Must be placed inside a coop or barn.
block.stardewcraft.auto_petter.desc: Joja Co. patented technology for coops and barns. Keeps your animals content, but can't replace the full benefit of human touch. Hand-petting can be provided to supplement.
block.stardewcraft.autofeed_trough.desc: Stores hay and auto-refills. Consumes hay from silos when empty.
block.stardewcraft.bait_maker.desc: Place a fish inside to create targeted bait.
block.stardewcraft.barn_manager.desc: The core of the barn. View barn status and manage daily feeding.
block.stardewcraft.bee_house.desc: Place outside and wait for delicious honey! (Except in Winter).
block.stardewcraft.cask.desc: Use in the cellar to age products like wine and cheese.
block.stardewcraft.charcoal_kiln.desc: Turns 10 pieces of wood into one piece of coal.
block.stardewcraft.cooking_pot.desc: A sturdy iron stove for cooking and decoration.
block.stardewcraft.coop_manager.desc: The core of the coop. View coop status and manage daily feeding.
block.stardewcraft.fish_pond_manager.des: The core of a fish pond. Build the pond region and manage its state.
block.stardewcraft.fish_net.desc: A fish pond facility. Later it will become a bound fish pond structure part.
block.stardewcraft.fish_pond_bucket.desc: The fish pond output bucket. Later it will store only pond products.
block.stardewcraft.crab_pot.desc: Place it in the water, load it with bait, and check the next day to see if you've caught anything. Works in streams, lakes, and the ocean.
block.stardewcraft.crystalarium.desc: Insert a gem of your choice and it will grow copies.
block.stardewcraft.dehydrator.desc: Place 5 pieces of fruit or edible mushrooms inside to dry them.
block.stardewcraft.deluxe_worm_bin.desc: Produces Deluxe Bait on a regular basis. The worms are self-sufficient.
block.stardewcraft.feed_trough.desc: Stores hay for feeding animals in coops and barns.
block.stardewcraft.fish_smoker.desc: Place fish inside with a piece of coal to create smoked fish, which is worth double. The quality of the fish is preserved.
block.stardewcraft.flower_cluster.desc: Flowers planted in an oak barrel. Blooms in spring and summer.
stardewcraft.tooltip.convertible_to_ston: Can be crafted directly into Stardew Stone
Can be converted into Stone in Stardew Crafting
stardewcraft.tooltip.convertible_log_to_: Can be converted into Wood in Stardew Crafting (1→4)
stardewcraft.tooltip.convertible_planks_: Can be converted into Wood in Stardew Crafting (1→1)
stardewcraft.tooltip.convertible_hardwoo: Can be converted into Hardwood in Stardew Crafting (1→2)
Can be converted into Hardwood in Stardew Crafting (2→1)
block.stardewcraft.furnace.desc: Turns ore and coal into metal bars.
block.stardewcraft.hay_hopper.desc: Dispenses hay from your silo for manual feeding.
block.stardewcraft.heater.desc: Keeps your animals warmer and happier during the winter.
block.stardewcraft.incubator.desc: Hatches eggs into baby chickens and ducks.
block.stardewcraft.iridium_sprinkler.des: Waters the 24 adjacent tiles every morning.
block.stardewcraft.junimo_greenhouse_run:
A magical rune gifted by the Junimos.
Protects crops in a 7×7 area from seasonal effects.
Indestructible. Automatically fades at the end of the season.
block.stardewcraft.keg.desc: Turns crops into wine, juice, or beverages.
block.stardewcraft.lightning_rod.desc: Collects energy from lightning storms and turns it into battery packs.
block.stardewcraft.loom.desc: Turns raw wool into fine cloth.
block.stardewcraft.mine_barrier.desc: A barrier found in the mines.
block.stardewcraft.mine_exit.desc: An exit point in the mines.
block.stardewcraft.mine_ladder.desc: A ladder leading deeper into the mines.
A dedicated display stand for museum donations.
block.stardewcraft.preserves_jar.desc: Turns vegetables into pickles and fruit into jam.
block.stardewcraft.quality_sprinkler.des: Waters the 8 adjacent tiles every morning.
block.stardewcraft.seed_maker.desc: Place crops inside to produce a varying amount of seeds. Doesn't work with fruit tree crops.
block.stardewcraft.shipping_bin.desc: Place items inside to sell them overnight.
block.stardewcraft.seasonal_decor.desc: This decoration changes with the seasons.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_0.desc:
Prevents crows from eating your crops.
Protection radius: 9 tiles.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_1.desc:
A uniquely styled scarecrow.
Protection radius: 8 tiles.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_2.desc:
A uniquely styled scarecrow.
Protection radius: 8 tiles.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_3.desc:
A uniquely styled scarecrow.
Protection radius: 8 tiles.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_4.desc:
A uniquely styled scarecrow.
Protection radius: 8 tiles.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_5.desc:
A uniquely styled scarecrow.
Protection radius: 8 tiles.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_6.desc:
A uniquely styled scarecrow.
Protection radius: 8 tiles.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_7.desc:
A uniquely styled scarecrow.
Protection radius: 8 tiles.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_8.desc:
A uniquely styled scarecrow.
Protection radius: 8 tiles.
block.stardewcraft.silo_manager.desc: The core of a Silo. Used to build and check hay storage.
block.stardewcraft.solar_panel.desc: Slowly generates batteries when left in the sun.
block.stardewcraft.sprinkler.desc: Waters the 4 adjacent tiles every morning.
block.stardewcraft.stone_chest.desc: A place to store your items.
block.stardewcraft.stone_workbench.desc:
Crafts stone blocks from raw stone.
Processes cobblestone into various decorative stone types.
block.stardewcraft.tapper.desc: Place on a maple, oak, or pine tree and wait for the reservoir to fill with product!
block.stardewcraft.wood_workbench.desc:
Crafts wooden blocks from raw wood.
Hardwood can be used as bonus material, worth 5 wood each.
block.stardewcraft.wooden_chest.desc: A handmade wooden chest for storing items.
block.stardewcraft.worm_bin.desc: Produces bait on a regular basis. The worms are self-sufficient.
config.stardewcraft.totem_pole.enforce_p: Restrict totem pole placement area and dimension
tooltip.stardewcraft.friendship_door.unb: Use /stardew friendship_door give to bind this door to one or more NPCs.
message.stardewcraft.friendship_door.loc: You are not close enough with %s yet.
stardewcraft.mastery.requirement: Only a master of the five ways may enter. (%s/5)
stardewcraft.mastery.cave.0: %Only a master of the five ways may enter. (0/5)
stardewcraft.mastery.cave.1: %Only a master of the five ways may enter. (1/5)
stardewcraft.mastery.cave.2: %Only a master of the five ways may enter. (2/5)
stardewcraft.mastery.cave.3: %Only a master of the five ways may enter. (3/5)
stardewcraft.mastery.cave.4: %Only a master of the five ways may enter. (4/5)
stardewcraft.mastery.hint: You sense that a new way is open...
item.stardewcraft.heavy_furnace.desc: It's more efficient than a regular furnace. Requires 25 pieces of ore and 3 coal per use.
item.stardewcraft.statue_of_blessings.de: Touching the statue gives a unique blessing every day.
item.stardewcraft.statue_of_dwarf_king.d: Choose from two mining-related powers each day.
item.stardewcraft.anvil_mastery.desc: Allows you to re-forge trinkets, randomizing their stats. Costs 3 iridium bars per use.
item.stardewcraft.mini_forge.desc: Now, you can use a dwarvish forge from the convenience of your home.
item.stardewcraft.cinder_shard.desc: You can feel a warm glow from within this stone.
item.stardewcraft.dragon_tooth.desc: These are rumored to be the teeth of ancient serpents. The enamel is made of pure iridium!
item.stardewcraft.galaxy_soul.desc: Forge 3 of these into a Galaxy weapon to unleash its final form.
stardewcraft.mastery.anvil.fail: You can only re-forge trinkets on this.
stardewcraft.mastery.statue.requirement: You have not mastered the matching skill yet.
stardewcraft.mastery.dwarf_statue.desc_1: Higher chance to find ladders and shafts.
stardewcraft.mastery.statue_of_blessings: The first three fish you hook today will be much easier. (%s left)
You gain extra friendship from speaking to people.
A prismatic butterfly is waiting for you somewhere in the valley...
stardewcraft.uncertainty_statue.already: This skill is already being altered tonight. Come back tomorrow...
stardewcraft.uncertainty_statue.choose_s: Which skill's professions would you like to change?
stardewcraft.uncertainty_statue.confirm:
-Statue Of Uncertainty-
The statue can help you change professions.
Make an offering of 10,000g?
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.iridium_scyt: Cuts weeds more efficiently across the farm.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.statue_of_bl: Grants a random blessing for the day.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.farming_plaq: You can now find Golden Animal Crackers, which permanently doubles a farm animal's produce. Doesn't work on pigs.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.advanced_iri: Holds both bait and tackle, with all iridium-tier perks.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.challenge_ba: A perfect catch yields triple the fish. Each time the fish escapes the fishing bar, the catch is reduced.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.fishing_plaq: You can now encounter Golden Fishing Chests.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.mystic_tree_: Grows into a mystic tree producing mystic syrup.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.treasure_tot: Use outdoors to create a ring of artifact spots around you.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.foraging_pla: You now find Golden Mystery Boxes, which contain superior items.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.statue_of_dw: Grants a choice between two mining powers each day.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.heavy_furnac: Smelts batches of ore using extra ore and coal.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.mining_plaqu: Gem-bearing rocks now grant twice the gems.
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.anvil.name: Anvil
stardewcraft.mastery.reward.trinket_slot: Unlocks a new equipment slot for trinkets. Trinkets can be found while adventuring and grant special powers.
gui.stardew_craft.barn_manager.confirm_w: Danger: this will affect building and animal data
gui.stardew_craft.barn_manager.dialog.de: There are still %s animals. Cannot demolish.
Demolishing will delete the building record.
Bound animals will also be removed.
Are you sure you want to demolish this barn?
gui.stardew_craft.barn_manager.dialog.re: The manager will become a relocation item.
Place it at the new location and meet building requirements.
Auto-feeding is disabled during relocation; animals are treated as outdoors at night.
Are you sure you want to relocate this manager?
gui.stardew_craft.coop_manager.confirm_w: Danger: this will affect building and animal data
gui.stardew_craft.coop_manager.dialog.de: There are still %s animals. Cannot demolish.
Demolishing will delete the building record.
Bound animals will also be removed.
Are you sure you want to demolish this coop?
gui.stardew_craft.coop_manager.dialog.re: The manager will become a relocation item.
Place it at the new location and meet building requirements.
Auto-feeding is disabled during relocation; animals are treated as outdoors at night.
Are you sure you want to relocate this manager?
gui.stardew_craft.coop_manager.need.unkn: Some requirements not met, please check structure
gui.stardew_craft.silo_manager.build_hin: Requires a 2×2×10 brick column with the manager replacing one brick
gui.stardew_craft.silo_manager.dialog.de: This will delete the building record.
gui.stardew_craft.silo_manager.dialog.re: The manager will be packed into an item.
Place it again at the new location.
gui.stardewcraft.billboard.already_accep: You have already accepted this quest.
gui.stardewcraft.farm_entry.hint: Click to select, confirm with OK button
gui.stardewcraft.farm_entry.title: Choose a Farm to Enter
New and unassigned players will use this level
gui.stardewcraft.farm_mgmt.no_farm: You don't have a farm yet
gui.stardewcraft.farm_mgmt.title: Farm Permission Management
gui.stardewcraft.farm_selection.title: Choose Your Farm
gui.stardewcraft.joja_cd.hover.0: Repairs the bus that runs to Calico Desert.
gui.stardewcraft.joja_cd.hover.1: Repairs the minecart system that runs between the bus stop, the mountains, and Pelican Town.
gui.stardewcraft.joja_cd.hover.2: Repairs the broken bridge in the mountains.
gui.stardewcraft.joja_cd.hover.3: Repairs the old ruins on the farm, turning it into a greenhouse.
gui.stardewcraft.joja_cd.hover.4: Removes the glimmering boulder near the mine entrance.
gui.stardewcraft.farm_type.beach.desc: Stretches along the coastline with supply crates and seashells. (Coming soon)
gui.stardewcraft.farm_type.beach.name: Beach Farm
gui.stardewcraft.farm_type.forest.desc: Dense trees surround your farm. Forageable items and mahogany trees can be found. New forageables appear daily (except winter).
gui.stardewcraft.farm_type.forest.name: Forest Farm
Divided into four areas, perfect for co-op play. (Coming soon)
gui.stardewcraft.farm_type.hilltop.desc: Rocky terrain with rich mineral deposits. (Coming soon)
gui.stardewcraft.farm_type.hilltop.name: Hill-top Farm
gui.stardewcraft.farm_type.riverland.des: A winding river runs through the farm. Less planting space, but you can fish anywhere! Comes with a Fish Smoker.
gui.stardewcraft.farm_type.standard.desc: A large area of open land with plenty of space to grow crops. Great for beginners!
gui.stardewcraft.farm_type.standard.name: Standard Farm
gui.stardewcraft.farm_type.wilderness.de: Monsters roam your farm at night! (Coming soon)
gui.stardewcraft.totem_naming.title: Name Your Totem Pole
item.stardewcraft.acorn.desc: This can be planted to grow an oak tree.
item.stardewcraft.advanced_iridium_rod.d: An advanced iridium rod. Can use bait and two tackles.
item.stardewcraft.aged_roe.desc: Fish eggs aged in salt to bring out the flavor.
item.stardewcraft.alamite.desc: Its distinctive fluorescence makes it a favorite among rock collectors.
item.stardewcraft.albacore.desc: Prefers temperature "edges" where cool and warm water meet.
item.stardewcraft.amaranth.desc: A purple grain cultivated by an ancient civilization.
item.stardewcraft.amaranth_seeds.desc: Plant these in the fall. Takes 7 days to grow. Harvest with the scythe.
item.stardewcraft.amphibian_fossil.desc: The relatively short hind legs suggest some kind of primordial toad.
item.stardewcraft.anchor.desc: It may have belonged to ancient pirates.
item.stardewcraft.anchovy.desc: A small silver fish found in the ocean.
item.stardewcraft.ancient_doll.desc: An ancient doll covered in grime. This doll may have been used as a toy, a decoration, or a prop in some kind of ritual.
item.stardewcraft.ancient_drum.desc: It's a drum made from wood and animal skin. It has a low, reverberating tone.
item.stardewcraft.ancient_fruit_seeds.de: Plant in spring. Takes 28 days to grow. Regrows after harvest.
item.stardewcraft.ancient_fruit_wine.des: Aged Ancient Fruit wine. Has a complex flavor.
item.stardewcraft.ancient_seed.desc: It's a dry old seed from some ancient plant. By all appearances it's long since dead....
item.stardewcraft.ancient_sword.desc: It's the remains of an ancient sword. Most of the blade has turned to rust, but the hilt is very finely crafted.
item.stardewcraft.angler.desc: Uses a bioluminescent dangler to attract prey.
item.stardewcraft.apple.desc: A crisp fruit used for juice and cider.
item.stardewcraft.apricot.desc: A tender little fruit with a rock-hard pit.
item.stardewcraft.arrowhead.desc: An arrowhead likely used by the first inhabitants of this area.
item.stardewcraft.artichoke.desc: The bud of a thistle plant. The spiny outer leaves conceal a fleshy, filling interior.
item.stardewcraft.artichoke_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Artichoke juice.
item.stardewcraft.artichoke_seeds.desc: Plant these in the fall. Takes 8 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.autofeed_trough_upgrad: Upgrades a feed trough to auto-feed.
item.stardewcraft.bait.desc: Causes fish to bite faster. Must first be attached to a fishing rod.
item.stardewcraft.baked_fish.desc: Baked fish on a bed of herbs.
item.stardewcraft.banana_pudding.desc: A creamy dessert with a wonderful tropical flavor.
item.stardewcraft.barbed_hook.desc: Makes your catch more secure, causing the "fishing bar" to cling to your catch. Works best on slow, weak fish.
item.stardewcraft.baryte.desc: The best specimens resemble a desert rose.
item.stardewcraft.basic_fertilizer.desc: Improves soil quality a little, increasing your chance to grow quality crops. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.basic_retaining_soil.d: This soil has a chance of staying watered overnight. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.battery_pack.desc: It's fully charged with precious energy.
item.stardewcraft.bear_skin_rug.desc: A thick rug made from bear hide.
item.stardewcraft.bed_1.desc: A single bed. Right-click to enter sleep settlement.
item.stardewcraft.bed_2.desc: A double bed. Right-click to enter sleep settlement.
item.stardewcraft.beet.desc: A sweet and earthy root vegetable. As a bonus, the leaves make a great salad.
item.stardewcraft.beet_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Beet juice.
item.stardewcraft.beet_seeds.desc: Plant these in the fall. Takes 6 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.birch_table.desc: A modular birch table. Connects to nearby tables.
item.stardewcraft.bixite.desc: A dark metallic Mineral sought after for its cubic structure.
item.stardewcraft.blobfish.desc: This odd creature floats above the ocean floor, consuming any edible material in its path.
item.stardewcraft.blue_discus.desc: A beautiful blue and yellow tropical fish that can survive in fresh or salt water.
item.stardewcraft.blue_grass_starter.des: Place this on your farm to plant a clump of blue grass.
item.stardewcraft.blue_jazz.desc: The flower grows in a sphere to invite as many butterflies as possible.
item.stardewcraft.blue_jazz_seeds.desc: Plant in spring. Takes 7 days to grow.
item.stardewcraft.blueberry.desc: A popular berry reported to have many health benefits. The blue skin has the highest nutrient concentration.
item.stardewcraft.blueberry_seeds.desc: Plant these in the summer. Takes 13 days to mature, and continues to produce after first harvest.
item.stardewcraft.blueberry_wine.desc: Aged Blueberry wine. Has a complex flavor.
item.stardewcraft.bok_choy.desc: The leafy greens and fibrous stalks are healthy and delicious.
item.stardewcraft.bok_choy_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Bok Choy juice.
item.stardewcraft.bok_choy_seeds.desc: Plant these in the fall. Takes 4 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.bone_flute.desc: It's a prehistoric wind instrument carved from an animal's bone. It produces an eerie tone.
item.stardewcraft.bone_fragment.desc: Thisite could be useful for crafting.
item.stardewcraft.bone_sword.desc: A very light piece of sharpened bone.
item.stardewcraft.bouquet.desc: A gift that shows your romantic interest.
item.stardewcraft.bream.desc: A fairly common river fish that becomes active at night.
item.stardewcraft.broccoli.desc: The flowering head of a broccoli plant. The tiny buds give it a unique texture.
item.stardewcraft.broccoli_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Broccoli juice.
item.stardewcraft.broccoli_seeds.desc: Plant in the fall. Takes 8 days to mature, and continues to produce after first harvest.
item.stardewcraft.broken_cd.desc: It's a JojaNet 2.0 trial CD. They must've made a billion of these things.
item.stardewcraft.broken_glasses.desc: It looks like someone lost their glasses. They're busted.
item.stardewcraft.broken_trident.desc: It came from the sea, but it's still sharp.
item.stardewcraft.bruschetta.desc: Roasted tomatoes on a crisp white bread.
item.stardewcraft.bug_meat.desc: It's gross, but some creatures love the taste.
item.stardewcraft.bullhead.desc: A relative of the catfish that eats a variety of foods off the lake bottom.
item.stardewcraft.burglars_ring.desc: Monsters have a greater chance of dropping loot.
item.stardewcraft.burglars_shank.desc: A weapon of choice for the swift and silent.
item.stardewcraft.cactus_fruit.desc: The sweet fruit of the prickly pear cactus.
item.stardewcraft.calcite.desc: This yellow crystal is speckled with shimmering nodules.
item.stardewcraft.carrot.desc: A fast-growing, colorful tuber that makes for a great snack.
item.stardewcraft.carrot_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Carrot juice.
item.stardewcraft.carrot_seeds.desc: Plant in the spring. Takes 3 days to grow.
item.stardewcraft.catfish.desc: An uncommon fish found in streams.
item.stardewcraft.cauliflower.desc: Valuable, but slow-growing. Despite its pale color, the florets are packed with nutrients.
item.stardewcraft.cauliflower_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Cauliflower juice.
item.stardewcraft.cauliflower_seeds.desc: Plant these in the spring. Takes 12 days to produce a large cauliflower.
item.stardewcraft.cave_carrot.desc: A starchy snack found in caves. It helps miners work longer.
item.stardewcraft.cave_jelly.desc: A rare jelly found in underground lakes.
item.stardewcraft.caviar.desc: The cured roe of a sturgeon fish. Considered to be a luxurious delicacy!
item.stardewcraft.celestine.desc: Some early life forms had bones made from this.
item.stardewcraft.chair_1.desc: An oak chair. Right-click to sit.
item.stardewcraft.chair_2.desc: A spruce chair. Right-click to sit.
item.stardewcraft.chair_3.desc: A birch chair. Right-click to sit.
item.stardewcraft.challenge_bait.desc: A "perfect" catch yields triple the fish. However, each time a fish escapes the "fishing bar", the catch is reduced.
item.stardewcraft.chanterelle.desc: A tasty mushroom with a fruity smell and slightly peppery flavor.
item.stardewcraft.cherry.desc: It's popular, and ripens sooner than most other fruits.
item.stardewcraft.cherry_bomb.desc: Generates a small explosion. Stand back!
item.stardewcraft.chewing_stick.desc: Ancient people chewed on these to keep their teeth clean.
item.stardewcraft.chicken_statue.desc: It's a statue of a chicken on a bronze base. The ancient people of this area must have been very fond of chickens.
item.stardewcraft.chipped_amphora.desc: An ancient vessel made of ceramic material. Used to transport both dry and wet goods.
item.stardewcraft.chocolate_cake.desc: Rich and moist with a thick fudge icing.
item.stardewcraft.chowder.desc: A perfect way to warm yourself after a cold night at sea.
item.stardewcraft.chub.desc: A common freshwater fish known for its voracious appetite.
item.stardewcraft.clam.desc: There's a chewy little guy in there...
item.stardewcraft.cloth.desc: A bolt of fine wool cloth.
item.stardewcraft.coal.desc: A combustible rock that is useful for crafting and smelting.
item.stardewcraft.coconut.desc: A seed of the coconut palm. It has many culinary uses.
item.stardewcraft.coffee.desc: It smells delicious. This is sure to give you a boost.
item.stardewcraft.coffee_bean.desc: Plant in spring or summer to grow a coffee plant. Place five beans in a keg to make coffee.
item.stardewcraft.coffee_bean_seeds.desc: Plant in spring or summer. Takes 10 days. Regrows.
item.stardewcraft.coleslaw.desc: It's light, fresh and very healthy.
item.stardewcraft.complete_breakfast.des: You'll feel ready to take on the world!
item.stardewcraft.copper_hoe.desc: A copper-upgraded hoe. Can till multiple tiles.
item.stardewcraft.copper_ore.desc: A common ore that can be smelted into bars.
item.stardewcraft.copper_pickaxe.desc: A copper-upgraded pickaxe. Breaks stones faster.
item.stardewcraft.copper_watering_can.de: A copper-upgraded watering can. Waters multiple tiles.
item.stardewcraft.coral.desc: A colony of tiny creatures that clump together to form beautiful structures.
item.stardewcraft.cork_bobber.desc: Slightly increases the size of your "fishing bar".
item.stardewcraft.corn.desc: One of the most popular grains. The sweet, fresh cobs are a summer favorite.
item.stardewcraft.corn_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Corn juice.
item.stardewcraft.corn_seeds.desc: Plant these in the summer or fall. Takes 14 days to mature, and continues to produce after first harvest.
item.stardewcraft.crab.desc: A marine crustacean with two powerful pincers.
item.stardewcraft.crab_cakes.desc: Crab, bread crumbs, and egg formed into patties then fried to a golden brown.
item.stardewcraft.cranberries.desc: These tart red berries are a traditional winter food.
item.stardewcraft.cranberry.desc: These tart red berries are an excellent source of vitamin C.
item.stardewcraft.cranberry_candy.desc: It's sweet enough to mask the bitter fruit.
item.stardewcraft.cranberry_seeds.desc: Plant these in the fall. Takes 7 days to mature, and continues to produce after first harvest.
item.stardewcraft.cranberry_wine.desc: Aged Cranberry wine. Has a complex flavor.
item.stardewcraft.crayfish.desc: A small freshwater relative of the lobster.
item.stardewcraft.crimsonfish.desc: Lives deep in the ocean but likes to lay its eggs in the warm summer water.
item.stardewcraft.crocus.desc: A flower that can bloom in the winter.
item.stardewcraft.crystal_dagger.desc: The blade is made of purified quartz.
item.stardewcraft.crystal_fruit.desc: A delicate fruit that pops up from the snow.
item.stardewcraft.crystal_fruit_wine.des: Aged Crystal Fruit wine. Has a complex flavor.
item.stardewcraft.curiosity_lure.desc: Increases your chance to catch rare fish.
item.stardewcraft.cushion.desc: A soft cushion. Right-click to sit, and paintbrush to recolor.
item.stardewcraft.daffodil.desc: A traditional spring flower that makes a nice gift.
item.stardewcraft.dandelion.desc: Not the prettiest flower, but the leaves make a good salad.
item.stardewcraft.deluxe_bait.desc: Causes fish to bite even faster and increases size of the "fishing bar".
item.stardewcraft.deluxe_fertilizer.desc: Greatly improves soil quality, increasing your chance to grow quality crops. Mix into tilled soil.
This soil has a 100%% chance of staying watered overnight. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.deluxe_speed_gro.desc: Stimulates leaf production. Guaranteed to increase growth rate by at least 25%%. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.dinosaur_egg.desc: A giant dino egg... The entire shell is still intact!
item.stardewcraft.dinosaur_mayonnaise.de: It's thick and creamy, with a vivid green hue. It smells like grass and leather.
item.stardewcraft.dish_o_the_sea.desc: This'll keep you warm in the cold sea air.
item.stardewcraft.dolomite.desc: It can occur in coral reefs, often near an underwater volcano.
item.stardewcraft.dorado.desc: A fierce carnivore with brilliant orange scales.
item.stardewcraft.dragonscale_boots.desc: Made from the tough scales of a dragon.
item.stardewcraft.dragontooth_cutlass.de: The blade was forged from a magical tooth.
item.stardewcraft.dragontooth_shiv.desc: The blade was forged from a magical tooth.
item.stardewcraft.dressed_spinner.desc: The metal tab and colorful streamers create an enticing spectacle for fish. Increases the bite-rate when fishing.
item.stardewcraft.dried_starfish.desc: It's an old starfish. It smells like the beach.
item.stardewcraft.driftwood.desc: A piece of wood from the sea.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_dagger.desc: It's ancient, but the blade never dulls.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_gadget.desc: It's a piece of the advanced technology once known to the dwarves. It's still glowing and humming, but you're unable to understand how it works.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_scroll_i.desc: A yellowed scroll of parchment filled with dwarven script. This one's tied with a red bow.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_scroll_ii.desc: A yellowed scroll of parchment filled with dwarven script. This one's tied with a green ribbon.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_scroll_iii.desc: A yellowed scroll of parchment filled with dwarven script. This one's tied with a blue rope.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_scroll_iv.desc: A yellowed scroll of parchment filled with dwarven script. This one's tied with a golden chain.
item.stardewcraft.dwarf_sword.desc: It's ancient, but the blade never dulls.
item.stardewcraft.dwarvish_helm.desc: It's one of the helmets commonly worn by dwarves. The thick metal plating protects them from falling debris and stalactites.
item.stardewcraft.skull_key.desc: An ancient skull-shaped key. Opens a door somewhere in the desert.
item.stardewcraft.rusty_key.desc: An old key found in the museum's storage room.
item.stardewcraft.earth_crystal.desc: A resinous substance found near the surface.
item.stardewcraft.easel.desc: A wooden easel for holding canvases.
item.stardewcraft.eggplant.desc: A rich and wholesome relative of the tomato. Delicious fried or stewed.
item.stardewcraft.eggplant_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Eggplant juice.

item.stardewcraft.emerald.desc: A precious stone with a brilliant green color.
item.stardewcraft.bug_steak.desc: A compact protein meal made from bug meat.
item.stardewcraft.earthy_mousse.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.sweet_bean_cake.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.

item.stardewcraft.cave_kebab.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.hot_log.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.sour_salad.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.superfood_cake.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.warrior_smoothie.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.rumpled_fruit_skin.des: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.calico_pizza.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.stuffed_mushrooms_dese: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.elf_quesadilla.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.nachos_of_the_desert.d: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.cioppino_desert.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.rainforest_shrimp.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.shrimp_donut.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.smell_of_the_sea.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.desert_gumbo.desc: A custom dish from the Desert Festival chef.
item.stardewcraft.field_snack.desc: A quick bite made from forest seeds.
item.stardewcraft.green_tea.desc: A soothing drink brewed from tea leaves.
stardewcraft.item.iridium_milk.tooltip.f: It shimmers like liquid iridium, cold and impossibly bright.
stardewcraft.item.iridium_milk.tooltip.s: Qi's blessing settles under your skin.
item.stardewcraft.magic_rock_candy.desc: A rare candy with a powerful mineral flavor.

item.stardewcraft.qi_fruit.desc: A strange fruit tied to Qi's challenges.

stardewcraft.item.stardrop.tooltip.flavo: Its fragrance is familiar, as if it remembered you first.
stardewcraft.item.stardrop.tooltip.speci: A true Stardrop is consumed only once, and never sold.
stardewcraft.item.stardrop.limit_reached: You can't bear any more stardrop power...
item.stardewcraft.unmilled_rice.desc: Rice in its raw harvested form.
item.stardewcraft.esperite.desc: The crystals glow bright green when stimulated.
item.stardewcraft.fairy_dust.desc: Sprinkle on kegs, furnaces, and other refining equipment to instantly receive their product.

item.stardewcraft.fairy_stone.desc: An old miner's song suggests these are made from the bones of ancient fairies.
item.stardewcraft.femur.desc: An old, heavy bone caked in centuries of grime.
item.stardewcraft.fiberglass_rod.desc: A step up from the bamboo pole. Can use bait.
item.stardewcraft.fiddlehead_fern.desc: The young shoots are an edible specialty.

item.stardewcraft.fire_opal.desc: A rare variety of opal, named for its red spots.

item.stardewcraft.fishing_rod.desc: A basic fishing rod made of bamboo.
item.stardewcraft.floor_lamp.desc: A standing lamp. Right-click to toggle (15/0).
item.stardewcraft.flounder.desc: It lives on the bottom, so both eyes are on top of its head.
item.stardewcraft.fluorapatite.desc: Small amounts are found in human teeth.

item.stardewcraft.fried_chicken_fries.de: Crispy, salty, and dangerously easy to finish.
item.stardewcraft.frozen_geode.desc: A blacksmith can break this open for you.

item.stardewcraft.fruit_salad.desc: A delicious combination of summer fruits.
item.stardewcraft.furniture_catalogue.de: Provides an unlimited supply of all furniture.
item.stardewcraft.galaxy_hammer.desc: It's made from an ultra-light material you've never seen before.
item.stardewcraft.galaxy_sword.desc: It's unlike anything you've ever seen.
item.stardewcraft.garlic.desc: Adds a wonderful zestiness to dishes. High quality garlic can be pretty spicy.
item.stardewcraft.garlic_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Garlic juice.

item.stardewcraft.genie_shoes.desc: Mystical footwear, imbued with arcane energy.

item.stardewcraft.ghost_crystal.desc: There is an aura of coldness around this crystal.

item.stardewcraft.ginger.desc: This sharp, spicy root is said to increase vitality.

item.stardewcraft.glacierfish.desc: Builds a nest on the underside of glaciers.
item.stardewcraft.glacierfish_jr.desc: The original Glacierfish had a son...
item.stardewcraft.glass_shards.desc: A mixture of glass shards smoothed by centuries of ocean surf. These could have belonged to an ancient mosaic or necklace.
item.stardewcraft.glazed_yams.desc: Sweet and satisfying... The sugar gives it a hint of caramel.
item.stardewcraft.glowstone_ring.desc: Glows and pulls dropped items within 6 blocks toward you.
item.stardewcraft.goat_cheese.desc: Soft cheese made from goat's milk.
item.stardewcraft.gold_axe.desc: A gold-upgraded axe. Very efficient at chopping.
item.stardewcraft.gold_hoe.desc: A gold-upgraded hoe. Tills a very wide area.
item.stardewcraft.gold_ore.desc: A precious ore that can be smelted into bars.
item.stardewcraft.gold_watering_can.desc: A gold-upgraded watering can. Waters a very wide area.
Give this to a farm animal to permanently double its produce yield. Doesn't work on pigs.
item.stardewcraft.golden_egg.desc: A very rare and special egg with a solid gold shell.
item.stardewcraft.golden_mask.desc: A creepy golden mask probably used in an ancient magic ritual. A socket in the forehead contains a large purple gemstone.
item.stardewcraft.golden_mystery_box.des: What could be inside? Bring it to the blacksmith to find out.
block.stardewcraft.lucky_purple_shorts.d: Better not inspect these too closely.
item.stardewcraft.lucky_purple_shorts.de: Better not inspect these too closely.
item.stardewcraft.golden_relic.desc: It's a golden slab with hieroglyphs and pictures emblazoned onto the front.
item.stardewcraft.golden_scythe.desc: A stronger scythe with improved cutting efficiency.
item.stardewcraft.granite.desc: A speckled Mineral that is commonly used in construction.
item.stardewcraft.grape_seeds.desc: Plant in fall. Takes 10 days. Regrows after harvest.
item.stardewcraft.grape_wine.desc: Aged Grape wine. Has a complex flavor.
item.stardewcraft.grass_starter.desc: Place this on your farm to start a new patch of grass.
item.stardewcraft.green_bean.desc: A juicy little bean with a cool, crisp snap.
item.stardewcraft.green_bean_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Green Bean juice.
item.stardewcraft.green_bean_seeds.desc: Plant in Spring. Takes 10 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.halibut.desc: A flat fish that lives on the ocean floor.
item.stardewcraft.hay.desc: Dried grass used as animal food.
item.stardewcraft.helvite.desc: It grows in a triangular column.
item.stardewcraft.hematite.desc: An iron-based Mineral with interesting magnetic properties.
item.stardewcraft.hoe.desc: Used to dig and till soil.
item.stardewcraft.holly.desc: The leaves and bright red berries make a popular winter decoration.
item.stardewcraft.holiday_ribbon_post.de: A festive post that links nearby posts with ribbon.
item.stardewcraft.honey.desc: It's a sweet syrup produced by bees.
item.stardewcraft.hops.desc: A bitter, tangy flower used to flavor beer.
item.stardewcraft.hops_seeds.desc: Plant in summer. Takes 11 days. Regrows after harvest.
item.stardewcraft.hot_pepper.desc: Fiery hot with a hint of sweetness.
item.stardewcraft.hot_pepper_seeds.desc: Plant in summer. Takes 5 days. Regrows after harvest.
item.stardewcraft.hot_pepper_wine.desc: Aged Hot Pepper wine. Has a complex flavor.
item.stardewcraft.hyper_speed_gro.desc: Greatly stimulates leaf production. Guaranteed to increase growth rate by at least 33%%. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.ice_cream.desc: It's hard to find someone who doesn't like this.
item.stardewcraft.ice_pip.desc: A rare fish that thrives in extremely cold conditions.
item.stardewcraft.immunity_band.desc: +4 Immunity. Reduces the chance of getting debuffed.
item.stardewcraft.infinity_blade.desc: The true form of the Galaxy Sword.
item.stardewcraft.infinity_dagger.desc: The true form of the Galaxy Dagger.
item.stardewcraft.infinity_gavel.desc: The true form of the Galaxy Hammer.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_axe.desc: The best axe available. Maximum chopping efficiency.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_band.desc: Glows, pulls dropped items within 6 blocks, and increases attack damage by 10%%.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_hoe.desc: The best hoe available. Maximum tilling range.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_needle.desc: The point is unbelievably sharp, even down to the atomic level.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_ore.desc: An exotic ore with many curious properties. Can be smelted into bars.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_pickaxe.desc: The best pickaxe available. Maximum mining efficiency.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_rod.desc: The best fishing rod money can buy. Can use bait and tackle.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_scythe.desc: An iridium scythe with a wider cutting radius.
item.stardewcraft.iridium_watering_can.d: The best watering can. Maximum watering range.
item.stardewcraft.iron_ore.desc: A fairly common ore that can be smelted into bars.
item.stardewcraft.jagoite.desc: A high volume of tiny crystals makes it very glittery.
item.stardewcraft.jamborite.desc: The crystals are so tightly packed it almost looks fuzzy.
item.stardewcraft.jasper.desc: When polished, this stone becomes attractively luminous. Prized by ancient peoples for thousands of years.
item.stardewcraft.joja_cola.desc: The flagship product of Joja corporation.
item.stardewcraft.joja_vending_machine.d: Keeps pumping out the good stuff.
item.stardewcraft.kale.desc: The waxy leaves are great in soups and stir fries.
item.stardewcraft.kale_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Kale juice.
item.stardewcraft.kale_seeds.desc: Plant these in the spring. Takes 6 days to mature. Harvest with the scythe.
item.stardewcraft.kyanite.desc: The geometric faces are as smooth as glass.
item.stardewcraft.large_goat_milk.desc: A large bucket of creamy goat milk.
item.stardewcraft.large_milk.desc: A large jug of cow's milk.
item.stardewcraft.largemouth_bass.desc: A popular fish that lives in lakes.
item.stardewcraft.lava_eel.desc: It can somehow survive in pools of red-hot lava.
item.stardewcraft.lava_katana.desc: A powerful blade forged in a pool of churning lava.
stardewcraft.festival.desertfestival.dia: I brought a few things for the festival. Take a look if anything catches your eye.
item.stardewcraft.lead_bobber.desc: Adds weight to your "fishing bar", preventing it from bouncing along the bottom.
item.stardewcraft.leah_sculpture.desc: A wood sculpture crafted by Leah.
item.stardewcraft.leaning_sword.desc: A sword leaning against the wall.
item.stardewcraft.leather_boots.desc: A basic pair of leather boots.
item.stardewcraft.leek.desc: A tasty relative of the onion.
item.stardewcraft.legend.desc: The king of all fish! They said he'd never be caught.
item.stardewcraft.lawn_flamingo.desc: A decorative piece for your farm.
item.stardewcraft.legend_ii.desc: The successor to the original Legend.
item.stardewcraft.lemon_stone.desc: Some claim the powdered crystal is a dwarvish delicacy.
item.stardewcraft.limestone_mineral.desc: A sedimentary rock composed mostly of calcium carbonate.
item.stardewcraft.lingcod.desc: A fearsome predator that will eat almost anything it can cram into its mouth.
item.stardewcraft.lionfish.desc: An invasive species with a venomous spine.
item.stardewcraft.lobster.desc: A large ocean-dwelling crustacean with a strong tail.
item.stardewcraft.lobster_bisque.desc: This delicate soup is a secret family recipe of Willy's.
item.stardewcraft.lunarite.desc: The cratered white orbs form a tight cluster.
item.stardewcraft.magic_bait.desc: Allows you to catch fish from any season, time, or weather, from whichever type of water you cast into.
item.stardewcraft.magma_cap.desc: A very rare mushroom that lives next to pools of lava.
item.stardewcraft.magma_geode.desc: A blacksmith can break this open for you.
item.stardewcraft.magnet.desc: Increases the chance of finding treasures when fishing. However, fish aren't crazy about the taste.
item.stardewcraft.magnet_ring.desc: Pulls dropped items within 6 blocks toward you.
item.stardewcraft.mahogany_seed.desc: This can be planted to grow a mahogany tree.
item.stardewcraft.mailbox.desc: Check your mail. Right-click to open.
item.stardewcraft.maki_roll.desc: Fish and rice wrapped in seaweed.
item.stardewcraft.malachite.desc: A popular ornamental stone, used in sculpture and to make green paint.
item.stardewcraft.mango.desc: A big, sweet tropical fruit with a unique flavor.
item.stardewcraft.mango_sticky_rice.desc: Sweet mango and coconut transforms this rice into something very special.
item.stardewcraft.maple_bar.desc: It's a sweet doughnut topped with a rich maple glaze.
item.stardewcraft.maple_seed.desc: This can be planted to grow a maple tree.
item.stardewcraft.maple_syrup.desc: A sweet syrup with a unique flavor.
item.stardewcraft.marble.desc: A very popular material for sculptures and construction.
item.stardewcraft.mead.desc: A fermented beverage made from honey. Drink in moderation.
item.stardewcraft.mega_bomb.desc: Generates a powerful explosion. Use with extreme caution.
item.stardewcraft.melon_seeds.desc: Plant these in the summer. Takes 12 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.melon_wine.desc: Aged Melon wine. Has a complex flavor.
item.stardewcraft.meowmere.desc: An unusual weapon from a far away land...
item.stardewcraft.midnight_carp.desc: A mysterious fish from the darkness, only appears at night.
item.stardewcraft.midnight_squid.desc: A strange and mysterious denizen of the ocean's twilight depths.
item.stardewcraft.milk_pail.desc: Used to collect milk from cows and goats.
item.stardewcraft.mine_totem.desc: A dwarf-carved stone totem. Use in the mines to return to the floor entrance.
item.stardewcraft.mine_totem.fail_lobby: You're already at the mine entrance.
item.stardewcraft.mine_totem.fail_not_in: The totem doesn't respond outside the mines.
item.stardewcraft.mine_totem.gift: The Dwarf hands you a small stone totem. "Keep this close — it'll guide you back if you get lost down here."
item.stardewcraft.mine_totem.success: The totem glows and pulls you back to the entrance...
item.stardewcraft.miner_s_treat.desc: This should keep your energy up.
item.stardewcraft.mixed_seeds.desc: There's a little bit of everything here. Plant them and see what grows!
item.stardewcraft.morel.desc: Sought after for its unique nutty flavor.
item.stardewcraft.moss.desc: A special type of plant that grows in shady areas.
item.stardewcraft.moss_soup.desc: It's thick and slimy, but edible.
item.stardewcraft.ms_angler.desc: Uses a bioluminescent dangler to attract prey.
item.stardewcraft.mudstone.desc: A fine-grained rock made from ancient clay or mud.
item.stardewcraft.muscle_remedy.desc: When you've pushed your body too hard, drink this to remove 'Exhaustion'.
item.stardewcraft.mussel.desc: A common bivalve that often lives in clusters.
item.stardewcraft.mutant_carp.desc: The strange waters of the sewer turned this carp into a monstrosity.
item.stardewcraft.mystery_box.desc: A blacksmith can open this for you. Who knows what might be inside?
item.stardewcraft.mystic_syrup.desc: A very rare syrup that is said to have magic properties.
item.stardewcraft.mystic_tree_seed.desc: This can be planted to grow a special tree.
item.stardewcraft.napalm_ring.desc: When you defeat a monster, it explodes.
item.stardewcraft.nautilus_fossil.desc: This must've washed up ages ago from an ancient coral reef.
item.stardewcraft.nekoite.desc: The delicate shards form a tiny pink meadow.
item.stardewcraft.neptunes_glaive.desc: An heirloom from beyond the Gem Sea.
item.stardewcraft.neptunite.desc: A jet-black crystal that is unusually reflective.
item.stardewcraft.oak_resin.desc: A sticky, fragrant substance derived from oak sap.
item.stardewcraft.oak_round_table.desc: An oak round table. Right-click to place or retrieve a top display item.
item.stardewcraft.oak_table.desc: A modular oak table. Connects to nearby tables.
item.stardewcraft.obsidian.desc: A volcanic glass that forms when lava cools rapidly.
item.stardewcraft.ocean_stone.desc: An old legend claims these stones are the mosaics of ancient mermaids.
item.stardewcraft.office_chair_2.desc: A larger office chair. Right-click to sit, and paintbrush to recolor.
item.stardewcraft.office_stool.desc: A compact office stool. Right-click to sit, and paintbrush to recolor.

item.stardewcraft.opal.desc: Its internal structure causes it to reflect a rainbow of light.
item.stardewcraft.orange.desc: Juicy, tangy, and bursting with sweet summer aroma.
item.stardewcraft.ornamental_fan.desc: This exquisite fan most likely belonged to a noblewoman. Historians believe that the valley was a popular sixth-era vacation spot for the wealthy.
item.stardewcraft.orpiment.desc: Despite its high toxicity, this Mineral is widely used in manufacturing and folk medicine.
item.stardewcraft.ossified_blade.desc: A large, sharp blade formed from bone.
item.stardewcraft.ostrich_egg.desc: It may be the world's largest egg.
item.stardewcraft.oyster.desc: Constantly filters water to find food. In the process, it removes dangerous toxins from the environment.
item.stardewcraft.paintbrush.desc: Used to paint buildings and structures.
item.stardewcraft.pale_broth.desc: A delicate broth with a hint of sulfur.
item.stardewcraft.pancakes.desc: A double stack of fluffy, soft pancakes.
item.stardewcraft.parsnip.desc: A spring tuber closely related to the carrot. It has an earthy taste and is full of nutrients.
item.stardewcraft.parsnip_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Parsnip juice.
item.stardewcraft.parsnip_seeds.desc: Plant these in the spring. Takes 4 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.peach.desc: It's almost fuzzy to the touch.
item.stardewcraft.pearl.desc: A rare treasure from the sea.
item.stardewcraft.pepper_poppers.desc: Spicy breaded peppers filled with cheese.
item.stardewcraft.perch.desc: A freshwater fish of the winter.
item.stardewcraft.periwinkle.desc: A tiny freshwater snail that lives in a blue shell.
item.stardewcraft.petrified_slime.desc: This little guy may be 100,000 years old.
item.stardewcraft.phoenix_ring.desc: Once per day, regain full health upon death.
item.stardewcraft.photo_frame.desc: A decorative frame for displaying photos.
item.stardewcraft.pickles.desc: A jar of your home-made pickles.
item.stardewcraft.pike.desc: A freshwater fish that's difficult to catch.
item.stardewcraft.pine_cone.desc: This can be planted to grow a pine tree.
item.stardewcraft.pine_tar.desc: A pungent substance derived from pine sap.
item.stardewcraft.pineapple.desc: A sweet and tangy tropical treat.
item.stardewcraft.pink_cake.desc: There's little heart candies on top.
item.stardewcraft.pink_tablecloth.desc: Right-click an oak table to cover the whole connected table group.
item.stardewcraft.floral_tablecloth.desc: A beautiful tablecloth with floral patterns.
item.stardewcraft.blank_tablecloth.desc: A plain tablecloth ready for dyeing.
item.stardewcraft.pirate_sword.desc: A cutlass beloved by sea raiders. Its blade has tasted both blood and gold.
item.stardewcraft.pizza.desc: It's popular for all the right reasons.
item.stardewcraft.poi.desc: A traditional food with a delicate, sweet flavor when eaten fresh.
item.stardewcraft.pomegranate.desc: Within the fruit are clusters of juicy seeds.
item.stardewcraft.plush_bunny.desc: It's big, it's soft, and it's cute.
item.stardewcraft.poppy.desc: In addition to its colorful flower, the Poppy has culinary and medicinal uses.
item.stardewcraft.poppy_seeds.desc: Plant in summer. Produces a bright red flower in 7 days.
item.stardewcraft.popsicle.desc: A sweet frozen treat on a stick.
item.stardewcraft.potato_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Potato juice.
item.stardewcraft.potato_seeds.desc: Plant these in the spring. Takes 6 days to mature, and has a chance of yielding multiple potatoes at harvest.
item.stardewcraft.powder_melon.desc: Named for the powdery coating that forms on the surface, this melon is crisp and sweet, with a delicate flavor.
item.stardewcraft.powder_melon_seeds.des: This special melon grows in the winter. Takes 7 days to grow.
item.stardewcraft.powder_melon_wine.desc: Aged Powder Melon wine. Has a complex flavor.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_handaxe.de: One of the earliest tools employed by humans. This crude tool was created by striking one rock with another to form a sharp edge.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_rib.desc: Little gouge marks on the side suggest that this rib was someone's dinner.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_scapula.de: Commonly known as a "shoulder blade"... It's unclear what species it belonged to.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_skull.desc: This is definitely a mammalian skull.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_tibia.desc: A thick and sturdy leg bone.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_tool.desc: Some kind of gnarly old digging tool.
item.stardewcraft.prehistoric_vertebra.d: A segment of some prehistoric creature's spine.
item.stardewcraft.prismatic_shard.desc: A very rare and powerful substance with unknown origins.
item.stardewcraft.pumpkin.desc: A fall favorite, grown for its crunchy seeds and delicately flavored flesh. As a bonus, the hollow shell can be carved into a festive decoration.
item.stardewcraft.pumpkin_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Pumpkin juice.
item.stardewcraft.pumpkin_pie.desc: Silky pumpkin cream in a flaky crust.
item.stardewcraft.pumpkin_seeds.desc: Plant these in the fall. Takes 13 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.purple_mushroom.desc: A rare mushroom found deep in caves.
item.stardewcraft.quality_bobber.desc: Boosts the quality of fish that you catch.
item.stardewcraft.quality_fertilizer.des: Improves soil quality, increasing your chance to grow quality crops. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.quality_retaining_soil: This soil has a good chance of staying watered overnight. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.quartz.desc: A clear crystal commonly found in caves and mines.
item.stardewcraft.radioactive_bar.desc: Known by the Zuzu City Safety Commission to cause irreversible bodily harm.
item.stardewcraft.radioactive_carp.desc: A carp that spent one too many years in toxic sludge.
item.stardewcraft.radioactive_ore.desc: It's glowing with dangerous energy... Can be smelted into bars.
item.stardewcraft.radish.desc: A crisp and refreshing root vegetable with hints of pepper when eaten raw.
item.stardewcraft.radish_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Radish juice.
item.stardewcraft.radish_seeds.desc: Plant these in the summer. Takes 6 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.rainbow_trout.desc: A freshwater trout with colorful markings.
item.stardewcraft.raisins.desc: It's said to be the Junimos' favorite food.
item.stardewcraft.rare_disc.desc: A heavy black disc studded with peculiar red stones. When you hold it, you're overwhelmed with a feeling of dread.
item.stardewcraft.red_cabbage.desc: Often used in salads and coleslaws. The color can range from purple to blue to green-yellow depending on soil conditions.
item.stardewcraft.red_cabbage_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Red Cabbage juice.
item.stardewcraft.red_cabbage_seeds.desc: Plant in Summer. Takes 9 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.red_mullet.desc: Long ago these were kept as pets.
item.stardewcraft.red_mushroom.desc: A spotted mushroom sometimes found in caves.
item.stardewcraft.red_snapper.desc: A popular fish with a nice red color.
item.stardewcraft.refined_quartz.desc: A more pure form of quartz.
item.stardewcraft.rhubarb.desc: The stalks are extremely tart, but make a great dessert when sweetened.
item.stardewcraft.rhubarb_seeds.desc: Plant these in the spring. Takes 13 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.rice.desc: A basic grain often served under vegetables.
item.stardewcraft.rice_pudding.desc: It's creamy, sweet, and fun to eat.
item.stardewcraft.rice_shoot.desc: Plant these in flooded tilled soil in the spring. Takes 8 days to mature. Harvest with a scythe.
item.stardewcraft.ring_of_yoba.desc: Occasionally shields the wearer from damage.
item.stardewcraft.river_jelly.desc: A rare jelly found in freshwater.
item.stardewcraft.roasted_hazelnuts.desc: The roasting process creates a rich forest flavor.
item.stardewcraft.roe.desc: Fresh fish eggs. These can be aged in a preserves jar to bring out more flavor.
item.stardewcraft.roots_platter.desc: This'll get you digging for more.
item.stardewcraft.rotten_plant.desc: Decomposing organic material. It's slimy and unpleasant.
item.stardewcraft.ruby.desc: A precious stone that is sought after for its rich color and beautiful luster.
item.stardewcraft.rusty_cog.desc: A well preserved cog that must have been part of some ancient machine. This could be dwarven technology.
item.stardewcraft.rusty_spoon.desc: A plain old spoon, probably ten years old. Not very interesting.
item.stardewcraft.rusty_spur.desc: An old spur that was once attached to a cowboy's boot. People must have been raising animals in this area for many generations.
item.stardewcraft.salmon.desc: Swims upstream to lay its eggs.
item.stardewcraft.salmon_dinner.desc: The lemon spritz makes it special.
item.stardewcraft.sandfish.desc: It tries to hide using camouflage.
item.stardewcraft.sandstone.desc: A common type of stone with red and brown striations.
item.stardewcraft.sashimi.desc: Raw fish sliced into thin pieces.
item.stardewcraft.savage_ring.desc: Gain a short speed boost after slaying a monster.
item.stardewcraft.scorpion_carp.desc: It's like a regular carp but with a sharp stinger.
item.stardewcraft.scythe.desc: Used to harvest hay and cut weeds.
item.stardewcraft.sea_cucumber.desc: A slippery, slimy creature found on the ocean floor.
item.stardewcraft.sea_jelly.desc: A rare jelly found in the ocean.
item.stardewcraft.sea_urchin.desc: A slow-moving, spiny creature that some consider a delicacy.
item.stardewcraft.seafoam_pudding.desc: This briny pudding will really get you into the maritime mindset!
item.stardewcraft.seaweed.desc: It can be used in cooking.
item.stardewcraft.shad.desc: Lives in a school at sea, but returns to the rivers to spawn.
item.stardewcraft.shadow_dagger.desc: When you hold the blade to your ear you can hear 1,000 souls shrieking.
item.stardewcraft.shears.desc: Used to collect wool from sheep and rabbits.
item.stardewcraft.shrimp.desc: A scavenger that feeds off the ocean floor. Widely prized for its meat.
item.stardewcraft.shrimp_cocktail.desc: A sumptuous appetizer made with freshly-caught shrimp.
item.stardewcraft.silver_saber.desc: Plated with silver to deter rust.
item.stardewcraft.skeletal_hand.desc: It's a wonder all these ancient little pieces lasted so long.
item.stardewcraft.skeletal_tail.desc: It's pretty short for a tail.
item.stardewcraft.sky_blue_tablecloth.de: Right-click an oak table to cover the whole connected table group.
item.stardewcraft.slate.desc: It's extremely resistant to water, making it a good roofing material.
item.stardewcraft.slimejack.desc: He's coated in a very thick layer of slime. He keeps slipping out of your hands!
item.stardewcraft.small_magnet_ring.desc: Pulls dropped items within 3 blocks toward you.
item.stardewcraft.smallmouth_bass.desc: A freshwater fish that is very sensitive to pollution.
item.stardewcraft.snail.desc: A wide-ranging mollusc that lives in a spiral shell.
item.stardewcraft.sneakers.desc: A pair of slightly worn sneakers.
item.stardewcraft.snow_yam.desc: This little yam was hiding beneath the snow.
item.stardewcraft.soapstone.desc: Because of its relatively soft consistency, this stone is very popular for carving.
item.stardewcraft.sofa.desc: A comfy sofa. Right-click to sit.
item.stardewcraft.solar_essence.desc: The glowing face is warm to the touch.
item.stardewcraft.son_of_crimsonfish.des: He hatched in the warm summer water, and followed in the footsteps of his father.
item.stardewcraft.sonar_bobber.desc: Shows what fish is on the line before it's caught.
item.stardewcraft.soul_sapper_ring.desc: Gain a little energy every time you slay a monster.
item.stardewcraft.space_boots.desc: Boots made of a material from outer space.
item.stardewcraft.speed_gro.desc: Stimulates leaf production. Guaranteed to increase growth rate by at least 10%%. Mix into tilled soil.
item.stardewcraft.spice_berry.desc: It fills the air with a pungent aroma.
item.stardewcraft.spinner.desc: The shape makes it spin around in the water. Slightly increases the bite-rate when fishing.
item.stardewcraft.spook_fish.desc: The huge eyes can detect the faint silhouettes of prey.
item.stardewcraft.spring_onion.desc: These grow wild during the spring.
item.stardewcraft.spruce_counter.desc: A spruce counter with adaptive decor collision. Right-click to place or retrieve a top display item.
item.stardewcraft.spruce_table.desc: A modular spruce table. Connects to nearby tables.
item.stardewcraft.squid.desc: A deep sea creature that can grow to enormous size.
item.stardewcraft.squid_ink.desc: Squid use this ink to confuse would-be predators.
item.stardewcraft.star_shards.desc: No one knows how these form. Some scientists claim that the microscopic structure displays unnatural regularity.
item.stardewcraft.stardrop_tea.desc: A very special gift that would delight anyone.
stardewcraft.item.stardrop_tea.tooltip.f: A rare tea with the same strange purple gleam as a Stardrop.
stardewcraft.item.stardrop_tea.tooltip.s: A universally loved gift, precious enough to keep safe.
item.stardewcraft.starfruit.desc: An extremely juicy fruit that grows in hot, humid weather. Slightly sweet with a sour undertone.
item.stardewcraft.starfruit_seeds.desc: Plant these in the summer. Takes 13 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.starfruit_wine.desc: Aged Starfruit wine. Has a complex flavor.
item.stardewcraft.steel_axe.desc: A steel-upgraded axe. Chops even faster.
item.stardewcraft.steel_hoe.desc: A steel-upgraded hoe. Tills a wider area.
item.stardewcraft.steel_pickaxe.desc: A steel-upgraded pickaxe. Breaks stones even faster.
item.stardewcraft.steel_watering_can.des: A steel-upgraded watering can. Waters a wider area.
item.stardewcraft.stir_fry.desc: Julienned vegetables on a bed of rice.
item.stardewcraft.stone.desc: A common material with many uses in crafting and building.
item.stardewcraft.stonefish.desc: A bizarre fish that's shaped like a brick.
item.stardewcraft.stingray.desc: A flat fish that lives on the ocean floor.
item.stardewcraft.iron_stool.desc: A dyeable iron stool for sitting.
item.stardewcraft.strawberry.desc: A sweet, juicy favorite with an appealing red color.
item.stardewcraft.strawberry_seeds.desc: Plant these in spring. Takes 8 days to mature, and keeps producing strawberries after that.
item.stardewcraft.strawberry_wine.desc: Aged Strawberry wine. Has a complex flavor.
item.stardewcraft.stuffing.desc: Ahh... the smell of warm bread and sage.
item.stardewcraft.sturdy_ring.desc: Cuts the duration of negative status effects in half.
item.stardewcraft.sturgeon.desc: An ancient bottom-feeder with a dwindling population. Females can live up to 150 years.
item.stardewcraft.sugar.desc: Adds sweetness to pastries and candies. Too much can be unhealthy.
item.stardewcraft.summer_spangle.desc: A tropical bloom that thrives in the humid summer air. Has a sweet, tangy aroma.
item.stardewcraft.summer_spangle_seeds.d: Plant in summer. Takes 8 days to grow.
item.stardewcraft.summer_squash.desc: A curved yellow squash that is harvested while immature, and still tender.
item.stardewcraft.summer_squash_juice.de: A fresh glass of Summer Squash juice.
item.stardewcraft.summer_squash_seeds.de: Plant in the summer. Takes 6 days to grow, and continues to produce after first harvest.
item.stardewcraft.sunflower.desc: A common misconception is that the flower turns so it's always facing the sun.
item.stardewcraft.sunflower_seeds.desc: Plant in summer or fall. Takes 8 days to produce a large sunflower. Yields more seeds at harvest.
item.stardewcraft.super_cucumber.desc: A rare, purple variety of sea cucumber.
item.stardewcraft.survival_burger.desc: A convenient snack for the explorer.
item.stardewcraft.table_lamp.desc: A small lamp that provides warm light.
item.stardewcraft.table_lantern.desc: A small table lantern. Right-click to toggle (15/0).
item.stardewcraft.targeted_bait.desc: Specialized bait crafted from a specific fish.
item.stardewcraft.taro_root.desc: This starchy root is one of the most ancient crops.
item.stardewcraft.tempered_broadsword.de: It looks like it could withstand anything.
item.stardewcraft.templars_blade.desc: It once belonged to an honorable knight.
item.stardewcraft.thorns_ring.desc: When you take damage, damage is also dealt to the attacker.
item.stardewcraft.thunder_egg.desc: According to legend, angry thunder spirits would throw these stones at one another.
item.stardewcraft.tiger_trout.desc: A rare hybrid trout that cannot bear offspring of its own.
item.stardewcraft.tigerseye.desc: A stripe of shimmering gold gives this gem a warm luster.
item.stardewcraft.tilapia.desc: A primarily vegetarian fish that prefers warm water.
item.stardewcraft.tomato.desc: Rich and slightly tangy, the Tomato has a wide variety of culinary uses.
item.stardewcraft.tomato_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Tomato juice.
item.stardewcraft.tomato_seeds.desc: Plant these in the summer. Takes 11 days to mature, and continues to produce after first harvest.
item.stardewcraft.topaz.desc: Fairly common but still prized for its beauty.
item.stardewcraft.tortilla.desc: Can be used as a vessel for food or eaten by itself.
item.stardewcraft.training_rod.desc: Makes it easier to catch fish. Great for beginners.
item.stardewcraft.trap_bobber.desc: Causes fish to escape slower when you aren't reeling them in.
item.stardewcraft.treasure_chest.desc: Wow, it's loaded with treasure! This is sure to fetch a good price.
item.stardewcraft.treasure_hunter.desc: Fish don't escape while collecting treasures. Also slightly increases the chance to find treasures.
item.stardewcraft.tree_fertilizer.desc: Sprinkle on a wild tree to ensure rapid growth, even in winter. Doesn't work on fruit trees.
stardewcraft.tree_fertilizer.already: This tree has already been fertilized.
stardewcraft.tree_fertilizer.cannot: Tree fertilizer won't work on this tree.
item.stardewcraft.trilobite.desc: A long extinct relative of the crab.
item.stardewcraft.triple_shot_espresso.d: It's more potent than regular coffee!
item.stardewcraft.tropical_curry.desc: An exotic, fragrant curry served in a pineapple bowl.
item.stardewcraft.truffle.desc: A gourmet type of mushroom with a unique taste.
item.stardewcraft.tulip.desc: The most popular spring flower. Has a very faint sweet smell.
item.stardewcraft.tulip_seeds.desc: Plant in spring. Takes 6 days to grow.
item.stardewcraft.tuna.desc: A large fish that lives in the ocean.
item.stardewcraft.tundra_boots.desc: Keeps your toes warm in winter.
item.stardewcraft.tv_1.desc: Check weather, fortune, and cooking tips.
item.stardewcraft.tv_2.desc: A flat-screen TV. Check weather, fortune, and cooking tips.
item.stardewcraft.vampire_ring.desc: Gain a little health every time you slay a monster.
item.stardewcraft.vinegar.desc: An aged fermented liquid used in many cooking recipes.
item.stardewcraft.void_egg.desc: A jet-black egg with red flecks. It's warm to the touch.
item.stardewcraft.void_mayonnaise.desc: A thick, black paste that smells like burnt hair.
item.stardewcraft.void_salmon.desc: A salmon, twisted by void energy. The fresh meat is jet black, but rapidly turns pink when exposed to air.
item.stardewcraft.wall_adventurer_map.de: A map once used by adventurers.
item.stardewcraft.wall_blacksmith_hammer: A pair of hanging blacksmith hammers.
item.stardewcraft.wall_buoy.desc: A buoy that once floated at sea.
item.stardewcraft.wall_island_map.desc: A map of the island, framed on the wall.
item.stardewcraft.walleye.desc: A freshwater fish caught at night.
item.stardewcraft.artifact_trove.desc: A blacksmith can open this for you. These troves often contain ancient relics and curiosities.
item.stardewcraft.wedding_ring.desc: An old Zuzu City tradition... It's used to ask for another farmer's hand in marriage.
item.stardewcraft.warp_wand.desc:
A scepter infused with powerful magic.
Right-click to open the warp wheel and teleport to a destination.
item.stardewcraft.warrior_ring.desc: Occasionally infuses the wearer with "warrior energy" after slaying a monster.
item.stardewcraft.wheat.desc: One of the most widely cultivated grains. Makes a great flour for breads and cakes.
item.stardewcraft.wheat_flour.desc: A common cooking ingredient made from crushed wheat seeds.
item.stardewcraft.wheat_seeds.desc: Plant these in the summer or fall. Takes 4 days to mature. Harvest with the scythe.
item.stardewcraft.wicked_kris.desc: The blade is made of an iridium alloy.
item.stardewcraft.wild_bait.desc: A unique recipe from Linus that gives you a chance to catch two fish at once.
item.stardewcraft.wild_horseradish.desc: A spicy root found in the spring.
item.stardewcraft.wild_plum.desc: Tart and juicy with a pungent aroma.
item.stardewcraft.wild_weeds_winter_0.de: Hardy weeds that survive the winter cold.
item.stardewcraft.wilted_bouquet.desc: A gift that shows you want to stop dating someone.
item.stardewcraft.wind_spire.desc: A decorative wind chime that sways in the breeze.
item.stardewcraft.wizard_tower_compass.d: Points toward the nearest Wizard's Tower in the Overworld.
item.stardewcraft.wood_hard.desc: A piece of hardwood. Used for premium crafting.
item.stardewcraft.wood_normal.desc: A piece of ordinary wood. Useful for crafting.
item.stardewcraft.wooden_blade.desc: Not bad for a piece of carved wood.
item.stardewcraft.woodskip.desc: A very sensitive fish that can only live in pools deep in the forest.
item.stardewcraft.yam.desc: A starchy tuber with a lot of culinary versatility.
item.stardewcraft.yam_juice.desc: A fresh glass of Yam juice.
item.stardewcraft.yam_seeds.desc: Plant these in the fall. Takes 10 days to mature.
item.stardewcraft.yeti_tooth.desc: It's icy cold to the touch.

message.stardewcraft.festival.luau.need_: Hold an ingredient before adding it to the soup.
message.stardewcraft.festival.luau.inval: That can't be added to the soup.
message.stardewcraft.festival.luau.alrea: You've already added something to the soup.
message.stardewcraft.festival.luau.main_: The Luau ceremony is starting. Governor reaction branch: %s.
event.luau.main.lewis_intro: Well folks, it's time once again for the potluck ceremony.#$b#I trust that you all put high-quality ingredients in the pot this year. We don't want the governor to regret his visit to the valley!
event.luau.main.lewis_invite: Well... Governor? Would you do us the honor of tasting the soup?
event.luau.main.governor_accept: Of course! I've been looking forward to this all year.
event.luau.reaction6.governor_tangy: Hmm... It's a bit tangy... but actually, the flavor is quite good!
event.luau.reaction6.governor_bowl: Just one minute... there's something in my bowl... what's this?$2
event.luau.reaction6.governor_outrage: This... This is outrageous!$1#$b#I've never been so insulted in all my life!$1
event.luau.reaction6.governor_sick: Blech... my tongue is swelling up... I think I'm going to be sick.$u
event.luau.reaction6.lewis_private: Whoever took part in this appalling act is truly reprehensible. Using my very private item for this sick purpose!$4#$b#And to ruin a perfectly good soup... unforgivable! I've never been more ashamed of this community... Truly disgusting.$4
event.luau.reaction6.lewis_home: Go home, the festival is over.$s
event.luau.reaction6.message_prank: I guess the 'little prank' didn't go over too well...
event.luau.reaction5.governor: Hmmm... Well it's not bad, but it's missing something...$s#$b#Did everyone in town contribute an ingredient to the soup? I feel like it's missing someone's unique voice.
event.luau.reaction5.lewis_bland: You're right... It's a little bland.$s
event.luau.reaction5.lewis_thanks: Well, thanks for joining us this year, Governor. Sorry the soup wasn't anything special.
event.luau.reaction5.lewis_wants: Now... who else wants some soup?
event.luau.reaction5.message: The soup was bland, but the luau was still fun!
event.luau.reaction4.governor: Oh my... that's the best soup I've ever tasted!$h
event.luau.reaction4.lewis_wonderful: Wonderful job, everyone! Now... who else wants a taste?$h
event.luau.reaction4.message: The Governor wasn't kidding... the soup was out of this world!
event.luau.reaction3.governor: Ah... that's a very pleasant soup. The produce from this valley never disappoints!
event.luau.reaction3.lewis_tasty: Mmm... tasty. You all did very well today.
event.luau.reaction3.lewis_wants: Now... who else wants some soup?
event.luau.reaction3.message: The Luau was a success! Good thing I brought something tasty for the soup.
event.luau.reaction2.governor: Hmm... I don't have much to say about this. It's an average soup.
event.luau.reaction2.lewis: He's right... It's nothing special. Not bad, though.
event.luau.reaction2.lewis_wants: Well... who else wants some soup?
event.luau.reaction2.message: The soup was just average, but otherwise the Luau was a success!
event.luau.reaction1.governor: Um... It's actually kind of disgusting. I think I'll pass on the soup this year.$s
event.luau.reaction1.lewis_yuck: Yuck. Someone must have ruined it with a poor-quality ingredient.$s
event.luau.reaction1.message: The soup wasn't very good, but otherwise the Luau was a success!
event.luau.reaction0.governor_vile: Blech! This is vile! I think I'm going to be sick... $u
event.luau.reaction0.lewis_ashamed: Good going, people... Whoever put that foul ingredient in the soup made the Governor pass out! I'm ashamed.$4
event.luau.reaction0.lewis_home: Go home, the festival is over.$s

stardewcraft.desert_festival.makeover.al: You're looking great!$h#$b#Come back another day and we'll put together a fresh new look for you!
stardewcraft.desert_festival.makeover.em: Okay, before we continue, let me visualize your aura, to see what kind of style will make you happiest...#$b#Yes! I can feel it, your inner self and outer self are now in perfect alignment!$h#$b#I can't wait for you to see the new 'you'!$h#$b#So? stardewcraft.desert_festival.scholar.clo: %Scholar: Forgive me, friend. But I cannot engage with you until the festival is open.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.scholar.int: %Scholar: Greetings, friend! Care for a test of knowledge? If you can answer my questions correctly, you'll earn a prize. What do you say?
%Scholar: Excellent! Now, for the first question...
stardewcraft.desert_festival.scholar.win: %Scholar: Very Good! I'm impressed with your knowledge, friend. Here is your prize.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.scholar.wro: %Scholar: Wrong! ...I'm sorry, friend. But you will have to come back another time.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.scholar.fai: %Scholar: ...I'm sorry, friend. But you will have to come back next time.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.scholar.don: %Scholar: Enjoy the eggs, my friend. I'll be back next year for another challenge.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.scholar.que: Question 1: Who runs the %s in Pelican Town?
Question 1: What is the date of the season's end?
Question 2: What season does %s grow in?
Question 2: When does the %s tree bear fruit?
Question 2: When is Pierre's Shop normally closed?
Question 3: In what season can you catch %s?
Question 3: How many steps have you taken?
Question 3: How much does a %s cost?
Question 4: Where might you catch the %s?
Question 4: What is George's last name?
Question 4: How many garbage cans are there in Pelican Town?
stardewcraft.desert_festival.warper.ques: Shrouded Figure: I can send you home for 250g.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.warper.no_m: You don't have enough money for a ticket.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.willy.close: %Willy: Come back once the festival opens.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.willy.alrea: %Willy: That's the challenge for today. Good luck out there!
stardewcraft.desert_festival.willy.offer: Willy: A fish swallowed me rare golden bobber! There's 30 eggs for whoever returns it.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.willy.chall: Willy has challenged you to catch 3 Sandfish.
Willy has challenged you to catch a Scorpion Carp.
Willy has challenged you to find a "Golden Bobber".
Ah, you got 'em. An exciting catch, aren't they?#$b#Here's 25 Calico Eggs for your reward.
Ah, you did it. A challenging catch, don't you think?#$b#Here's 50 Calico Eggs for your reward.
Well, if it isn't me favorite golden bobber!#$b#And it only smells mild o' fish... Heh heh.$h#$b#Here's 30 Calico Eggs for your reward.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.willy.golde: Find and return Willy's Golden Bobber.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.title: Desert Race
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.mode_s: Pick one racer for the next scheduled race.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.mode_m: Open a room, place bets, and split the pool on a win.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.watch_: Open the baked Stardew race board.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.no_rew: No prize is waiting right now.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.bet_cl: Betting reopens before the next race.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.room_l: Create a new room, or select an existing room and enter it.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.room_b: Pick a racer, adjust Calico Eggs, then place your bet. The host can start the race.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.room_m: This room is no longer available.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.shady_: I've got a quiet little business here.
One Calico Egg, and your favorite rival may stumble.
No names, no fuss. Pick the racer.
A little trouble costs one Calico Egg.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.bet_al: You've already bet in this room.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.race.announ: The next race is about to begin...
Come by to collect your prize!
That's the last race for today. We'll see you tomorrow!
And that's it for this year's races! See you next time!
Such speed has rarely been seen!
And now, the moment you've all been waiting for...
stardewcraft.mail.wizardJunimoNote:
Dear @:

I sensed a mysterious force from the forest in that old building you visited...

Those little creatures need your help. But first you must learn to understand their language.

Come find me at my tower.

— M. Rasmodius (Wizard)
stardewcraft.mailbox.empty: There's no mail in the mailbox.
stardewcraft.marlon.recovery_desc: I can help you recover one lost item.
stardewcraft.message.player.exhausted: You're too exhausted to do that.
stardewcraft.message.seed.wrong_season: It's not the right season to plant this crop.
stardewcraft.message.tree.chop_stump: Chop the log to fell the tree.
stardewcraft.message.tree.chop_root: Chop the tree's root to fell it!
stardewcraft.message.tree.clear_footprin: This tree part needs open space around it.
stardewcraft.npc.abigail.acceptbirthdayg: Hey, you remembered my birthday... Thanks, @!$h#$b#Oh, it's, uh... *sniff*... what is it?$s
Hey, you remembered my birthday... Thanks, @! This is really nice!$h
stardewcraft.npc.abigail.acceptgift_(o)1: Whoa... Where'd you find this? The workmanship is fascinating...#$b#It's a little too rusty to use, but I'll add it to my collection.

This makes you wonder... Thousands of years ago, there was probably a little purple-haired cavewoman who played this flute, just like me.#$b#...I'll have to wash it before pressing it to my lips, though.$h
stardewcraft.npc.abigail.acceptgift_(o)2: Oh, wow... @! Are you sure you want to give this to me? It's so rare!#$b#I'll admit, my mouth is watering already...$h
