stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fall_sun: My eyesight may be poor, but my nose hasn't failed me yet!#$e#I can smell fallen leaves and mushrooms. It reminds me of the forests I used to play in as a girl.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fall_thu: Today I'm baking cookies. They're shaped like little pumpkins.#$e#Maybe I'll tell you my recipe one of these days.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fall_tue: I've been putting raisins in George's oatmeal... but he hasn't said a word. I wonder if he even notices these things?
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fall_wed: The good Mayor put me in charge of the town's public gardens.#$e#The fall flowers are delicate, so don't go stomping on them! I know how you kids like to do.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.fri: George spends the whole day in front of that darned television set.#$e#I wish he'd go outside more. Some fresh air would do him good.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.gift_taste.disli: Um, Where will I put this?
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.gift_taste.liked: Oh my, it looks wonderful! That's very kind of you.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.gift_taste.loved: *gasp*... This is absolutely marvelous!$u#$e#You've made an old lady very happy.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.greenrain: George, dear... Is this the end? It's been a good life, but I'd like to see Alex find his way before departing...
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.greenrain_2: The flowers seem to love this rain...
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.greenrainfinishe: Oh thank goodness... I was so worried!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.introduction: Why, hello and welcome to our little community, dear!#$b#You can call me 'Granny' if you like.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.married: I hear you've gotten married! How wonderful, dear.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.mon: Oh my! What a lovely day.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.sat: I used to love looking at the clouds, but I have trouble seeing them these days.#$e#My eyes just don't work as well as they used to.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_mon: I feel more energetic in this wonderful weather.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_sat: Be careful out there, dear. You could get sunburnt!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_sun: Sweet peas are in bloom right now.#$e#They've got such a wonderful fragrance, haven't they?
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_thu: I'm going to bake cookies today. They're coconut wonders shaped like little palm trees! Heehee.#$e#Maybe I'll tell you my recipe one of these days.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_tue: George is always a little less grumpy in the summer. The warm weather softens his bones.#$e#You might not be able to tell, but I can. I've known him for sixty years!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.summer_wed: The good Mayor put me in charge of the town's public gardens.#$e#I've been working on the town flower beds for months, so don't step on them!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.sun: It's nice to be so close to the ocean. The sound of the sea makes going to sleep a lot easier.#$e#As kids we hunted for seashells after the tide went out. Those were the days...
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.thu: I'll be baking cookies today. I like to make flower shapes in the spring.#$e#Maybe I'll tell you my recipe one of these days.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.tue: Don't mind my husband, George. He isn't very friendly to strangers.#$e#If you get to know him better he'll warm up to you.#$e#I'm sure you two could become good friends one day!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.tue6: You've been so kind to George and me, dear. It means the world to us.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.wed: I saw the most beautiful family of butterflies sunning themselves in the town garden yesterday.#$e#The good Mayor put me in charge of the town's public gardens.#$e#I've been working on the town flower beds for weeks, so don't step on them!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_mon: Be careful you don't slip on the ice, dear.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_sat: We've lived here for over 30 years.#$e#We've seen a lot of people come and go. Your grandfather, for one. Bless him...
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_sun: You should make some hot soup to stay warm.#$e#And make sure you wear a jacket!
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_thu: Today I'm baking cookies. They're shaped like little winter stars.#$e#Maybe I'll tell you my recipe one of these days.
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_tue: Aren't you cold? You should wear a thicker jacket, my dear!#$e#This weather isn't good for my joints...
stardewcraft.npc.evelyn.winter_wed: I usually tend to the gardens, but they're covered in snow.#$e#I still like to check up on them now and then.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.birthday.negati: Oh... you remembered my birthday. Thank you for thinking of me.
A birthday gift? That's what you chose? ...Thanks, I guess.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.birthday.neutra: It's my birthday today. Thank you for the gift.
You remembered my birthday? ...I suppose that counts for something.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.birthday.positi: Oh, a birthday gift? How nice of you! Thank you!
Oh... a birthday gift? Well... I suppose you remembered. Thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.gift.already_to: I've already received a gift from you today.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.gift.already_we: You've already given me two gifts this week.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.gift.liked: This is a really nice gift.
stardewcraft.npc.generic.quest_delivery_: Thank you! This is just what I needed.
stardewcraft.npc.george.acceptgift_(o)st: Hmm... *sip*... ahhh... Tastes just like Mama's tuna casserole! Delicious!
stardewcraft.npc.george.divorced_once: Hmmph... took the easy way out, huh?#$e#People these days treat marriage like a television set... If you get bored, just change the channel! Back in my day... *grumble*
stardewcraft.npc.george.fri: So you're a farmer, huh? At least it's honest work.
stardewcraft.npc.george.fri10: You know, I really have been a grumpy old man to everyone. But now I feel like I'm softening up like an old ripe fruit. Hehe!$h#$e#Take care, son.^Take care, hun.
stardewcraft.npc.george.fri4: My grand-pap was a farmer. It's a respectable profession.#$e#If I wasn't so darned old I'd come to your farm and show you a thing or two...
stardewcraft.npc.george.fri8: I've been thinking...Maybe I've been a little bit of a grouch.$s#$e#I used to think no one cared about us old folks.
stardewcraft.npc.george.gift_taste.disli: What am I supposed to do with this? Hmmph.
stardewcraft.npc.george.gift_taste.hated: What?! This is awful! Get this away from me!
stardewcraft.npc.george.gift_taste.liked: Hmmph... okay, this is actually pretty nice. Thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.george.gift_taste.loved: Well, well... this is a very fine gift! Thank you.
stardewcraft.npc.george.greenrain: There, there, honey... Don't you worry.%noturn#$b#Even if it is poisonous, I breathed in more noxious gas in one minute back in the ol' coal mines... And I'm still kickin'!
stardewcraft.npc.george.greenrain_2: Looks like the young folks will have to do some extra weeding after this one...Heheh...$h
stardewcraft.npc.george.introduction: Hmmph... It's irritating to have to meet all these new people, huh?#$b#Name's George, by the way. Now buzz off... Hmmph.
stardewcraft.npc.george.married_alex: ...Hmmph.^I'd like to become a great-grandpa before I croak. Think you can make that happen?
stardewcraft.npc.george.mon: I'm not much of a talker. Especially not to strangers, if you don't mind me saying.
stardewcraft.npc.george.mon6: I'm surprised you want to be friends with an old-timer like me.
stardewcraft.npc.george.sat: The weekend is no different than any other time, for me.#$e#That's how it is when you're retired.
stardewcraft.npc.george.sun: Aren't you cold? They don't make sweaters like they used to.#$e#*Sigh*
stardewcraft.npc.george.thu: I can't talk right now, young man.^I can't talk right now, miss.#$e#My favorite program is on.
stardewcraft.npc.george.thu10: When you get as old as me it's a lot harder to adjust to new things.#$e#One day you'll know what I mean.#$e#Go on, enjoy yourself while you're still young.
stardewcraft.npc.george.thu6: Hello, @. Wanna watch the TV with me?
stardewcraft.npc.george.tue: Hmmph... Looks like another gloomy day.$s
stardewcraft.npc.george.tue10: You know, I shouldn't get too depressed about my legs.#$e#I should just be happy that I'm alive.$h
stardewcraft.npc.george.wed: Alex is my grandson. Have I told you that already?#$e#Huh? Speak up.
stardewcraft.npc.george.wed10: @! Let me turn off this darned television and we can have a little chat.$h#$e#So what are the young people doing these days?
stardewcraft.npc.george.wed10_inlaw_alex: I'll admit, I thought it was... strange... for two men to be together. But you're such a nice young man, and I know you two are in love... I've changed my mind.^You're part of the family, now... and I couldn't be more proud.
stardewcraft.npc.george.wed8: I wish my legs worked so I could play catch with Alex.$s#$e#That'll never happen.$s
stardewcraft.npc.george.wed_inlaw_alex: How can two men get married? It's unnatural... Hmmph. I guess I'm just "old fashioned"...^You're part of the family, now. I'm glad that my grandson found such a nice wife.
stardewcraft.npc.george.winter_1: Ohh... It's so cold.#$e#When you're young the cold doesn't bite as hard.
stardewcraft.npc.george.winterstar_giveg: You don't like it, huh? Bah! Kids these days... no appreciation for anything. That was expensive, and I'm not made of money, you know!
stardewcraft.npc.gift.confirm: Are you sure you want to give %1$s to %2$s?
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.default: Welcome! Let me know if you'd like to donate anything to the collection.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.dialogue.nothin: You don't have anything to donate right now. But if you find any artifacts or minerals, bring them to me!
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.donation_ended: Thank you for your generous contribution! The museum's collection grows richer every day.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.donation_exit_b: Hold on! You haven't finished your donation yet. Please come talk to me before you leave, so I can properly catalog everything.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.donation_starte: Wonderful! Just place your items on any of the exhibit stands. When you're done, come back and talk to me to finalize the donation.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.fri: I spend most of my time studying the collection. There's always something new to discover.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.gift_taste.hate: I... don't think I have a place for this.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.gift_taste.love: Oh! This is quite the specimen. Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.introduction: Welcome to the museum! I'm Gunther, the curator here.#$b#If you find any interesting artifacts or minerals, please consider donating them to the collection!
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.menu.question: I see you've brought some artifacts. Would you like to make a donation?
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.menu.question_d: Are you finished arranging your donations?
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.mon: The museum has been rather quiet lately. More donations would really liven things up!
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.prismatic_hint: Thank you for your generous contribution!#$b#Hmm... that Prismatic Shard you donated is truly extraordinary. I've only read about these in ancient texts.#$b#You know, the Wizard seems to have a particular interest in prismatic energy. If you ever find another one, perhaps you should show it to him.$h
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.reward_granted: Thank you for your generous contribution!#$b#As a token of appreciation for your dedication to the museum, I have some rewards for you. Please check your inventory!$h
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.rusty_key_pendi: Thank you for your generous contribution!#$b#The museum has received some special recognition thanks to your work. I found something in the vault that I should bring to you personally.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.sat: Saturdays are usually our busiest day. Well... relatively speaking.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.sun: Even on Sundays, the museum is open. Knowledge never rests!
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.thu: Did you know this valley was once home to an ancient civilization? The artifacts don't lie.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.tue: Every artifact tells a story about the valley's rich history.
stardewcraft.npc.gunther.wed: I've been cataloguing some fascinating mineral specimens. The geology of this region is truly remarkable.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.acceptgift_(o)stard: Oh wow, thank you! I'm tempted to drink all of it, but I'm going to save some for the saloon. I bet I could make an interesting cocktail with this!
stardewcraft.npc.gus.acceptgift_positive: *sniff*... Ah. Exquisite cuisine. You know what I like, @.$h
stardewcraft.npc.gus.dating_emily_memory: Emily has a real pep in her step lately... I wonder why? *wink*
stardewcraft.npc.gus.divorced_once: Hey, I'm sorry to hear about the break-up...$s#$e#If you need company, you're always welcome at the Saloon.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.divorced_twice: Another failed marriage? Well, it happens. Guess I'll be seeing you at the Saloon more often...$s
stardewcraft.npc.gus.fri: Hi there, @. If you're ever thirsty, the Saloon is the place to be.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.fri4: I don't actually drink very much myself. I'm mainly doing this to make a living.#$e#Although I do enjoy a taste of the Stardew Valley vintage from time to time.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.gift_taste.disliked: Hmm... this isn't really what I had in mind. But thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.gift_taste.hated: Ugh... I really don't like this. No offense.

stardewcraft.npc.gus.greenrain_2: *sniff*... These rains have a particular smell. Have you noticed? Almost like freshly minced herbs...
stardewcraft.npc.gus.greenrainfinished: I'm glad that's over. Running the saloon is enough to worry about, I don't need exotic weather in my life!
stardewcraft.npc.gus.introduction: Well hello there! I'm Gus, chef and owner of the Stardrop Saloon.#$e#Stop in if you need any refreshments. I've always got hot coffee and cold beer at the ready.$h
stardewcraft.npc.gus.married: Hey @, just want to say that I'm happy for you and %spouse.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.mon: Yeah, I know a lot about the people living here.#$e#That's one of the benefits of being a bartender.$h#$e#Sometimes I hear too much...
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon: Welcome to the Stardrop Saloon! Can I get you anything?
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon4: Hi there, @. Make yourself at home.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon8: Hi there @. I'm glad to see you! You're always welcome here.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon_fri: Business has been really good tonight. I'm pleased.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon_thu: Hey, you look like you could use a beverage.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.saloon_tue: Hi! Please relax and enjoy yourself.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.sat: Are you much of a chef, @?#$e#If you have a kitchen and some recipes, you can cook some useful dishes.#$e#Home-cooked meals make great gifts, as well.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.sun: Business has been pretty steady thanks to my regular customers.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.thu: Pam and Clint come into the saloon almost every night.#$e#I'd probably go out of business if they stopped coming.$h#$e#So make sure you don't drive them away!
stardewcraft.npc.gus.thu6: Clint comes into the saloon almost every night and sits at the same table by himself.#$e#Sometimes he glances over at Emily with a nervous look. Hmmm.#$e#Maybe that's why he comes in so often. Oh well, that means more business for me.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.thu8: Pam comes into the saloon almost every night and drinks way too much beer.#$e#Ah well, I shouldn't pass judgment on my customers.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.tue: I sell different dishes each week, so make sure and check in every now and then!#$e#You might taste something spectacular.$h#$e#Just let me know if you have any allergies.$s#$e#Okay, see you around.
stardewcraft.npc.gus.wed: Emily's been working here for a while now. I don't know what I'd do without her!#$e#I would hate to have to clean all those pots by myself.$s
stardewcraft.npc.haley.acceptbirthdaygif: Awwwww, you got me a birthday gift? Well, I really like it!$h
*gasp*... You got this for me? Wow, @, this is the best birthday gift ever!$h
Gross! You got me this on my birthday? What's wrong with you!$a
stardewcraft.npc.haley.acceptgift_(o)421: Wow, they're beautiful! These are my absolute favorite.$h
stardewcraft.npc.haley.acceptgift_(o)88: $c 0.8#Is that... coconut? I love this!$h#Mmm.... coconuts remind me of warm, sunny days at the beach. When I hold one, I feel like I'm there... even when it's raining.
stardewcraft.npc.haley.acceptgift_(o)sta: For me? Ooooh... I can't decide if I should drink it, or use it as shampoo...
stardewcraft.npc.haley.breakup: Agh!$8#$b#Oh... hmph. Beat me to it, huh? Alright...
stardewcraft.npc.haley.cropmatured_421: My name means 'field of hay', but I like to imagine it as a meadow full of sunflowers...

So, what's the idea here... am I just going to be your 'girlfriend' forever...?$7

stardewcraft.npc.haley.event_darkroom5: Oh! I thought you knew.#$b#This room's for developing photos.

stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_sat: It's too cold to go to the beach anymore.#$q 44 fall_Sat_old#*sigh*...what do you think I should do today?#$r 44 10 fall_Sat_12#Watercolor painting#$r 44 20 fall_Sat_12#Relax and read a magazine#$r 44 -30 fall_Sat_13#Stop being a selfish crybaby
stardewcraft.npc.haley.fall_sat_12: Hmm... That's a pretty good idea, actually.

*sigh*... My days of being Flower Queen are over... so it's a bittersweet dance for me.$s#$b#But, yes...

If it weren't for those horrendous clothes you might actually be cute.^Hmm... If it weren't for those horrendous clothes you might actually be pretty... Actually, never mind.$h

stardewcraft.npc.haley.resort_leaving: There's something about the sun that just makes me feel good.

stardewcraft.npc.haley.summer_tue2: Do you wear those clothes every day?

stardewcraft.npc.harvey.eventseen_56: As a small town doctor, you can't help but form a personal connection with your patients. That can be both good and bad...

stardewcraft.npc.harvey.greenrain: I brought some medical supplies, just in case. Be careful out there!
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.greenrain_2: The first time this happened, we were all worried that the rain might be dangerous.#$b#But what if it's actually healthy for the body? Who knows... The plants seem to respond well to it, at least.
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.introduction: It's a pleasure to meet you. I'm Harvey, the local doctor.#$e#I perform regular check-ups and medical procedures for all the residents of Pelican Town. It's rewarding work.#$e#I hope you'll find your own work equally rewarding, in time.$h
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.married_harvey: This is the happiest moment of my life...$l
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.married_maru: Congratulations on your marriage, @. Maru's already informed me that she'll continue to work at the clinic, which is a relief!
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.mon: We sell a few over-the-counter medicines at the clinic... feel free to stop by if you're feeling exhausted.#$b#I know that being a farmer is pretty tiring work... don't overdo it!
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.mon10: Oh! Hi, @.$l#$e#Do you... have any medical questions?$l
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.mon2: I feel responsible for the health of this whole community... it's kind of stressful.#$e#It's a pretty small community, and I'm fortunate to be able to build a good relationship with my patients.
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.mon6: I'd like to stay in Stardew Valley for a while. I'm finally starting to feel involved in the community.#$e#It feels good to know that you're useful.
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.resort: I'll let you in on a little secret... I can only swim with floaties.$s
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.resort_bar: It's important to stay hydrated in this heat. I'm going to ask Gus if he has any coconut water!$h
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.resort_chair: It's nice to have an opportunity to relax now and then.#$b#The trouble is actually letting go of your worries...$s
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.resort_leaving: If you get burnt, a little aloe vera cream might help soothe the skin.
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.resort_shore: I combed the whole beach for glass. We wouldn't want anyone to get a cut on their foot!
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.sat: Can I do anything for you?#$e#Take care.
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.sat10: *Sigh*... I'm starting to feel kind of old...#$e#The older you get the more memories you're burdened with. It can be overwhelming.$s#$e#I think I'll stay younger with you around.$l
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.sat4: I came here because I liked the small-town atmosphere, and the potential for a holistic approach to patient care.#$e#I've grown to really love it.$h
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.secondchance_guy: I want you back in my life, @. I'm willing to forget what happened.$s
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.summer_fri: People don't get sick much during the summer. That's nice, but it also means less business for me.
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.summer_mon: It's okay to get a moderate amount of sunlight. Just don't get burnt.#$e#Okay. Take care! Stay healthy.
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.summer_thu: Exercise is important, but don't get too exhausted, or you might end up at my clinic!#$e#Make sure and listen to your body.
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.sun: Hmm... I'm struggling to make ends meet. I don't have enough patients.#$e#I guess I should try to get patients from the neighboring towns...
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.sun6: Imagine having a patient's life completely in your hands, and failing to keep them alive... that's something that will haunt you forever.$s
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.thu: Nutrition is important, so make sure and eat well. Try to increase your vegetable intake!#$e#Home-cooked meals are best. Do you cook?
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.thu8: It's a lot of work, being a doctor. I don't eat as well as I should.$s#$e#If I didn't live alone I think it would be easier.$l
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.tue: Feel free to stop by my office if you're ever feeling ill.#$e#You're young, though. You'll probably stay healthy without trying.$h
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.tue8: Don't overwork yourself, @. Doctor's orders!#$e#Your health is important to me.$l
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.wed: Remember to cover your mouth when you sneeze.#$e#Then make sure to wash your hands.
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.wed4: I'd like to get to know you better, @. Let's put aside our doctor-patient relationship.
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.wed6: It's nice to have a friend in town.$h
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.wed8: You have a really healthy glow. That's good.$h
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.winter_sun: I hate to say this, but I do make a lot more money during flu season.#$e#I guess if people stopped getting sick, I'd be out of business.#$e#Don't get the wrong idea! I want people to be healthy... really!
stardewcraft.npc.harvey.winter_wed: It's flu season, so you'd better be extra careful.#$e#Make sure to wash your hands often.
stardewcraft.npc.jas.acceptbirthdaygift_: A birthday present? Oh... I don't like this.$s
Wow, a birthday present! I love it!$h
stardewcraft.npc.jas.acceptgift_(o)103: Oh, a little dolly! She's kind of dirty, but I'll give her a bath. Thanks!$h
stardewcraft.npc.jas.acceptgift_(o)stard: Are you sure? It smells so good! I'll only drink a thimbleful a day.$h
stardewcraft.npc.jas.acceptgift_(tr)fair: Wow, it's so pretty! And there's a fairy inside? *giggle*... I can hear her singing. She'll be my secret friend.$h
stardewcraft.npc.jas.acceptgift_negative: Umm... I'm not supposed to drink this. Isn't it for adults?$s
Oh... Aunt Marnie doesn't let me drink coffee yet...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jas.acceptgift_positive: Oh, I like him! He'll fit right in with my other friends.$h
stardewcraft.npc.jas.cropmatured_595: $y 'Um... Have you ever seen a fairy?_Yes_Wow! I wanna see one, too.$h_No_...Me neither.$s'
stardewcraft.npc.jas.eventseen_3910975_m: I had a nightmare that the house was on fire...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jas.fri4: I like living on the farm... my favorite is the fresh ice cream from our cows' milk.
stardewcraft.npc.jas.greenrain_2: I hope the rain doesn't turn my dress green...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jas.married: *sigh*... I hope I can get married some day.$u
stardewcraft.npc.jas.married_shane: I hope Shane will still come and see me...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jas.mon: Oh...Are you looking for Aunt Marnie?$u
stardewcraft.npc.jas.mon4: Hi, Mr. @.^Hi, Ms. @.#$e#It's fun to live on a farm.$h
stardewcraft.npc.jas.movietheater: Aunt Marnie says I'm not old enough to see a movie by myself...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jas.resort: Aunt Marnie told me not to get burnt... But when I walk fast, it feels cool, so I think I'll be okay.$h
stardewcraft.npc.jas.resort_leaving: I've got sand in my shoe...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jas.resort_shore: I'm collecting seashells... I'm gonna make a necklace!
stardewcraft.npc.jas.sat2: Sometimes I look for crawdads in the river. Don't tell Aunt Marnie... but I fed one to a cow once.#$e#She loved it.
stardewcraft.npc.jas.sat8: You're always so nice to me, ${Mr.^Ms.}$ @.$h#$e#Grown-ups are usually mean and boring, but you're different.
stardewcraft.npc.jas.sun: Um... d...do you want something?$u#$e#I'm not supposed to talk to strangers.$u
stardewcraft.npc.jas.sun10: Did you know Shane's my godfather? He was a friend of my parents.$s#$e#...they died. *sniff*$s
stardewcraft.npc.jas.sun2: Shane's gone a lot, and Aunt Marnie is busy all the time... so I have to invent my own games.#$e#I'm thankful for all my toys.$h
stardewcraft.npc.jas.thu: I'm not supposed to talk to strangers...$u
stardewcraft.npc.jas.thu2: Miss Penny is teaching me how to write in cursive.$h#$e#She has such pretty handwriting.
stardewcraft.npc.jas.tue6: You can play with my dolls if you want to. Just make sure to brush their hair when you're done.
stardewcraft.npc.jas.wed4: Aunt Marnie won't let me go out after 6 o'clock. It's not fair!$s#$e#I'm not afraid of the dark anymore!
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.2_1: My husband Kent is a soldier, working overseas. That's why he's not here right now.#$b#I know he'll come back safe once his tour is over!!#$e#Need something?
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.acceptgift_(o)star: Ah... You sure you want to give away such a precious item? Well, thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.cc_bus: They say the bus is back up and running. I'm sure Pam is happy about that...#$b#I heard she'd been drinking more after losing her job... so hopefully this helps.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.dating_sam_memory_: I heard about you and Sam. Hopefully he won't cause you any trouble!$h
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.eventseen_101: Poor Clint... they say he's head-over-heels for Emily, but I've heard she only thinks of him as a friend...
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.eventseen_3102768: Penny's a sweet girl. She's been Vincent's teacher for a while now, and he really loves her.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.eventseen_3910975: *whisper* Did you hear about Shane? That's so terrible... I hope he's doing okay.$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.eventseen_58: I've been doing aerobics class with the ladies every week...#$b#Recently, someone new joined the class, but he made us all swear we wouldn't reveal his identity!
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.eventseen_94: Thanks again for bringing that fish! It was some of the best we've had in a while.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.fall_mon6: I should count my blessings more often. We have a good life here. Some people don't have enough food to eat.$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.fall_sun: Caroline and I are good friends. I tell her everything.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.fall_sun2: When you become a parent, you have to leave your old lifestyle behind.#$e#Maybe that's not entirely true... but if you're not careful, it will happen.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.fall_thu: Maybe I've spoiled the boys a bit. They've never had to do any chores.#$e#I guess I want them to be able to enjoy their childhood while they still can. Well, Sam's basically a man now, though.#$b#I hope he hasn't grown up to be lazy. That won't do.$s#$e#Being a parent isn't very easy.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.fall_thu_inlaw_sam: Is Sam just bumming around the farm, or is he contributing?
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.fri: $d Joja#The food at JojaMart might not be the healthiest for my family, but with such low prices you'd be crazy to shop anywhere else!|The food at Pierre's is so much fresher and healthier than anything I ever bought at JojaMart. I do miss those cheap Joja prices, though.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.gift_taste.dislike: Hmm, well I guess I could always put this in the compost...
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.gift_taste.liked: Thank you! This makes my day really special.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.gift_taste.loved: Oh, you're such a sweetheart! I really love this!
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.gift_taste.neutral: That's so nice of you! Thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.greenrain: Are you alright? We've never seen anything like this before...$s#$e#I wish my husband was here. He'd know exactly what to do.$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.greenrain_2: Vincent got up early to go play in the rain. I just hope they're right about it being completely harmless!
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.introduction: Oh! You aren't exactly how I imagined... but that's okay! I'm Jodi.#$e#It's a quiet little town, so it's very exciting when someone new moves in! Having a farmer around could really change things.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.married_sam: I'm so happy for you and Sam. I think you two are the perfect match!#$e#I never thought I'd say it... but I'll miss those awful noises from Sam's guitar...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.mon: Maintaining a household is difficult work... but somebody has to do it.#$e#Yes?
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.mon2: $d kent#Yesterday I visited Yoba's Altar to give thanks for my husband's safe return.|Yesterday I visited Yoba's Altar to ask for my husband's safe return.#$e#I'm trying to stay positive, but it's hard sometimes.$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.mon6: It's nice to have a family... but I'd be lying if I said I never miss the freedom of being young...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.pamhouseupgrade: Wow... I heard what you did for Pam... Boy, I wonder what she did to get in your good graces like that?$s#$e#...I wish I had that kind of money to throw around...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.pamhouseupgradeano: Did you see Pam's new house? Boy... I wish I had that kind of money... I'd love to get the kitchen remodeled, at least...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.reject_864: What's this? It looks like one of Kent's buddies from the war. Maybe you should show it to him?
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.resort: The view is breathtaking! Deep blue as far as the eye can see...
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.resort_bar: We all love it when Gus shows up.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.resort_leaving: I think I'll make seafood tonight.$h
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.sat4: I'm so glad you're trying to improve that old farm.#$e#Once you've got everything in order, it's going to add a lot to our community!$h#$e#It's going to be a lot of work for you, though.#$e#Bye.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.summer_mon: Summer is nice, but it also means more work.#$e#I'll have to keep the garden in shape on top of working in the house!
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.summer_sun: What in the world am I going to make for dinner?#$e#*sigh*...
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.summer_thu: Housework is frustrating because you're never finished.#$e#The day after I sweep the floor, it's dirty again.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.summer_tue: Hello.#$e#Do you need something? I'm a little busy.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.summer_tue_inlaw_s: How's my little Sammy doing on the old farm?$h
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.sun: #$c .5#I'm taking a break from house chores today.$h#$e#I'm taking the day off.$h#$e#If I don't spend any time outside, I'll go crazy!#$e#Plus I don't want my legs to turn soft.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.sun8: I had a dream that I had complete freedom, no obligation to anyone but myself...#$b#...Then I woke up and realized I had a full day of house chores ahead of me...$s#$e#But I don't regret having a family, @... Sam and Vincent mean everything to me!
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.thu: So you're a farmer, huh? Interesting.#$e#I've never met a farmer before.#$e#Maybe some day you can teach me how to grow vegetables.$h
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.thu6: Where does all the time go? *sigh*#$e#I remember when Sam was a little baby wearing diapers. He was such a cute little kid.$s#$e#Don't tell him I said that.$h#$e#You must really like talking to me, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.tue: Exercise is important for staying healthy. I always make sure to set aside some time for it.#$e#As a parent, I don't have much time to devote to myself. So I try and make every minute count.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.wed: What did you say? It's %time already? My goodness!#$e#I still have tons of work to do!$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.wed4: I wish I could spend more time outside, but there's so much work to do.#$e#I started wearing rubber gloves to keep my hands soft.#$e#The older you get, the more work you have to do to stay healthy.$s#$e#Ok, bye!
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.winter_fri: It would be nice to take a vacation once in a while...$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.winter_mon: I loved playing in the snow when I was a kid. The great thing about being a mother is that I get to enjoy it again.$h
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.winter_sun: If I was rich the first thing I'd do would be to hire a maid and a chef.#$e#My goodness, that would be nice!$h
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.winter_thu: Sam makes a lot of noise with that music of his. I hope it doesn't disturb the neighbors.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.winter_thu8: We kind of rushed into our marriage, with Kent being a soldier and all... I hardly got a taste of youth and freedom, and now it's too late to ever go back.$s#$e#I can't believe I'm saying this to you.$4
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.winter_thu_inlaw_s: How's Sam doing? I have to admit, there's less cooking and cleaning to do since he moved out...
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.winter_tue: Hi. Do you get tired of people asking about your farm all the time?#$e#I think I would.
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.winter_tue6: *sigh*... Sometimes I dream about life on my own... without a family to look after. Is that horrible?$s#$e#Don't tell anyone.$4
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.winter_wed2: What do I do for fun? Hmm... That's a good question.#$e#I like sleeping.$s
stardewcraft.npc.jodi.winter_wed4_2: Kent has been home for a while now, but he still seems uneasy.$s
stardewcraft.npc.leah.acceptbirthdaygift: Hey, thanks a bunch, @! This makes my birthday feel special.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.acceptgift_(o)169: Oh! Thank you! This one has an interesting shape...$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.acceptgift_(o)196: $c 0.8#This looks delicious... Thank you! There's nothing quite like a fresh, wild salad.$h#Oh, wow, @! This is exactly what I was craving! How'd you know?$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.acceptgift_(o)200: Mmm... Back in the city, the veggies never tasted this fresh. I love it!$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.acceptgift_(o)430: Hey, where'd you find that? *sniff*... Mmm... This will be perfect, grated over a fresh pasta. Thank you!$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.acceptgift_(o)star: Oh, wow... I had a sip of this stuff when I was a kid, and I've never forgotten the taste.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.beach: I came for the sound of the ocean. Beautiful, isn't it?
stardewcraft.npc.leah.breakup: Ohh... Got it. Hah... I really don't have any luck when it comes to this stuff...$s
stardewcraft.npc.leah.dating_leah: I had a feeling you would ask me...$l
stardewcraft.npc.leah.dating_leah_memory: Please don't feel like you have to spend all your time with me now that we're dating... I know you're a busy person!
stardewcraft.npc.leah.divorced: I've realized I'm happier by myself. So just leave me be.$u
stardewcraft.npc.leah.dumped_girls: I don't want to see you for a while...$s
stardewcraft.npc.leah.event_parents1: You're right... I just wouldn't have been happy back there.$u#$b#It was better for both of us... to end an unsustainable relationship while we were still young and flexible.$u
stardewcraft.npc.leah.event_parents2: That's a little harsh... but, yeah. We had different priorities.$u
stardewcraft.npc.leah.event_parents3: Oh yeah? Well maybe I'll just leave, then!%fork$a
stardewcraft.npc.leah.event_parents4: *sigh*...$s#$b#I guess you're right... it was kind of selfish. But can you really blame me for wanting to be happy? Ugh... I don't know...$s
stardewcraft.npc.leah.event_parents5: *sigh*...$s#$b#Maybe you're right... Humans are selfish creatures. I don't know. $s#$b#I probably shouldn't dwell on it. We all have to make hard choices from time to time.$s
stardewcraft.npc.leah.event_sculpt2: There's nothing wrong with that... I think there's lots of beauty to be found in raw, untouched nature!#$b#But as a human, I'm also interested in how we shape and interpret the world around us... I guess what I'm saying is that I'm interested in 'art'.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.event_sculpt3: You pig!%fork$a^Oh! You're...? Me too.$6#$b#Get out!$a^That's good to know.$l
stardewcraft.npc.leah.eventseen_53_memor: I sold enough art at that show to get by for another year... that's all I needed!
stardewcraft.npc.leah.eventseen_54_memor: I'm still fuming about the picnic... what a weirdo!$a#$b#Let's never talk about... that person... ever again.$s
stardewcraft.npc.leah.eventseen_584059_m: If my art continues to sell online like it has, I'll be able to keep making art forever. That's always been my dream.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_1: How quickly the seasons change!#$e#It's shocking.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_fri: Do you have a kitchen in your house?#$e#If you have a kitchen, you can cook all kinds of delicious meals.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_fri6: Stop by my cabin if you ever need someone to talk to.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_mon: #$c .5#I found some wild mushrooms over the weekend!#$e#I had a huge plate of wild mushrooms and eggs for breakfast today... I'm still full.#$e#Keep your nose to the ground and you'll find some mushrooms yourself... I'm sure of it.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_sat: Decorations accentuate the feeling of the season. I think it's a worthwhile tradition.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_sun: There's a lot of good places to walk around here.#$e#It feels good to stretch your legs.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_sun4: One thing I love about this place is that there are beautiful waterfalls.#$e#Do you ever spend time watching them? It's soothing...
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_thu6: One of these days I'll have to make you a wild mushroom stir-fry.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_tue: I wonder if I could make a collage out of dried leaves?#$e#They're just so colorful... I can't help but think of the potential for art projects.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_tue4: Everyone has a unique and interesting perspective, whether they believe it or not. Don't you think so?#$e#Although, some people have opinions that I just can't respect.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fall_wed: It's so nice to live by the river.#$e#I fall asleep to the soothing sound of water every night.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.flowerdance_accept: You want to dance with me? Yes!$h#$e#I was wondering if you'd ask me...$h
Finally! I was starting to get worried you wanted to dance with someone else!$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.flowerdance_declin: I'll be honest. I don't want to dance with you.$u
stardewcraft.npc.leah.flowerdance_taken: I already promised someone else. I don't want to back out after saying yes.$u
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fri: It's simpler to be friends with the trees. They don't have much to say.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fri2: We wouldn't be able to survive without nature. It's good to remember that.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fri4: Hello, @. It's a nice day, isn't it?#$e#Stop by my cabin if you ever need someone to talk to.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fri6: Sometimes, a strange feeling comes over me. My head becomes totally empty... and I feel completely at peace, even blissful.#$e#Hey, now! It has nothing to do with drinking wine!$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.fri8: Do you ever wonder what it's like to be a different person?#$e#Do our thoughts manifest in a similar way, or is it radically different?#$e#Don't mind me, I think about weird things sometimes...$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.gift_taste.dislike: Hmm... I guess everyone has different tastes.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.gift_taste.hated: This is a pretty terrible gift, isn't it?
stardewcraft.npc.leah.gift_taste.liked: This is a really nice gift! Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.leah.gift_taste.loved: Oh! This is exactly what I wanted! Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.leah.greenrain: Where did all these plants come from? It's a surprise, but I'm not complaining...
stardewcraft.npc.leah.greenrain_2: Imagine if this rain lasted all summer... The plants would take over the entire valley!
stardewcraft.npc.leah.greenrainfinished: I guess everyone in town was scared of that strange rain? I had no idea... I just thought it was incredible!$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.introduction: Hello, it's nice to meet you. $h#$e#You picked a good time to move here... The spring is lovely.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.married_elliott: Elliott's a real romantic... I'm sure your days will be filled with poetry!$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.married_shane: I'm happy that Shane's in such a good place. I've never seen him smile so much!#$e#With his love for chickens, I'm sure he'll fit right in on %farm Farm!$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.mon: The trees look nice today, don't they?#$q 21/22/211132 Mon_old#So why did you become a farmer?#$r 21 -5 Mon_21#I want to make tons of money.#$r 22 5 Mon_22#It's more "real" than living in the city.#$r 211132 5 Mon_211132#To follow in Grandpa's footsteps.#$r 22 5 Mon_22#I wanted to escape my old life.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.mon_21: Hmm. That seems kind of shallow, doesn't it?$s
stardewcraft.npc.leah.mon_211132: That's very sweet to honor your grandfather like that.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.mon_22: Hey... That's pretty much the reason I came here, too!$h#$b#I wanted to connect with nature more...
stardewcraft.npc.leah.mon_old: $p 21#So are you making as much money as you hoped?|Spending time in nature is very rewarding.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.resort: I love the weather in Stardew Valley, but seeing a different climate now and then helps put things into perspective.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.resort_bar: Have you tried the Piña Colada? I'm on my second one... hehe.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.resort_chair: I like the heat as long as I'm keeping perfectly still.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.resort_entering: Don't tell anyone, but Willy let me steer the boat for a few minutes.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.resort_shore: The shape of the waves here is awe inspiring.#$e#I wonder if I could ever capture that sort of formlessness in a sculpture.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.resort_wander: Mmm, I bet the trees around here would make for an interesting medium to work with.#$e#Though Willy probably wouldn't be happy with me if I dragged a bunch of logs onto his ship!$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.resort_wander_2: I wonder what kind of things you could forage out here.#$e#I think I saw some tasty looking walnuts growing on a bush nearby.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.sat: I love to decorate for the different seasons.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.sat8: $query PLAYER_NPC_RELATIONSHIP current any married roommate#I've thought about growing some crops, but I think I'd feel bad having to clear out all the wild plants to make space.|Farming sounds so fun. I want to try it, someday.$l
stardewcraft.npc.leah.secondchance_girls: You caused a lot of grief with what you did... but I'm ready to put the past behind us.$s
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_1: You can tell it's summer by the sweet smell of nectar wafting through the air!$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_fri: You can use a tapper to harvest syrups and other useful liquids directly from trees.#$e#It's a slow process, but the result can be quite valuable.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_fri2: I hate to be blunt, but if we don't treat nature with respect, our grandchildren will be doomed.#$e#Don't you think so?
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_fri4: Do you ever walk out into the forest... Pause... And simply enjoy the beauty of nature?#$e#It's easy to forget how incredible this world actually is...
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_fri6: Hello, @. Do you ever get lonely on that big farm?#$e#Stop by my cabin if you ever need someone to talk to.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_mon: I found some wild fruits this morning!#$e#Sorry, I don't have any left.$s#$e#Keep looking, I'm sure you'll find something.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_sat: The flowing water keeps my house a little bit cooler in summer.#$e#I can't tolerate heat very well.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_sat4: One Summer, it was so hot during the night that I got out of bed and jumped into the river!#$e#I hope no one saw me!$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_sun: What should I do on such a warm, lazy day? *sigh*#$e#Any ideas?
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_thu6: I have a good eye for wild fruit. Some day I'll make you a nice fruit salad.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_tue: The sound of farm animals is great, isn't it?
stardewcraft.npc.leah.summer_tue4: The simple things in life are best: a soft summer breeze, majestic clouds, and a goblet full of Stardew Valley red.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.sun: If you hear any banging from inside my hut, it's probably just me working on one of my sculptures.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.sun8: If you ever find any interesting looking driftwood, I could use it.#$e#It would be special that you gave it to me.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.thu: There's actually a lot of wild food in this area, if you know where to look.#$e#I've been having fresh salads almost every day.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.thu6: Foraging is a specialty of mine. Someday I'll make you a fresh salad.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.tue: Hello, neighbor.#$e#We both live outside of town. Does that mean something?
stardewcraft.npc.leah.tue4: Hi. Oh, you want to talk?#$e#The landscape around here gives me a lot of ideas. The terrain is almost like a sculpture itself.#$e#I don't make art for money. It's just an urge that I have.#$e#Farming seems like a very rewarding profession. You get to create delicious food for everyone!$h#$e#You're probably busy. Sorry.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.wed: #$1 LeahBug#This morning I accidentally stepped on a bug.$s#$e#Sometimes I think it's impossible to live without destroying nature in some way.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.wed6: I love being around animals. They're so innocent.#$e#Farm animals are wonderful, too.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.wed8: $query PLAYER_NPC_RELATIONSHIP current any married roommate#It must be satisfying to harvest a whole field of crops, huh? You're basically creating food out of nothing!$h|Hi @! I was just thinking about you and your farm.#$e#I was imagining how good it must feel to harvest a big bunch of crops.$h#$e#Wouldn't it be nice to have help, though?$l
stardewcraft.npc.leah.winter_fri: Time seems to move slower here.#$e#When I lived in the city, the year went by so fast.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.winter_fri6: Do you ever get cold in that farmhouse of yours?#$e#Stop by my cabin if you want to huddle under one of my quilts and drink cider.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.winter_mon: I love the way everything looks when it's covered with fresh snow.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.winter_sat2: Hello, @. Is there something you wanted to talk about?
stardewcraft.npc.leah.winter_sun: Do you ever take a whole day off?#$e#It's a refreshing break.
stardewcraft.npc.leah.winter_sun4: You should take a whole day off, now and then.#$b#Not only is it good for the soul, but in the long run, you'll actually be more productive!
stardewcraft.npc.leah.winter_thu: I'm having a hard time finding fresh food to eat.#$e#I've been eating a lot of bread.$s
stardewcraft.npc.leah.winter_thu6: *Sigh*... It's hard to get fresh food in the winter.#$e#I bet your farm is pretty well stocked with food, huh?
stardewcraft.npc.leah.winter_tue: It gets pretty cold in my little cabin.$s#$e#I just snuggle up under a huge blanket, and I'm okay.$h
stardewcraft.npc.leah.winter_wed: I saw a snow rabbit early this morning! They're rare, aren't they?
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.acceptbirthdaygif: Ah, you remembered the old mayor's birthday... what's this?$h$bUm... well you know what they say, 'it's the thought that counts'.
Ah, you remembered the old mayor's birthday. That's very thoughtful of you. And it's a nice gift!$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.acceptgift_(o)sta: I've sampled many teas in my life, but none are quite so rare and special as this. Thanks!
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.cc_begin: *sniff*... *sniff*... Ah, I sense you've been spending some time in the old Community Center. It's good to know someone's taking care of the place.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.cc_bridge: Somehow, that old bridge to the quarry is now repaired.$bI'm shocked... It must've taken a whole team to fix that thing!$bWho could've done that?
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.cc_bus: @, did you hear? It seems the old town bus started working again overnight!$h$bThat old thing has been dormant for decades... This is truly a great mystery.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.cc_complete: I've never felt such an overwhelming pride in our community. You've done Pelican Town a great service, @.$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.cropmatured_24: Hey, I was doing my nightly rounds, and noticed that your first parsnip was ready. Congratulations!
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.cropmatured_254: Those melons have been looking real good over at %farm farm!$h$bYou know, that was one of your grandpa's favorite crops back in the day.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.cropmatured_276: Nothing says 'Fall' quite like a pumpkin, don't you think?
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.divorced_once: The divorce paperwork is all squared away. Sorry that things didn't work out...
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.divorced_twice: Another divorce? C'mon, @... you should be a little more careful who you decide to marry in the future...$u
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.event_secret1: Thank you @. I won't forget this.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.event_secret2: *sob* ... I can't believe you would do that...$s$bYou're terrible.$s
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_12: Do you have any bee houses on your farm?$bIf you place them near flowers you can get different types of honey.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_19: Sometimes you can tell if there's something buried underground. Just keep your eyes open.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_fri: I hope things are going well for you on the farm.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_fri4: Have you tried Gus' 'secret' spaghetti sauce?$s$b...The ingredients may be secret, but the smell isn't.$bI'll see you later.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_mon: Some of the townsfolk are wary of strangers. You'll have to win their trust before they open up to you.$bJust be persistent and you'll get through to them.$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_sun: Are you doing your best on the farm, @? You'll have to accomplish things in many areas if you want to become a well-rounded citizen.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_thu: The saloon gets pretty lively at night.$bI like to visit once a week or so to catch up on things.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_town_57_40: #$c .3#Hmmm... these strange little mushrooms have been popping up in my wood chips. I wonder what kind they are?#$c .3#Good morning! We're slowly entering the cold months, so I'm seeing my garden to a gentle end.$bAh, you're in town early, huh? Finished with your farm chores already?
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_tue: It was around this time of year when I first became Mayor, over twenty years ago.$bThat makes me feel really old.$s
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_wed: If you have any suggestions for the town, just drop a note into my suggestion box.$bOh, that's right... I don't have a suggestion box.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fall_wed2: Every Wednesday I have buckwheat waffles and coffee for breakfast. It's a little tradition I observe to keep the bachelor life interesting.$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.fri: I hope things are going well on %farm farm. I'd hate to see it all dried up.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.gift_taste.dislik: Well, I guess it's the thought that counts...
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.gift_taste.hated: This makes me sick. What a horrendous gift.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.gift_taste.loved: Wow, this is my favorite! Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.gift_taste.neutra: That's very nice of you. Thanks.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.greenrain: I just got off the phone with the Governor... Apparently this rain is supposed to be completely harmless. Just an unusual phenomenon of nature.$bStill, some of the townsfolk are panicking, which is never good...
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.greenrain_2: I guess we can expect these unusual rains every year. I think everyone is a little calmer knowing that it's just part of nature.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.greenrainfinished: Well, that was quite the excitement for our little town! I'm just relieved that everyone is okay.$h$bIf this ever happens again, I think we'll all be a little more relaxed. It's not the end of the world!
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.introduction: So, how was your first night in the old cottage?$bYour grandpa used to complain about the rickety old bed. But I think, deep down, he actually loved that house.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.joja_begin: So, the old Community Center is gone... I guess times change, and good things come and go... Yet I can't help but feel a sense of loss.$s$bI just hope this doesn't mar my record as Mayor.$s
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.married: Congratulations, @. This is a big step forward for you and %spouse. You've really grown some roots in this town!
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.mon: It's a good season to start thinking about gardening, even for us non-farmers.$b The valley is known for producing some of the finest spring flowers!$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.movietheater: All the young people seem happy about the new movie theater.$bA thriving theater will be good for the local economy. I just hope there's nothing objectionable in those modern pictures!
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.pamhouseupgrade: @, I heard what you did for Pam and Penny... now *that's* the kind of community support I love to see in Pelican Town!$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.pamhouseupgradean: @, did you hear? Someone paid Robin to build Pam and Penny a house! Robin won't tell me who it was, though.$bRegardless of who paid, I love seeing this kind of community support in Pelican Town!$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.resort: I'm impressed, @. You've really fixed up the place!$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.resort_bar: Hehe... Gus is really in his element.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.resort_chair: Hehe... look at this place! I don't know how you did it, but this little vacation spot is the talk of the town.$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.resort_leaving: Everyone aboard! We're heading back to the valley!
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.resort_shore: Vacation opportunities like this could really expand the local economy!$bI'd better not stay in the sun too long, or my moustache will dry out.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.saloon: Good evening! It's nice to see you socializing with the townsfolk.$bIt's good to stop by once in a while and see what the latest news is.$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.saloon4: Good evening, @! I'm glad to see you relaxing at the saloon. It's good for you to take a break now and then.$h$bYour grandfather always worked himself too hard... I'll have an extra beer in his honor tonight.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.sat: Everyone seems a little happier on the weekends, don't you think?$bI'm on the job seven days a week, though.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.spring_10: Ah... There's nothing like a strong cup of tea in the morning.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.spring_3: Have you planted any spring crops yet? The season doesn't last forever, you know.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.summer_fri: Hmm... I wonder if it's anyone's birthday today? I'd better check the calendar by Pierre's shop.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.summer_mon: Gardening is a hobby of mine, so I'm excited for this warm weather.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.summer_sat: Everyone seems a little happier on the weekends, don't you think?$bI'm on the job seven days a week, though.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.summer_sun: Say, are you growing any blueberries on your farm?$bI do enjoy a fresh blueberry.%revealtaste:Lewis:258
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.summer_thu: The saloon gets pretty lively at night.$bI like to visit once a week or so to catch up on things. And to get a taste of Gus' authentic spaghetti.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.summer_town_57_40: #$c .3#Ah, my flowers are growing wonderfully!$h#$c .3#Good morning! Can you smell the sweet scent of these dew-lilies?$bIt's early but the air is already quite warm. Summer is nice for an old guy like me hehe.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.summer_tue: How did I become Mayor in the first place? It's a long story.$bWe're both too busy for stories right now.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.summer_wed: The moonlight jellies will be here soon. It's one of my favorite things about the valley.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.sun: I've been Mayor of Pelican Town for over twenty years!$bNo one ever runs against me when it's time for an election. I like to think that it means I'm doing my job well.$bI like being Mayor.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.thu: The saloon can get pretty lively at night. Sometimes we even put a coin in the jukebox *chuckle*$h$bI like to visit once a week or so to catch up on things, anyway.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.town_57_40: #$c .3#You're in town early, huh? Finished with your farm chores already?$bGood morning! I'm just checking on the garden as usual.$h#$c .5#Hmm... are these aphids?$s$bHmm... I hope these aren't scale bugs...$s
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.tue: Just place anything you want to sell in the shipping box next to your house.$bI'll be interested in seeing what kinds of things you put in there.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.tue2: At the start of each season you'll have to remove the previous season's dead crops. It's easiest with a scythe.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.willycrabs: *sniff*... *sniff*... can you smell that? I've been catching hints of fresh crab all day...$u
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.winter_1: Well, winter is here! That means the townspeople will be spending most of their days indoors.$bAt least you'll know where to find them!$h
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.winter_fri: I hope things are going well for you on the farm.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.winter_fri6: I've never been married. I have no family. All I live for is to be Mayor.$s$bIs it worth it?$s$b...*sigh*...$s
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.winter_mon: Another year is almost over!$bI hope you had a productive year!
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.winter_sun: Hi there, @! How're you doing today?$h$bIf you see Marnie, tell her I say 'hi'.
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.winter_tue: I've got to start coming up with a plan for improving our town next year!
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.winter_wed: I'll still come by every night to collect your produce, even in the snow.$bYou still need to make money in the winter!
stardewcraft.npc.lewis.wongrange: Congrats on winning that grange display competition.$bHehe... Just between you and me, I think Pierre needed a bowl of humble pudding!$h
stardewcraft.npc.linus.acceptgift_(o)166: No, thank you. I have no desire for money... In fact, I think it's cursed. [166]
stardewcraft.npc.linus.acceptgift_(o)774: Let me see... it looks perfect. You're a good student, @.$h
stardewcraft.npc.linus.acceptgift_(o)boo: I don't usually read books... But this one is right up my 'alley'... Thank you!$h
stardewcraft.npc.linus.acceptgift_(o)sta: This means a lot to me, @. I'll save it for a quiet day in the tent. Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.linus.acceptgift_positi: Ah, that looks fresh. I'll be eating good tonight!$h
That's a good find! I'm always happy when eating wild food. Thank you.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.cc_boulder: My old friend, the glimmering boulder, has moved on. It may not seem like an important event, but to me it's a big change.#$b#I'm happy for the old rock to see more of the world, though.$h
stardewcraft.npc.linus.eventseen_8357109: The water here comes from glaciers high up in the mountains.#$e#I traveled to the source once, just to pay my respects to the water.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.fall_mon: I've explored deep into the caves.#$e#They hold some hidden secrets.#$e#Just be cautious if you go in there.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.fall_sun: I don't like to stay in one place for too long.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.fall_sun6: There's nothing quite like a feast of wild mushrooms in the fall.$h
stardewcraft.npc.linus.fall_tue4: #$1 LinusFall1#Some joker sprayed paint all over my home during the night... It took hours to scrub it off this morning.$k#$e#I need to start gathering lumber for the winter.#$e#Do you have enough lumber to keep your house warm?
stardewcraft.npc.linus.fall_wed4: I don't have many responsibilities, so I spend my time thinking.#$e#You have to understand your thoughts before you can control them.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.fri: Please don't destroy my tent.#$e#It's happened before.$s
stardewcraft.npc.linus.fri4: You can learn a lot from trees.#$b#Spend time with them and they might tell you their secrets.#$e#Go in peace, young one.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.gift_taste.dislik: Hmm... This doesn't really do much for me.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.gift_taste.hated: Why would you give this to me? Do you think I like junk just because I live in a tent? That's terrible.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.gift_taste.liked: This is a great gift. Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.linus.gift_taste.loved: This is wonderful! You've really made my day special.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.greenrain: All these strange trees will be gone tomorrow... it's one of the mysteries of nature.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.greenrain_2: I've already gathered enough moss for the entire year. How about you?
stardewcraft.npc.linus.greenrainfinished: How did the moss harvest go? Hehe... My bed is a lot softer now.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.introduction: A stranger?... Hello.#$e#Don't mind me. I just live out here alone.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.married: I thought about tying the knot, once. But now, I'm happily married to the wind rustling in the leaves, and the frogs croaking under the silver moon.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.minearea_80: Very few people have gone as deep into the mines as you have.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.mon: The crisp air of the wilderness is all I care to know.#$e#I live out here by choice.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.movieinvitation: Oh... me? I usually wouldn't, but... okay. It's nice of you to think about me.#$b#I'll head over there in a little while.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.movietheater: Movie theater? Hmm... for me, the slow procession of nature is all the drama I need.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.reject_869: What do you have there? Looks like it would make good bait.$h
stardewcraft.npc.linus.sat: I'm happy by myself, you know.#$e#I don't need new friends.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.sat4: I have everything I need to survive, and more. Nature plays a wonderful tune if you can only learn to listen.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.summer_fri4: Whenever you catch a fish, take a moment to thank it for its sacrifice.#$b#Even if you don't believe in the spirit of the fish, it's a good mental exercise. We need to be aware of our effect on the environment.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.summer_mon: #$1 LinusHeron#I saw a heron wading gracefully through the morning mist. Such are the treasures of a quiet life.$k#$e#It's so easy to get caught up in the noise of modern life. Your best years will pass you by in a formless blur. That's why you've got to learn to slow down.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.summer_mon4: During all these years I've discovered a few secrets about life.#$e#You'll have to find out for yourself.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.summer_sat4: You can find rainbow trout in streams right now.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.summer_sun: This is an easier time of year for me. I don't have to worry about staying warm.#$e#Plus, the fruits of the wild are growing everywhere.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.summer_thu4: I have my own reasons for living alone like this.#$e#Some things are best left unsaid...#$e#I should do some foraging.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.summer_tue4: How have you been, my young friend?
stardewcraft.npc.linus.summer_wed6: Ah... summer. The warm sun heats up the cans for me.#$b#Then at night I've got a warm meal to look forward to.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.sun: #$1 linusVandal#Someone was throwing rocks at my tent last night... I just had to wait it out.$s$k#$e#I don't like to stay in one place for too long. There's just too much to experience in the world.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.sun4: It would be nice if the townspeople could accept me for who I am.$s#$b#I like living out here in the open air. That's what they don't understand.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.thu: ...Hmm? Do you want something from me?
stardewcraft.npc.linus.thu4: The people here seem nice, but they avoid me.#$e#People are afraid of the unknown.$u
stardewcraft.npc.linus.tue: ...Have you come to ridicule me?#$e#I'm just minding my own business.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.tue4: You can learn to survive in the wild. I have.#$e#I think we all have a hidden urge to return to nature. It's just a little scary to make the leap.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.wed: I don't know you well enough to trust you. Sorry.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.wed2: I have to be wary of strangers. Most people don't like a 'wild man'.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.wed6: I spend a lot of time thinking.#$e#If you can fully understand the reasons behind your thoughts, you'll have reached a new level of being.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.winter_fri4: The trees go to sleep during the winter. It makes it a bit lonely out here.#$e#But I wouldn't deny them their beauty sleep.$h
stardewcraft.npc.linus.winter_mon: It can get really cold if you live in a tent.$s
stardewcraft.npc.linus.winter_mon4: After you've truly unplugged from the modern way of life, you'll start to really enjoy the simple things... like the sun, a ripe fruit, or finding a stick with the exact shape you were looking for.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.winter_sat4: Thanks for stopping by. I was actually feeling a little lonely this morning.#$e#So, have you discovered anything interesting in the mines?
stardewcraft.npc.linus.winter_sun: Sleeping on the ground is good for my back.#$e#It's best to look at the positive side of things.$h
stardewcraft.npc.linus.winter_thu4: Winter is tough, but you can still fish and forage to get by.#$e#If you have any animals you should keep them inside.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.winter_tue4: Thanks for not shunning me, @. It takes a lot of wisdom to override your base instincts.#$e#I'm a human like everyone else. I just have a different lifestyle.
stardewcraft.npc.linus.winter_wed4: I'm sure you understand why I'm cautious of strangers.#$e#But let's put that in the past, okay? You and I are friends now, I think.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.default: Need something? We've got supplies for any adventurer.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.fri: If you lose anything in the mines, come talk to me. I might be able to recover it... for a price.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.gift_taste.disli: Not sure what I'd do with this...
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.gift_taste.hated: ...I'll pass on that, if you don't mind.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.gift_taste.loved: Well now, that's mighty generous of you.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.introduction: Welcome to the Adventurer's Guild. I'm Marlon.#$b#If you're heading into the mines, make sure you're properly equipped. It's dangerous down there.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.menu.question: What can I do for you?
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.menu.desert_ques: What do you need from the Guild?
stardewcraft.desert_festival.marlon.not_: The Desert Festival is not active today.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.marlon.no_r: You do not have a Skull Cavern rating to submit yet.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.marlon.come: Come back tomorrow with a new rating.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.marlon.next: That is the last rating I can take this year.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.marlon.subm: Submit today's best Skull Cavern rating of %s?
stardewcraft.desert_festival.marlon.rati: Rating %s accepted. A modest run still earns a token prize.
Rating %s accepted. Solid work down there.
Rating %s accepted. You are learning Skull Cavern's rhythm.
Rating %s accepted. That was a serious descent.
Rating %s accepted. The cavern will remember that run.
Rating %s accepted. Few adventurers ever reach that mark.
That rating is beyond anything the Guild can properly reward.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.marlon.chal: Hey there. Welcome to the Adventurer's Guild Challenge Booth.#$b#Every day, we'll have a pair of challenges for you to choose from. Complete one, and the guild will reward you with a bounty of Calico Eggs.#$b#Once you've selected a challenge, you won't be able to change your decision, so choose carefully!
Choose one Guild challenge for today.

Current challenge: %1$s
%2$s
Progress: %3$s/%4$s
Reward: %5$s Calico Eggs
That is today's Guild challenge finished.
You already accepted a Guild challenge today.
You already claimed today's challenge reward.
That challenge is not finished yet.
Guild challenge complete. You received %s Calico Eggs.
Good work. Come back tomorrow if you want another contract.
Good work. That was the last Guild contract for this year's festival.
Descend into Skull Cavern and slay %1$s %2$s.
stardewcraft.desert_festival.mine.calico: Lose more eggs when you're knocked out
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.mon: Another week, another horde of monsters in the mines. It never ends.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.sat: Business has been good lately. More adventurers means more monster slaying.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.sun: Even monsters rest on Sundays... well, most of them.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.thu: I've spent my whole life fighting monsters. It's not glamorous work, but someone's got to do it.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.tue: The Guild has been keeping monster records since before you were born. Don't underestimate those old ledgers.
stardewcraft.npc.marlon.wed: The mines have been more active lately. Watch your step down there.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.acceptgift_(o)sk: Thanks, @. I always like to have a copy of the Almanac around. It's pretty accurate!$h
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.acceptgift_(o)st: Wow, thanks a million, @. I won't forget this!
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.dating_shane_mem: Shane seems a lot more positive and hopeful, lately.#$b#I'm so happy you moved here, and that you two get along so well!$h
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.fair_judged: Well, I didn't win... but it was still satisfying to share all my hard work!
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.fair_judged_play: That was some strange-looking purple lettuce in your grange display!$h#$b#I swear, it looked just like Mayor Lewis' special und... $3#$b#Oh!... heh... never mind!$4
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.fri: You can catch me at the saloon most nights.#$e#Animals are great company, but I need to spend time with people, too.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.fri6: I wonder if Mr. Lewis gets lonely in that big house of his... $s#$e#It seems so empty in there, doesn't it?
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.gift_taste.disli: Oh... well... thank you, I guess.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.gift_taste.hated: What am I supposed to do with this? It's terrible!
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.gift_taste.liked: Oh, this is nice. Thank you, dear!$h
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.gift_taste.loved: This is my absolute favorite! You're so sweet, @!$h
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.gotpet: I think you'll love having a little friend on the farm with you.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.gotpet_memory_on: I'm sure %pet will be a little shy at first. It takes a while for an animal to get comfortable in a new setting.
Has little %pet settled in yet? It's such a nice property for a pet to explore.
I just remembered... it's been about a year since you adopted %pet. I bet you two have grown really close by now!
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.greenrain: You're not worried about this rain? That does put me at ease a little...#$e#I just hope the cows tucked themselves in...$s
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.greenrain_2: The animals seems to enjoy this rain... I think it's putting extra nutrients into the grass.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.greenrainfinishe: Well, looks like we all got scared for nothing... The rain was totally harmless!
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.introduction: Ah, Mayor Lewis told me you just arrived. I'm Marnie!#$e#I sell livestock and animal care products at my ranch. You should swing by some time.$h
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.married_shane: I'm glad Shane's moving to your farm... he can keep the family tradition alive!
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.menu.question: What can I help you with?
stardewcraft.npc.morris.greeting: Welcome to JojaMart! How are you doing today?#$b#I don't believe we've met. I'm Morris, Joja Customer Satisfaction Representative.#$b#When you decide you want to become a Joja Member, I'll be delighted to help make your transition a joyous experience.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.first_membership: Welcome to JojaMart! How are you doing today?#$b#Membership is now available! With a Joja Membership, you'll be able to make improvements in the community with the help of our dedicated personnel... for a fee, of course.#$b#Oh, and another thing... Mayor Lewis promised us that if anyone else joined up, he'd let us turn that old community center into a Joja Warehouse. Isn't that wonderful?#$q -1 -1 morris_join_yes#Membership costs 5000g. Well, would you like to join us?#$r -1 -1 morris_join_yes#Yes.#$r -1 -1 morris_dismiss#No.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.weekend_membersh: Welcome to JojaMart! How is your weekend going?#$b#Membership is now available! With a Joja Membership, you'll be able to make improvements in the community with the help of our dedicated personnel... for a fee, of course.#$b#Oh, and another thing... Mayor Lewis promised us that if anyone else joined up, he'd let us turn that old community center into a Joja Warehouse. Isn't that wonderful?#$q -1 -1 morris_join_yes#Membership costs 5000g. Well, would you like to join us?#$r -1 -1 morris_join_yes#Yes.#$r -1 -1 morris_dismiss#No.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.first_cc_done: Welcome to JojaMart! How are you doing today?#$b#Unfortunately, due to unforeseen circumstances our Joja Membership offer is not currently available. I'm certain it will get sorted out soon!
stardewcraft.npc.morris.weekend_cc_done: Welcome to JojaMart! How is your weekend going?#$b#Unfortunately, due to unforeseen circumstances our Joja Membership offer is not currently available. I'm certain it will get sorted out soon!
stardewcraft.npc.morris.signup_confirm: If you become a Joja Member, the community center will become a Joja Warehouse, and you will no longer be able to refurbish it. However, Joja will provide an alternative means to improving the town. Are you sure you want to join?#$q -1 -1 morris_signup_yes#$r -1 -1 morris_signup_yes#Yes.#$r -1 -1 morris_dismiss#No.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.signed_up: Excellent! Welcome to Joja Corporation! Come back tomorrow and we can see about getting started on some community development projects... Oh, and don't forget your wallet! Hehe.#$b#Now, let me call Mayor Lewis and see about gutting that nasty old community center...
stardewcraft.npc.morris.come_back_later: Come back tomorrow and we can see about getting started on some community development projects... And make sure to bring lots of cash. Hehe.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.processing: We're currently processing your last Community Development order. Please come back after the work is complete.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.cd_form_offer: $q -1 -1 morris_cd_yes#I've got the Joja Community Development Form right here for you. Care to take a look?#$r -1 -1 morris_cd_yes#Yes#$r -1 -1 morris_dismiss#No
stardewcraft.npc.morris.cd_confirm: Excellent! We'll get our workers on it tonight. It should be ready for you by tomorrow.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.no_more_cd: Ah! My favorite customer... Unfortunately I have no more community development projects available at the moment.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.mon: I love animals, @. If you treat yours well I'm sure we'll become good friends!
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.mon4: Animals are so innocent, so sweet. And If I don't look after them, who will?$s#$e#I just hope my chickens aren't too upset when I take their eggs.$s
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.reject_789: Gah!$4#$b#...Um... What? Heh.. I don't know what that is...$3
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.resort: Hehe... finally a chance to show off all my hard work at aerobics club.$h
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.resort_shore: Hee hee... It's interesting to see everyone in their bathing suits.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.saloon: Now that I'm here I can finally relax and socialize a bit.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.saloon_fri: %Marnie doesn't seem to notice that you're there...
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.saloon_sat: I always see Clint here but he won't talk to anyone. He just glances over his shoulder now and then.$s
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.saloon_thu: Phew! It sure feels good to kick back after a hard day's work.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.saloon_tue: There aren't very many people here today...$s
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.saloon_wed: I spilled a whole bucket of milk on the floor today, it was horrible. And such a waste of my poor Belinda's hard work.$s#$e#It's nice of you to show up! It's a little more lively now.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.sat: Have you been to that strange tower west of my house?#$e#One time I heard this terrible, otherworldly noise coming from there.$s#$e#I would avoid that place if I were you...
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.structurebuilt_s: Oh, you got a horse? That's so wonderful! Horses are amazing animals.$h
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.sun: Hey there, it's good to see ya!#$e#Feel free to visit us any time you please.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.sun8: Hi @!$h#$e#I'm glad we've become friends. I know I can trust you to take care of my dear animals.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.thu: Hi. Need something?#$e#I might be getting some different kinds of animals in the future.#$e#Although, I'll need to make sure there's a market for them, so you'll have to prove your skill with animals first.#$e#Just keep treating your animals with respect and good things will happen.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.thu_2: You've been here a while, now... how's your farm doing?#$e#Taking care of animals is easy as long as you don't forget about them!$h
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.tue: My nephew Shane has been staying at my place the last few months.#$e#He helps me out with the chickens, so I'm not complaining.
stardewcraft.npc.marnie.wed: You can use a scythe to cut feed from grass.#$e#Or you can buy it from me, of course!$h#$e#I could use the cash...$u#$e#Adios.
stardewcraft.npc.maru.acceptbirthdaygift: Hey, what's this, a birthday gift? It's... uh, well, it's a gift! Thanks for remembering me, anyway.
Hey, what's this, a birthday gift? It's great! Thanks for remembering me!$h
stardewcraft.npc.maru.acceptgift_(o)122: Ooh, this is exciting! I'll deconstruct it and see if I can reverse-engineer the technology.$h
stardewcraft.npc.maru.acceptgift_(o)336: Ah, pure gold... It's not the strongest material, but it has some really useful properties!$h
stardewcraft.npc.maru.acceptgift_(o)337: Oh, wow! That's a rare element. It's theorized that all the iridium in our world comes from meteorites...$h
stardewcraft.npc.maru.acceptgift_(o)787: This will be perfect for powering my latest project! Thanks, @!$h
stardewcraft.npc.maru.acceptgift_(o)910: Ahh! Be careful with that! Are you touching it with your bare hands?$9#$b#... Sorry... hehe... With proper handling, this will be perfect for an exotic machine I'm building.
stardewcraft.npc.maru.acceptgift_(o)star: Mmm... How does it taste so good? This is really a great gift.
stardewcraft.npc.maru.breakup: Not good enough for you, huh?$a#$b#Fine...$s
stardewcraft.npc.maru.dating_maru: Ummm... Don't break the news to my Dad, okay? I'll handle it.
stardewcraft.npc.maru.dating_maru_memory: Mmm... I'm having a hard time focusing on my work today.$l
stardewcraft.npc.maru.divorced: We have nothing to say to each other.$a
stardewcraft.npc.maru.dumped_girls: You've got some nerve, speaking to me!$a
stardewcraft.npc.maru.event_cut1: Oh no?$8#$b#Well, that makes me feel a little better, then. Thanks.
