stardewcraft.npc.shane.pamhouseupgradean: I heard someone bought Pam a house... *sigh*... What did Pam ever do to earn that kind of generosity??
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sat: Why are you bothering me? I want to be alone.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sat10: Your farm seems like a great place to raise chickens.$h
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sat2: #$1 ShaneJOSH#I'm surprised that you're still trying to make friends with me. Haven't I been rude enough to you yet?#$e#*sigh*...$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sat4: $d Joja#I'm renting my room from Marnie at a really good price. It's small but I can't complain.|If I could reset my life maybe I'd start a chicken farm. Only free-range eggs of course.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sat8: I've really grown attached to Marnie's chickens.$h||A chicken will never let you down. Humans, on the other hand...
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun: I'm busy, can't you tell?||...I don't feel like talking to anyone.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun10: Hi, @. I've actually been having a pretty good day so far.$h
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun2: You again? How many times do I have to tell you to leave me alone?$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun4: Hmm... it's %time. Should I throw a frozen pizza in the microwave, or should I wait?$u||If the Tunnelers win, I'll knock back a cold one to celebrate.#$e#If they lose? I'll have a cold one to drown my sorrows.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun6: ...I think I might be gaining weight.$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.sun8: If I watch more TV maybe I can forget about life. That would be relaxing.$u
stardewcraft.npc.shane.thu: What do you want? Leave me alone.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.thu4: You're really persistent. I guess I'm just surprised that anyone would be interested in talking to me.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.thu6: Buh... Where's the Joja Cola?||Why try? Life's just a roll of the dice.#$e#When they rolled mine, the dice fell off the table.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.thu8: You like talking to me? I guess I believe you... maybe you're as weird as I am.$h
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue: What? What do you want? Go away.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue10: I need to keep it together for Jas' sake. I don't want to be a bad role model for her.||I'm kind of like a father figure to Jas. I just hope I haven't let her down too much.$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue2: What do you want from me? Money? I'd give you a pot of gold to leave me alone!
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue4: Every time I try something new it goes horribly wrong. You learn to just stay in a shell.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue6: Life isn't so bad... at least I have frozen pizza and eggs.$u
stardewcraft.npc.shane.tue8: We should go to a Tunnelers game some time. When I go by myself, I usually drink way too much beer.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.wed: No, I don't have time to chat with you.
stardewcraft.npc.shane.wed4: $d Joja#*sigh* ...Every day is the same. Stocking those horrible shelves, going to the saloon, tossing and turning all night.$s|I hated my job at JojaMart, but now that I'm unemployed I feel even worse.$s
stardewcraft.npc.shane.wed8: I guess I've grown attached to Marnie and Jas. We're a ragtag bunch but it kind of feels like a weird family.#$e#I never really had much of a family as a kid.$s
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.acceptbirthdayg: A birthday present? Oh... this isn't very fun.$s
Is that a birthday present? Can I open it now?#$b#Oh, wow! This is exactly what I wanted! Yayayaya!$h
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.acceptgift_(tr): *Squish* *squish* ... Ewww! Can I have it? Can I have it? Yaaay!$h
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.default: Oh, a stranger! My name's Vincent.
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.fri: #$c .3#Ew, it's boiled beet night again...$s#$e#Oh no... Mom's making lentil soup tonight.$s
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.gift_taste.love: Wow, thank you so much! This is terrific!
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.greenrain: Mom! I wanna go outside and play!%noturn
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.introduction: Oh, a stranger! My name's Vincent.#$b#Momma says not to talk to strangers... But you seem okay.
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.mon: I wanna be just like my big brother when I grow up!$h#$e#Okay! Bye!
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.mon4: $d kent#I'm glad Dad's back... but he's different than I remember...$s|Dad's not around much... I miss playing with him.$s
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.sat: Miss Penny makes me read a new book every week.$s#$b#At least she lets me pick them, sometimes!
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.sat8: $d kent#Dad seems weird since he came back. I wonder what happened to him?$s#$b#He doesn't play with me anymore.$s|I wonder if Dad will ever come home...$s
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.sun10: Hi Uncle @!^Hi Auntie @!#$e#Don't tell Mom... but you're my favorite grown-up.$h
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.thu2: You're not as boring as most grown-ups!
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.tue: *sigh*... Mom won't let me have any more gummies today.$s
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.tue6: Can you keep a secret, mister?^Can you keep a secret, miss?$u#$b#I wanna marry Miss Penny when I grow up.#$e#Just don't tell her, okay?$u
stardewcraft.npc.vincent.wed: I wanna look for bugs, but Mom gets mad when I'm all dirty.$u#$b#It's a tough choice.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.acceptgift_(o)336: *chomp*... Yep, that's real gold alright. Heh! What a gift!$h
stardewcraft.npc.willy.acceptgift_(o)682: The horror! ...What kind of monster is this?
stardewcraft.npc.willy.acceptgift_(o)sta: By the stem o' me pipe...  a cup o' Stardrop Tea! And here I thought it was only the stuff of mermaid legend. Thank you kindly.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.default: Ahoy there! It's nice to see young folk movin' in to the valley.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fishcaught_159: So, you finally conquered the Crimsonfish! That fish has been taunting me for many years. He nearly nibbled through the wood under me house!
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fishcaught_160: Ah, you caught the Angler, did ya? A good 'first step' into the world o' rare fish, that one.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fishcaught_163: By the stem o' me pipe... You actually caught 'the Legend'. I never thought I'd see the day...$h#$b#Well, you've done it... You're the best angler this valley's seen in a long time...$h
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fishcaught_682: *sniff* *sniff*... Something tells me you've been fishin' in the sewers.#$b#It's an unconventional approach, to be sure. There's legend of gargantuan carp, twisted into monsters from the toxic sludge...
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fishcaught_775: Ah, so you finally snagged the Glacierfish... That's one of the slipperiest fish I've ever encountered!#$e#How many tries did it take ya?
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fri: If you really want to get the fish biting, make sure you put some bait on your hook.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.fri4: I'm a simple man... when my pipe is full, I'm happy. When my pipe is empty... well, then I just fill 'er up again.$u
stardewcraft.npc.willy.gift_taste.dislik: Hmmm... You like stuff like this? Huh.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.gift_taste.hated: ... *sniff*... Well I guess I can toss it into the chum bucket.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.gift_taste.loved: This is great! If only me ol' Pappy was around. He'd go nuts for this.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.greenrain: Aye... I hope these weird rains don't bother the fish... It could ruin me life!
stardewcraft.npc.willy.greenrain_2: If the fish like these rains, then I like 'em, too.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.greenrainfinished: Well, the fish seem as healthy as ever. In fact, I swear they've been biting with extra vigor!
stardewcraft.npc.willy.introduction: Ahoy there! It's nice to see young folk movin' in to the valley. It's not very common these days.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.married: Giving up the single life, eh?#$b#Just don't forget to make time for fishing...
stardewcraft.npc.willy.mon: Ahoy there!#$b#Looks like decent weather for fishing, eh?
stardewcraft.npc.willy.mon4: Have you had much luck in the local waters? You look like you could be a strong angler if you set your mind to it.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.sat: If the local fishing scene got a bit more lively, I might expand the shop's stock.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.sat8: How's the fishing life going for ya?#$e#I try to fish as often as possible, but it's not easy when you've got a shop to run.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.summer_19: Tomorrow is the annual Trout Derby... Aye, it's a freshwater enthusiast's dream!#$e#Anglers from all over the world will be here to catch our beautiful Rainbow Trout...#$e#I hope to see you out there!$h#$e#For the next two days, I'll only be manning the shop for one hour, starting at 9am. So if you really need somethin', you can come by then.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.summer_20: It's the big day! I've got all me equipment tuned to catch Trout...#$e#Good luck out there!
stardewcraft.npc.willy.summer_21: How's the Derby treatin' ya so far?#$b#I've found plenty o' Golden Tags, meself... but it's not over yet!
stardewcraft.npc.willy.sun: If you purchase a high quality fishing rod, you'll be able to attach bait and tackle to the line.#$b#Bait causes fish to bite faster. Tackle can make your job a lot easier when reeling fish in.#$e#There's all kinds of tackle, with different perks. They're usually a little flimsy, so don't be surprised if your tackle breaks after a while.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.sun10: Hey, it's my skipper, @!$h#$e#I'd give you a discount on bait if I could afford it.$s
stardewcraft.npc.willy.thu: *mumble* *mumble* ...Eh? I would tell you about my thoughts, but it's a fisherman's secret.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.thu2: There's rumors of some very rare fish in these parts... but only an experienced angler could stand a chance against them.#$e#You'll need the finest bait you can get if you want a rare fish to bite.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.tue: A true angler has respect for the water... don't you forget that.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.tue6: The ol' Man was a fisherman, you know. I grew up sailing between the fern islands, living from catch to catch.#$e#The fishing life is tough, but there's something about it that keeps you goin'.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.wed: Some fish come and go with the seasons. Others only come out at night or in the rain.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.wed6: I've heard a rumor that a special kind of fish can be found in the pools between waterfalls...#$b#If you can reach it with yer rod, that is...
stardewcraft.npc.willy.winter_11: Tomorrow, at the beach, is the start of a little gathering... called 'SquidFest'.#$e#Aye... tis' a difficult catch, the squid. But I trust that you've developed a knack for the sport, by now.
stardewcraft.npc.willy.winter_12: Don't give up just yet! There's more squid in these waters...
stardewcraft.npc.willy.winter_13: It warms me ol' winter heart to see all these anglers gathered here, all for the love o' fishing...$h
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.accepted: Good. An Eye of Ender... you should know how to obtain one. Come back when you have it.$h
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.daily_hub: Where would you like to go?$q wizard_daily wizard_go_stardew#$r wizard_go_stardew 0 wizard_go_stardew#Take me to Pelican Town#$r wizard_go_overworld 0 wizard_go_overworld#I want to go back#$r wizard_stay 0 wizard_stay#Nothing, just visiting
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.daily_locked: The Eye of Ender... have you found it? Without it, the portal cannot be stabilized.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.daily_unlocked: Hello, farmer. If you need anything, just ask.$h
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.default: There are many mysteries around us. You must be patient if you wish to discover them.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_cage: You've seen one before, haven't you?#$b#They call themselves the 'Junimos'...#$b#Mysterious spirits, these ones... For some reason, they refuse to speak with me.$q wizard_e112_cage_end wizard_e112_dismiss#$r wizard_e112_dismiss 0 wizard_e112_dismiss#Go on...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_cauldron: Come here!$h#$b#My cauldron is bubbling with ingredients from the forest.$h#$b#Baby fern, moss grub, caramel-top toadstool... Can you smell it?$h#$b#Here. Drink up. Let the essence of the forest permeate your body.$h$q wizard_e112_drink_q wizard_e112_drink#$r wizard_e112_drink 0 wizard_e112_drink#Drink the potion
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_complete: You've gained the power of forest magic! Now you can decipher the true meaning of the Junimo scrolls.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_intro: Ah... Come in.#$b#I am Rasmodius... Seeker of the arcane truths.#$b#Mediary between physical and ethereal.#$b#Master of the seven elementals.#$b#Keeper of the sacred cha-... you get the point.#$b#And you... @. The one whose arrival I have long foreseen.#$b#Here, I'd like to show you something.$q wizard_e112_show wizard_e112_reveal#$r wizard_e112_reveal 0 wizard_e112_reveal#Alright, show me.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_note: I'm not sure why they've moved into the community center, but you have no reason to fear them.#$b#Hmmm? You found a golden scroll written in an unknown language?#$b#Most interesting...#$b#Stay here. I'm going to see for myself. I'll return shortly.$q wizard_e112_leave_q wizard_e112_wizard_leave#$r wizard_e112_wizard_leave 0 wizard_e112_wizard_leave#...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.e112_return: I found the note...#$b#The language is obscure, but I was able to decipher it:#$b#"We, the Junimo, are happy to aid you. In return, we ask for gifts of the valley. If you are one with the forest then you will see the true nature of this scroll."#$b#Hmm... 'One with the forest'... What do they mean?#$b#...*sniff*...*sniff*...#$b#Ah-hah!$h$q wizard_e112_aha wizard_e112_cauldron#$r wizard_e112_cauldron 0 wizard_e112_cauldron#What is it?
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.fri: I believe the townsfolk are afraid of me.#$e#It is unfortunate, but I suppose it is human to be afraid of the unknown.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.fri6: I was married, long ago. After my wife and I split, she began flying around the countryside, cursing everything she saw.#$e#It's not a very mature way to express one's anger.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.galaxy_granted: It is done.$h#$b#Behold — the Galaxy Sword! Its prismatic energy has been bound to the blade.#$b#You will find no weapon more powerful in all the valley.#$b#I've also informed Marlon at the Adventurer's Guild. If you ever need similar weapons, he can now provide them.$h
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.galaxy_offer: Wait... that crystal in your hand...$h#$b#That is a Prismatic Shard! I can feel its immense power radiating outward.#$b#I have studied these crystals for decades. With the right incantation, I can channel its energy into a weapon of unparalleled strength...$h#$b#If you give me this shard, I will forge for you a Galaxy Sword — the most powerful blade in existence.$q wizard_galaxy wizard_galaxy_confirm#$r wizard_galaxy_confirm 0 wizard_galaxy_confirm#Yes, please forge the Galaxy Sword!#$r wizard_galaxy_decline 0 wizard_galaxy_decline#Not right now.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.gift_taste.disli: This?... I suppose I'll cast it into the flames and see what happens.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.gift_taste.hated: Ughh... These are utterly mundane. Please refrain from bothering me with this in the future.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.gift_taste.liked: Many thanks. This item has some very interesting properties.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.gift_taste.loved: Ahh, this is imbued with potent arcane energies. It's very useful for my studies. Thank you!
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.gift_taste.neutr: Thank you. This will prove useful, I think.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.greenrain: Though the unusual rains may be alarming, there is nothing to fear on this day.#$e#In fact, it is a day of great joy for many living things.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.greenrain_2: Nature is a powerful force, not to be trifled with.#$e#Excuse me, but there are special matters I can only attend to on this day.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.has_eye: Ah, you brought an Eye of Ender! Let me see...$h#Yes, the void energy is quite potent. The portal should stabilize soon.#From this point on, you may travel freely between the two worlds.$h#Now let me send you to your farm. To come back, just use the magic circle in my tower.$q wizard_first_tp wizard_first_teleport#$r wizard_first_teleport 0 wizard_first_teleport#Alright!
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.intro_1: Hmm... there's a peculiar aura about you. Let me see... You're not originally from this world.$s#$b#Your grandfather — yes, I knew him. He once crossed dimensions to reach Pelican Town, where he owned a farm.$h#$b#Before he left, he passed the inheritance of that farm to his descendants. And you... you are that heir.#$b#I am Rasmodius, a wizard. I travel between dimensions, studying the mysteries of nature and magic.#$b#I can open a portal to Pelican Town, but dimensional travel requires a special catalyst...$q wizard_intro_ask wizard_accepted#Bring me an Eye of Ender. The void energy within it is exactly what I need to stabilize the dimensional rift. Will you help?#$r wizard_accepted 0 wizard_accepted#Sure, I'll find one!#$r wizard_decline 0 null#Let me think about it
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.introduction: Ah, yes. I have predicted your arrival a long time ago, young @.#$e#However, your fate is ultimately in your own hands.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.junimo_potion: Ah... you're the one who found the Junimo scrolls in the Community Center.$s#$b#Those little creatures... Junimos... are forest spirits. They write in an ancient magical language.#$b#Fortunately, I happen to have something that can help you.$h#$b#Drink this Forest Magic potion. It will attune your mind to the forces of nature.#$b#[You drink the potion with green bubbles... For a moment, the whole world seems clearer.]#$b#Good... Now you should be able to read their writing. Go back to the Community Center and take a look.$h
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.married: Marriage... hmm? I pray that you have better luck than I did...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.mon: Ah, yes. I have seen many things about your future, young @.#$e#If I were to tell you, there could be grave consequences.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.mon4: Outside the domain of human civilization is where nature truly reveals its secrets.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.mon8: There are areas of the world, yet unsullied by the constraints of modern thinking, where magic is still very much alive...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.sat: Beware, you are standing above a potent magical field.#$e#I built my hut right here on purpose, you know.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.sat2: Have you made any headway with the forest spirits?
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.sat6: While the scientific practice may accurately describe the material of our world, it will never explain the deepest mysteries...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.sun: I sometimes observe the local villagers in secret.#$e#I am hoping to find an apprentice. Some day I will leave this mortal plane, but my arcane pursuits must continue.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.thu: There are many mysteries around us. You must be patient if you wish to discover them.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.thu10: You mustn't tell anyone... but I have reason to believe that one of the locals is actually my daughter...#$e#I could be mistaken... It's rare, but it does happen.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.tue: If you have nothing important to tell me, leave me be. I have much work to do.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.tue10: If reality is constructed by the mind, then if one were to master the power of mind, they could control reality...
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.tue4: I trust you enough to allow you in my basement. Treat what you find there with respect.
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.tue8: Greetings, @. I trust you haven't been dabbling in the dark arts?
stardewcraft.npc.wizard.wed: It takes years of study to understand the language of the elementals.#$e#To actually speak their language requires a lifetime of devoted effort.#$e#Now, if you'll excuse me...
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.gift_taste.hated: Sorry, but I really don't like this...
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.gift_taste.loved: How did you know I love these? You're the sweetest!
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.default: Hello hello, sweetie!$h What can I help you with?
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.mon: Hello hello, sweetie!$h What can I help you with?
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.tue: What did I used to do? I actually worked in the same hair salon as Emily's mom.$h#$b#We were stylists back then. Emily and I used to play together!
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.wed: I'm always meeting new people here at the Oasis. I sure love having visitors!$h
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.thu: I brought a bunch of decorations and things from the city to make this place feel homey.$h#$e#What do you think? Pretty nice, eh?
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.fri: You know, the desert isn't so bad once you get used to it.$h#$b#It's quiet and peaceful out here... I like it.
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.sat: Hello sweetie! How's it going? Find anything good in the desert?$h
stardewcraft.npc.sandy.sun: Have you tried my Coconut? The ones here are the freshest you'll ever taste!$h
stardewcraft.passout.reason.mine: You were knocked out in the mines.
stardewcraft.portal.quarry.blocked: A mysterious force blocks your way...
stardewcraft.portal.sewer.locked: It's locked. You need the Rusty Key.
event.forest_sewer_unlock.vincent.locked: ...$s#$b#Why is it locked? I wanna explore the sewers!$s
event.forest_sewer_unlock.jas.gunther_ke: I think Gunther has the key.
event.forest_sewer_unlock.vincent.gunthe: Professor Gunther? The man who runs the museum? Why do you think he has it?$u
event.forest_sewer_unlock.jas.rusty_key: I saw a big rusty old key fall out of his pocket one time.#$b#A creepy sewer door like this has just got to be a match for a big rusty old key.$4
event.forest_sewer_unlock.jas.moving: There's something moving around in there!$u
stardewcraft.portal.cc.joja_warehouse: The old Community Center has become a Joja Warehouse. It's locked.
stardewcraft.profession.acrobat.desc: Cooldown on special moves cut in half.
stardewcraft.profession.artisan.desc: Artisan goods (wine, cheese, oil, etc.) worth 40%% more.
stardewcraft.profession.botanist.desc: Foraged items are always highest quality.
stardewcraft.profession.coopmaster.desc: Befriend coop animals quicker. Incubation time cut in half.
stardewcraft.profession.gatherer.desc: Chance for double harvest of foraged items.
stardewcraft.profession.geologist.desc: Chance for gems to appear in pairs.
stardewcraft.profession.lumberjack.desc: All trees have a chance to drop hardwood.
stardewcraft.profession.luremaster.desc: Crab pots no longer require bait.
stardewcraft.profession.mariner.desc: Crab pots no longer produce junk items.
stardewcraft.profession.shepherd.desc: Befriend barn animals quicker. Sheep produce wool faster.
stardewcraft.profession.trapper.desc: Resources required to craft crab pots reduced.

stardewcraft.ring.phoenix_ring.desc: Once per day: revive on death
stardewcraft.ring.savage_ring.desc: Gain speed buff on monster kill
stardewcraft.ring.warrior_ring.desc: 10%% chance of attack buff on monster kill

stardewcraft.robin.blueprint.coop.desc: Houses 4 coop-dwelling animals. Purchase this to receive a Coop Manager and start construction on your farm.
stardewcraft.robin.blueprint.barn.name: Barn
stardewcraft.robin.blueprint.barn.desc: Houses 4 barn-dwelling animals. Purchase this to receive a Barn Manager and start construction on your farm.

stardewcraft.robin.blueprint.silo.desc: Stores hay. Purchase this to receive a Silo Manager and start construction on your farm.
stardewcraft.robin.blueprint.fish_pond.d: Raise fish and harvest their produce. Fish multiply over time.

stardewcraft.shipping.title: Shipping Summary
stardewcraft.shop.adventureshop.dialogue: Good weapons can save your life down in the mines.
stardewcraft.shop.bookseller.trade_dialo: Bring me odd things, and I'll find you stranger books.
stardewcraft.shop.dwarf.dialogue: Welcome! Take a look at my wares.
stardewcraft.shop.eggfestival.dialogue: Happy Egg Festival! Take a look at these seasonal decorations.
stardewcraft.shop.flowerdance.dialogue: Spring flowers are in bloom! Take a look before the dance starts.
stardewcraft.shop.moonlight_jellies.dial: Good evening! I brought a few lights for the Moonlight Jellies.
stardewcraft.shop.saloon.dialogue: What can I get for ya?
stardewcraft.shop.shadowshop.dialogue: Please, don't tell anyone about me.

stardewcraft.sleep.confirm.title: Ready to sleep for the night?
stardewcraft.tooltip.animal.name: Animal: %s
stardewcraft.tooltip.museum.gunther: Gunther can tell you more if you donate it to the museum.
stardewcraft.tooltip.coffee_maker.ready: Fresh coffee ready. Right-click to collect.
stardewcraft.tooltip.coffee_maker.waitin: Brews a fresh cup tomorrow morning.
stardewcraft.tooltip.tree_cannot_mature_: This spot cannot grow into a tree
stardewcraft.treasure.close_hint: Click or press ESC to take items

stardewcraft.treasure.title: Chest
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.already_known: You already know how to cook %s.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.1: Stir Fry! It's a perfect way to get some healthy greens on your plate.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.10: Trout Soup! There's something about fresh-caught trout that just gets me buzzing.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.11: Glazed Yams! What better way to enjoy these delightful tubers than by slathering them in a sweet, sticky glaze?
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.12: Artichoke Dip! This is a delightful way to get more artichokes into your body.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.13: Plum Pudding! Little Jack Horner is champing at the bit for this ooey-gooey delight.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.14: Chocolate Cake! What better way to spend these cold winter nights?
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.15: Pumpkin Pie! The season just isn't complete without that wonderful flavor.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.16: Cranberry Candy! Here's a fun one to help you celebrate the new year.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.17: Pizza! There's a reason pizza is a timeless culinary classic.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.18: Hashbrowns! This one's simple, but that's a good thing!
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.19: Complete Breakfast! This meal will really fill you up.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.2: Coleslaw! A great coleslaw can be so much more.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.20: Lucky Lunch! An old legend has it that this meal is irresistible to spirits of luck and fortune.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.21: Carp Surprise! Ever have a bunch of carp laying around and no idea what to do with them?
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.22: Maple Bars! You can really taste the forest in these bars.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.23: Pink Cake! You'll never guess the secret ingredient... melon!
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.24: Roasted Hazelnuts! That rich, nutty smell is irresistible.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.25: Fruit Salad! Here's a healthy and delicious treat to brighten up your day.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.26: Blackberry Cobbler! This one always reminds me of Stardew Valley.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.27: Crab Cakes! Crab meat is very flimsy on its own, but these cakes are my favorite way to eat crab!
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.28: Fiddlehead Risotto! It's not very easy to make a good one. But with my help, you'll have the best chance.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.29: Poppyseed Muffin! They add a nice flavor and a great texture to bready desserts.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.3: Radish Salad! There's nothing like a fresh, peppery radish.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.30: Lobster Bisque! You could serve this one to the governor himself.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.31: Bruschetta! It's a wonderfully simple appetizer.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.32: Shrimp Cocktail! Here's another good appetizer for you and your dinner guests.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.4: Omelet! A perfect omelet is a thing of beauty.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.5: Baked Fish! Just make sure the fish is fresh, preferably caught with your own rod!
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.6: Pancakes! There's something comforting about a simple pancake.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.7: Maki Roll! The delicate flavor of the ocean, sealed within a pillowy cloud of rice.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.8: Bread! Breadmaking can be a very complex form of art, but I'll make it simple for you.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.desc.9: Tortillas! Once you've tried my fresh, rustic corn tortillas you'll never go back...
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.not_ready: Just kidding... I'm not ready. I don't have anything for you today.
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.null_error: Um... that's odd. My information sheet just says 'null'. This is embarrassing...
stardewcraft.tv.cooking.opening: Greetings! It is I, the queen of sauce... here to teach you a new mouth-watering recipe from my secret cookbook. This week's dish...
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.bad_1: The spirits are somewhat annoyed today. Luck will not be on your side.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.bad_2: The spirits are very displeased today. They will do their best to make your life difficult.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.best: The spirits are very happy today! They will do their best to shower everyone with good fortune.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.good_1: The spirits are in good humor today. I think you'll have a little extra luck.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.good_2: The spirits are joyous! Someone gave them a nice offering today, and they are very pleased.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.neutral_1: The spirits are somewhat mildly perturbed today. Luck will not be on your side.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.neutral_2: The spirits feel neutral today. The day is in your hands.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.neutral_3: This is rare. The spirits feel absolutely neutral today.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.opening_0: Ah... I sense that a new viewer has joined us. A young man from... Stardew Valley? Welcome, welcome!
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.opening_1: Ah... yes, I can hear the spirits whispering something to me...
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.opening_2: Welcome back to 'Welwick's Oracle'... If you seek hidden knowledge of the future, well you've come to the right place.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.opening_3: Hoo.. I see a glimmer within my scrying orb... A shard of knowledge from the future!
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.opening_4: Welcome to Welwick's Oracle... the ONLY show where the voice of the spirits is channeled directly... to YOU.
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.worst: The spirits are furious. Apparently someone tried to give them a worthless offering... Hmm. It's unwise to play jokes on the spirits!
stardewcraft.tv.fortune.zero: This is rare. The spirits feel absolutely nothing today.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.1: This one's for all you greenhorns out there: chop wood and search for wild forage to earn some cash while waiting on your first harvest!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.102: If you really want to make someone happy, give them their favorite gift on their birthday!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.106: Ever see three little brown stems poking up out of the ground? Dig on that spot and you'll always find something.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.109: Ever had the urge to dig around in your neighbor's trash? Don't do it when anyone's around.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.11: Woes from crows? Sounds like you need a scarecrow! One more thing... need a bigger backpack? Check your local general store.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.113: A new year has arrived. Keep your eyes peeled for any new kinds of seeds.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.116: Fish Focus: Eel. Eels can be caught from the ocean in spring and fall, during rainy evenings.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.120: Got a kitchen? Cooking is a great way to enhance your abilities.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.123: Item Spotlight: Crab Pot. Place it in water and load with bait. Come back the next day to see what you caught.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.127: It's salmonberry season! Harvesting them is a great way to earn some extra cash.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.130: Let's talk honey. If you've got flowers blooming near your beehouse, your bees can produce flavored honey.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.134: Don't forget your weapon's special attack! Swords block, clubs pound the ground, daggers do a triple-strike!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.137: The Adventurer's Guild has a rewards program for slaying monsters in the local caves.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.141: I've heard that some folks stand near moving trains to gather any debris that falls off.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.144: Animal Spotlight: Pig. Pigs are trained to sniff out valuable truffles.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.148: A reminder of the fish you can only find in summer: Dorado, Rainbow Trout, Pufferfish, and Octopus.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.15: It's salmonberry season! Harvesting them is a great way to earn some extra cash.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.151: Fish Focus: Super Cucumber. Found in the ocean during summer and fall evenings.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.155: Stop worrying about your horse! They'll make their way back home.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.158: Here's an idea... start a wild tree orchard! Put tappers on those trees.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.162: Item Spotlight: Keg. You can make wine out of any fruit. You can also make juice out of veggies.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.165: Do you have a journal? Don't forget to check it from time to time.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.169: If you managed to get a 'rare seed', now's the time to plant it.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.172: Some farmers have reported strange things happening when large fields of cauliflower, melon, or pumpkin reach maturity.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.176: It's blackberry season! Bushes across the countryside are overflowing with ripe fruit.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.179: Looking to get married? You're going to need a Mermaid's Pendant.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.18: Ah, refreshing rain... a Farmer's best friend! When it rains, you don't have to water your crops.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.183: Item Spotlight: Recycling Machine. Turn trash items into something useful.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.186: Fish Focus: Albacore. Found in the ocean in fall or winter, early morning or at night.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.190: Fish Focus: Woodskip, sandfish, and scorpion carp.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.193: It's just a couple days until Spirit's Eve! Search for the golden pumpkin in the haunted maze.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.197: You're going to need a nursery in your house before you can have kids.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.200: Item Spotlight: Crystalarium. This machine can create infinite copies of any gemstone.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.204: If you have adult barn animals and space left... there's always a chance one could give birth.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.207: Fish Focus: Catfish. This rare fish comes out when it rains. Don't bother fishing for them in summer!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.211: Item Spotlight: Worm Bin. Need an endless supply of bait? Build yourself a worm bin.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.214: Don't be surprised when spring rolls around and your farm needs some tidying up!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.218: If you've got a gold pan, keep an eye out for something sparkly in the water.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.22: Get your hands on a fishin' pole and sell your catch! Fishing is a great way to make a little extra cash.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.221: This is the last new episode of Livin' Off The Land before my retirement. Take care!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.25: Fruit trees. They take an entire season to grow, so plan ahead!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.29: Summer's here, along with a whole slew of new crops to plant!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.32: Here's a rundown of the fish you can only find in summer.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.36: Let's talk corn. It's an unusual crop because it lasts for two seasons!
stardewcraft.tv.tip.39: An unusual amount of shells and corals are expected to wash up on beaches.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.4: Check for spring onion southwest of town, where the river meets the ocean.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.43: Got a spa in your town? Relax and hold still in the steaming hot water to replenish your energy.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.46: Summer's known for its lightning storms. If you know how to craft a lightning rod, you can harvest the electricity.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.50: Most towns have a seasonal calendar in front of the general store. Check it now and then.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.53: Fall's almost here! Make sure you're saving some money to buy new seeds.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.57: Let's talk sunflowers. When you harvest them you'll get seeds as well.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.60: A grange display consists of 9 items that best showcase your talents.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.64: It's blackberry season! Bushes across the countryside are overflowing with ripe fruit.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.67: Fish Focus: Salmon. Salmon return to their spawning ground in fall.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.71: Got any tappers? Maple trees yield maple syrup, oak trees provide resin, and pine trees produce pine tar.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.74: Winter's almost here. Make sure you're prepared to feed your animals hay.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.78: Fish Focus: Walleye. Found on rainy evenings during the fall and winter.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.8: Let's talk fences. Fences are useful for keeping weeds at bay and protecting your crops.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.81: Winter's coming soon... and that means your farming operations will be coming to a halt.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.85: Winter... A time when all the world goes quiet. Now's a great time to do some mining, fishing and gathering.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.88: Wondering how to get 'Refined Quartz'? Just put a regular old quartz in the furnace.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.92: Find any tree seeds while chopping wood? You can plant those in the ground.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.95: There's a couple fish you can only find in winter... Squid and Lingcod.
stardewcraft.tv.tip.99: Let's talk geodes. Geodes are hollow stones that often contain valuable minerals.
stardewcraft.tv.tips.opening: Welcome to "Livin' Off The Land". We're back again with another tip for y'all. Now listen up:
stardewcraft.tv.weather.opening: Welcome to KOZU 5... your number one source for weather, news, and entertainment. And now, the weather forecast for tomorrow...
stardewcraft.tv.weather.rain: It's going to rain all day tomorrow.
stardewcraft.tv.weather.snow_1: Bundle up, folks. It's going to snow tomorrow!
stardewcraft.tv.weather.snow_2: Expect a few inches of snow tomorrow.
stardewcraft.tv.weather.storm: Looks like a storm is approaching. Thunder and lightning is expected.
stardewcraft.tv.weather.sun_1: It's going to be a beautiful, sunny day tomorrow!
stardewcraft.tv.weather.sun_2: It's going to be clear and sunny all day.
stardewcraft.tv.weather.wind_fall: It's going to be cloudy, with gusts of wind throughout the day.
stardewcraft.tv.weather.wind_spring: Partially cloudy with a light breeze. Expect lots of pollen!
stardewcraft.book.message.skill: You've learned a few things about %s.

stardewcraft.weapon.pirate_sword.lore: Fortune favors the bold... and the outlaws.
stardewcraft.weapon.rusty_sword.lore: "A rusty old sword, but in the darkness of the mines, it's still your most reliable companion."

event.wizard_intro.line1: Hmm... there's a peculiar aura about you. Let me see... You're not originally from this world.$s#$b#Your grandfather — yes, I knew him. He once crossed dimensions to reach Pelican Town, where he owned a farm.$h#$b#Before he left, he passed the inheritance of that farm to his descendants. And you... you are that heir.
event.wizard_intro.line2: I am Rasmodius, a wizard. I travel between dimensions, studying the mysteries of nature and magic.#$b#I can open a portal to Pelican Town, but dimensional travel requires a special catalyst...
event.wizard_intro.line3: Bring me an Eye of Ender. The void energy within can stabilize the dimensional rift.$h
event.wizard_e112.intro: Ah... Come in.#$b#I am Rasmodius... Seeker of the arcane truths.#$b#Mediary between physical and ethereal.#$b#Master of the seven elementals.#$b#Keeper of the sacred cha-... you get the point.#$b#And you... @. The one whose arrival I have long foreseen.#$b#Here, I'd like to show you something.
event.wizard_e112.cage: You've seen one before, haven't you?#$b#They call themselves the 'Junimos'...#$b#Mysterious spirits, these ones... For some reason, they refuse to speak with me.
event.wizard_e112.note: I'm not sure why they've moved into the community center, but you have no reason to fear them.#$b#Hmmm? You found a golden scroll written in an unknown language?#$b#Most interesting...#$b#Stay here. I'm going to see for myself. I'll return shortly.
event.wizard_e112.return_text: I found the note...#$b#The language is obscure, but I was able to decipher it:#$b#"We, the Junimo, are happy to aid you. In return, we ask for gifts of the valley. If you are one with the forest then you will see the true nature of this scroll."#$b#Hmm... 'One with the forest'... What do they mean?#$b#...*sniff*...*sniff*...#$b#Ah-hah!$h
event.wizard_e112.cauldron: Come here!$h#$b#My cauldron is bubbling with ingredients from the forest.$h#$b#Baby fern, moss grub, caramel-top toadstool... Can you smell it?$h#$b#Here. Drink up. Let the essence of the forest permeate your body.$h
event.wizard_e112.complete: You've gained the power of forest magic! Now you can decipher the true meaning of the Junimo scrolls.
event.willy_fishing_rod.greet: Ahoy there!$h#$b#You must be the new farmer. I'm Willy, the fisherman of Pelican Town.#$b#The ocean is a mighty thing... full of life, full of mystery.$h
event.willy_fishing_rod.sea_story: I've spent half my life on this here dock, and the sea still surprises me...$s#$b#It's been a while since I've seen a new face around here.#$b#Say... you know what? I've got something for you.
event.willy_fishing_rod.give_rod: This is my old bamboo pole...$h It's been collecting dust in my shop for years.#$b#Here, take it. It's yours now.$h#$b#I want you to have it. Consider it a 'Welcome to Stardew Valley' present!$h
event.willy_fishing_rod.fish_advice: You can fish just about anywhere there's water.#$b#Rivers, lakes, the ocean... Each spot's got its own catch.#$b#Just cast your line and be patient... You'll get the hang of it.
event.willy_fishing_rod.shop_invite: If you ever need bait or tackle, come visit my shop.$h#$b#It's the little shack right next to us, on the beach.#$b#Good luck out there, friend!$h
event.marlon_mine_intro.old_mine: ...I was just peering down into this old mine shaft.#$b#It's been abandoned for decades.
event.marlon_mine_intro.danger: Still, there's probably good ore down there.#$b#But a dark place, undisturbed for so long... I'm afraid ore isn't the only thing you'll find...
event.marlon_mine_intro.take_this: Here, take this. You might need it.
event.marlon_mine_intro.guild: Name's Marlon, by the way. I run the adventurer's guild right outside.#$b#I'll keep my eye on you. Prove yourself and I might think about making you a member.
event.lewis_cc_tour.this_is_cc: This is the Pelican Town Community Center... or what's left of it, anyway.$s
event.lewis_cc_tour.pride_and_joy: It used to be the pride and joy of the town... always bustling with activity.
event.lewis_cc_tour.shameful: Now... just look at it. It's shameful.$s#$b#These days, the young folk would rather sit in front of the TV than engage with the community.
event.lewis_cc_tour.old_fool: But listen to me, I sound like an old fool.$s
event.lewis_cc_tour.joja: Joja Corporation has been hounding me to sell them the land so they can turn it into a warehouse... #$b#Pelican Town could use the money, but there's something stopping me from selling it... I guess old timers like me get attached to relics of the past... Ah well.$s#$b#If anyone else buys a Joja Co. Membership I'm just gonna go ahead and sell it.
event.lewis_cc_tour.whats_this: Hmm? What's this?...#$b#I guess Vincent and Jas must've been playing in here.
event.lewis_cc_tour.dilapidated: This place is even more dilapidated than I remember.
event.lewis_cc_tour.are_you_ill: What's the matter? Are you ill?$s
event.lewis_cc_tour.rats: You saw something? Hmm... I wouldn't be surprised if this place was full of rats.$h
event.lewis_cc_tour.head_home: Look, I think I'm going to head home. I need some lunch.
event.lewis_cc_tour.unlocked: Hey. I'll keep this place unlocked from now on... maybe you can help catch that rat if you have some extra time.
event.lewis_cc_tour.come_back: I'll have to come back and explore this building further.
Ah, hello there, @. You showed up at the perfect time.$h
It's our new 'Special Orders' board.#$b#Robin and I built it from scratch.$h
Um... Lewis? All you did was hold the nails.
You see... with %farm Farm back in business, the local economy has really been picking up.#$b#As a result, some of the local townsfolk have been asking me for a way to source local ingredients for their businesses or personal projects.
So, Robin and I came up with the idea of a new 'Special Orders' board, where people can post bigger jobs than would make sense for the old billboard outside Pierre's.
Yeah... for example, I plan on requesting some hardwood for a bed I want to make.$h#$b#I won't put you on the spot, but if you want to help me out you can just accept the job from this board.#$b#Who knows, maybe if the bed turns out well I'll start selling them in my shop!$h
I thought so! I wouldn't expect anything less from you, @.
So, can we say that you're... --On Board--?$4
Well, I'm sure you're busy, so we won't keep you away from your work any longer.#$b#As always, I appreciate your willingness to contribute!$h#$b#Take care, @.
Huh... I wouldn't expect such a tepid response from you, @. I'm disappointed.$s
It's fine, Lewis... there's no pressure to help out.$5#$b#Maybe I can get Sebastian to help. He could use some work away from the computer.
Hmmph... Well, we're done here, Robin.$u#$b#...Wouldn't want to waste any more of @'s precious 'me' time.$u
event.special_order.willy.love_it: Hehe... they love it... Look at 'em go!$h
event.special_order.willy.thinking: I was just thinkin' of you, lad.^I was just thinkin' of you, miss.#$b#This bug meat you found is perfect!#$b#Hehe... When I said 'fresh', I didn't expect it to still be wrigglin'!#$b#But I'm not complaining! The fish love it... Hehehe...$h
event.special_order.willy.secret: As a way of saying 'thanks', I wanted to teach you an old fisherman's secret... My ol' Pappy taught me this on a fishing trip many years ago.
event.special_order.willy.bobber: Using that bobber will attract higher quality fish.#$b#That means more money in yer pocket, ${lad^lass}$. Hehe...$h
event.special_order.pam.delivery: Heheh... I see the delivery came in.$h
event.special_order.pam.reaction: I said potato, not fermented baboon kidney!$u
event.special_order.pierre.gus_offer: Gus, I have just the thing for you...
event.special_order.pierre.quality_pitch: It's a bundle of locally sourced, organic, heirloom veggies...#$b#These are hand picked and sorted, to ensure only the very finest in quality and taste.#$b#This is a once-in-a-lifetime kind of offer!
event.special_order.pierre.price_questio: That sounds pretty good! I could use some quality veggies for the saloon. How much does it cost?
event.special_order.pierre.gus_heard: What was that?#$b#Hahaha... for a moment there, I thought I heard, '25,000g'.$h
event.special_order.pierre.bargain: Heh... that's right. It really is a bargain, isn't it?
event.special_order.pierre.gus_refuses: Pierre, are you crazy? There's no way I could afford that. I'd have to sell the saloon!$3
event.special_order.pierre.jodi_outrage: I overheard the price... that's outrageous! You should be ashamed.$3
event.special_order.pierre.disaster: It's a disaster, @... $s#$b#I thought this was a surefire business strategy.$s#$b#But it turns out, no one is willing to buy vegetables at a 10x price markup, even if I put the little 'organic' sticker on them.$s
event.special_order.pierre.choice.risk: You win some, you lose some
event.special_order.pierre.choice.offend: I'm offended they didn't want my veggies
event.special_order.pierre.answer_risk: You're right, you can't run a business without taking some risk.
event.special_order.pierre.answer_greedy: Hey, I'm not forcing anyone to buy it! If they don't like the price, they can move on.$3
...But, I guess you have a point. If I make all my customers angry, then pretty soon I won't have any customers at all...$s
event.special_order.pierre.answer_offend: Your veggies look great, @. It's Pierre's price that turned us away.
event.special_order.pierre.buy_back: By the way, @... you look like you could really use a veggie dinner tonight.#$b#What do you say, wanna buy these back for the low, low price of 2,501g?
event.special_order.robin.voila: Voila! My newest creation.$h#$b#It's a deluxe four poster bed, crafted from the finest local hardwood.
event.special_order.robin.posts_question: Um... Robin? What's the point of the four posts? It seems like an inefficient use of materials.$s
event.special_order.robin.beauty: It's called 'beauty', bud... you know, that thing that most people find enjoyable?$6
event.special_order.robin.receptacle: Hmm, I see your point.. But we can't let that outweigh the utility and efficiency of the sleep receptacle.
event.special_order.robin.obtuse: You know, sometimes it feels like you're being deliberately obtuse, just to irritate me. Is that what you're doing?$3
event.special_order.robin.check_this_out: Check this out... It's the bed I was able to make thanks to all the wood you gathered.
event.special_order.robin.doghouse: *ahem*... Well... If anyone needs me, I'll be in the doghouse...$5
event.special_order.robin.prototype: Now that I have a prototype, I can start selling them in the shop.
event.special_order.robin.half_dozen: Hey... these might look good in your place, @! What do you say... can we pencil you in for a half dozen?
event.special_order.emily.everyone_stone: Great... everyone has their stone.#$b#Now, close your eyes, and take slow, deep breaths. Focus on your lungs.
event.special_order.emily.visualize: Visualize the pure energy flowing into your body with every breath.#$b#And when you exhale, feel all the tension and negative energy flowing out, leaving you more and more relaxed with every breath.
event.special_order.emily.frequency: Now, open your heart to the vibrational frequency of your stone. Do you feel anything?
event.special_order.emily.message: Looks like the gemstones were put to good use...
event.special_order.gus.folks: Well, folks... once again, we've all gathered for a very special occasion.
event.special_order.gus.rare_visit: ...A rare visit from a very dear friend...
event.special_order.gus.omelet: ...My world-famous giant omelet!$h#$b#Savory bell pepper, juicy tomato, rich mushroom, and tangy cheese... all enveloped in a blanket of rich, fluffy egg. Dig in, folks!
event.special_order.gus.chewy: The mushrooms are a little more chewy than last year...
event.special_order.gus.pam_house: It's great, Gus. And it tastes better because it's on the house!$h
event.special_order.gus.robin_eggs: These eggs are so rich and yellow... Marnie, are these from you?
event.special_order.gus.thank_farmer: No... You can thank @ over at %farm farm!
event.special_order.linus.clean_me: ...And the same goes for me! Hehehe.$5
event.special_order.george.meaning: @? What's the meaning of all this...#$b#Is this some kind of prank?
event.special_order.george.choice.apprec: We wanted to show our appreciation
event.special_order.george.favorite: My favorite... Just like Mama used to make, so many years ago...
event.special_order.george.not_forgotten: Well... That... Hmmph.#$b#I guess maybe I'm not as forgotten and ignored as I thought...$s
event.special_order.george.thanks: Thanks, son.$h^Thanks, hun.$h#$b#You made an old man's day.$h
event.special_order.george.fool_me: Hah! She thought she could fool me!
event.special_order.george.inconvenience: She thought she could fool me... into thinking I'm anything more than an inconvenience.$s
event.special_order.george.back_day: Hahah... You know, I was a bit of a prankster back in the day, too.$h
event.special_order.george.laugh: Well, at least you gave me a laugh.$h
event.special_order.george.open_them: What, you think I'm going to open them?
event.special_order.george.exploding_pre: Hah! Not a chance. You think I'd fall for the old 'exploding present' gag?
event.special_order.george.trash: These are going straight into the trash!
event.clint_furnace.greeting: Uh... Hi there. Good morning.#$b#I noticed that you've been breaking some rocks open and finding ore. That's good!
event.clint_furnace.need_furnace: If you want to get the most out of the ores you find, you'll need a furnace.
event.clint_furnace.blueprints: Just so happens I had an extra set of blueprints lying around. Here, I want you to have them.
event.moonlight_jellies.message.end: The glow of summer has faded now... and the moonlight jellies carry on toward the great unknown.
event.clint_furnace.explanation: The furnace allows you to smelt metal bars. The bars can be used for crafting, construction, and tool upgrades.
event.clint_furnace.goodbye: When you've smelted a few copper bars, consider having me upgrade one of your tools. It can make your work a lot easier.#$b#Well, okay. I'm heading home. Take it easy.
event.leah_sculpture.gift: I brought you something I made for you. It's a sculpture I've been working on.
event.leah_sculpture.goodbye: It's called 'How I Feel About @'. I hope you like it.
event.gus_mini_jukebox.friendship: I was thinking about how much you've become part of this town. It's good having you around.
event.gus_mini_jukebox.gift: I found an old mini-jukebox in the back room of the Saloon, and I want you to have it.
event.gus_mini_jukebox.blueprints: It's a simple old project of mine. I brought the blueprints too, in case you want to make more.
event.gus_mini_jukebox.goodbye: Well, I'd better get back to the Saloon. Have a good one!
event.gunther_rusty_key.greeting: Oh, good morning, @!#$b#I hope it isn't too early...$s
event.gunther_rusty_key.award: I wanted to thank you in person for all the wonderful artifacts and minerals you've discovered. You've done so much for one person!$h#$b#In fact, I just received a letter from the regional secretary of artifacts. The museum is being honored for its contribution to the field.
event.gunther_rusty_key.return_to_work: And it's all thanks to you!$h#$b#Well, I should let you get back to your work...
event.gunther_rusty_key.forgot: Oh! I almost forgot.#$b#I have a gift for you... It's an old key that's been sealed in the museum vault for at least 100 years. It's a little rusty, but still beautiful.$h
event.gunther_rusty_key.received: You got the 'Rusty Key'! It's been added to your wallet.
event.pierre_seed_notice.greeting: Hello there, @. Your first year in the valley is almost over, huh?
event.pierre_seed_notice.new_seeds: I wanted to let you know I'll be selling new seed varieties next year. Stop by my shop when the new seasons come around.
event.pierre_seed_notice.competitor: And remember, Pierre's seeds are the highest quality seeds you'll find anywhere. That's a promise.
event.demetrius_cave.greeting: Hi @! I have some good news for you.
event.demetrius_cave.breakthrough: A few days ago I made a breakthrough in my research on the local environment.
event.demetrius_cave.empty_cave: I'll spare you the technical details and get to the point... You know that empty cave you have, over in the cliffs?
event.demetrius_cave.proposal: Well, I have a way to turn it into something useful... for both of us.
event.demetrius_cave.offer_choice: I'd like to set up the cave to attract some local species. I can either set it up to attract mushrooms or fruit bats. The bats will sometimes leave fruit for you to collect.
event.demetrius_cave.question: Which would you prefer?
event.demetrius_cave.confirm_bats: Fruit bats it is! I'll go set it up right away.
event.demetrius_cave.confirm_mushrooms: Mushrooms it is! I'll go set it up right away.
event.demetrius_cave.goodbye: Alright! It shouldn't take any time at all.#$b#Thanks for letting me do this.
block.stardewcraft.scarecrow_9.desc:
A premium scarecrow combining all rarecrow styles.
Protection radius: 17 tiles.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ab: I beat all these games last year!$h
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.le: I learned all of Robin's techniques last year, but she's always one step ahead of me!
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ma: mumph... This is my one chance to pig out on barbecue sandwiches.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.pe: I hope we win the grange display contest!
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ha: Did you remember to bring good stuff for our grange display? I hope we win this year.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.se: Hey, @. I'm just catching up with Sam. Go ahead and have some fun.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.sa: Sebastian's the same as always. Are you having fun at the festival?
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.al: I'm just catching up with some old friends... you go on and have a good time.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ha: I'll wait here until you're ready to go home...
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.el: The smokey aroma drew me here, yet 'twas the zesty sauce that truly sealed my fate... *gurgle*$s
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ab: I already beat all the games... now what?
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ro: Woodworking is an ancient tradition that I'm very proud to be a part of.$h
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.de: Robin really works hard on her carpentry stuff... she deserves a little recognition now and then.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ma: *slurp* mmm... this barbecue sauce is amazing.$h
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.se: It's kinda hectic today... I'm just gonna hang out here for a while.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.pi: My store carries the very finest quality products in the whole valley. Please, inspect my grange display closely and see for yourself!
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ca: Pierre is very serious about his grange display. He's been setting aside the best-looking produce for weeks in preparation.#$e#Hey, best of luck to you if you enter!
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.li: These animals never judge people by their looks. The same can't be said for humans.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.al: I played the 'Strength' game too many times and now my arms feel like rubber.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ge: Hmm... smoked turkey haunch? I guess this festival isn't all bad.$h
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ev: I wish Gus would include a vegetarian option. Some zucchini skewers, maybe?
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.le: Well @, it's the big day... Our most important festival of the year, the 'Stardew Valley Fair'.#$b#If you'd like to participate by setting up a grange display, I've left an empty stand for you. Just let me know after you've set everything up so we can get to the judging.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.cl: I complain about my job sometimes, but I do take pride in my work.#$b#These are some of my finest pieces. I hope you like them.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.em: You know, I would've made a pretty good clown. I think I missed my calling.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.pe: I won the wheel of chance ten times in a row and now the man won't let me play anymore...$s
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.pa: Better hurry up, kid... Before ol' Pam here fishes every last lunker out of the tent! Hehe.$h
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ha: Have you been to the fortune teller? She set up her stand in the graveyard.#$e#I already saw her... she told me something... interesting. *giggle*$h
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.jo: He doesn't look very happy... I guess Mayor Lewis had to cut costs with a budget clown this year.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ke: I'm waiting for this clown to start doing something funny.#$e#Pretty disappointing.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.sa: Hey @. Having a good time?#$e#The slingshot tent is pretty fun, and if you get good at it you can really rack up the star tokens.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.le: I really admire Robin's carpentry skills. I use a lot of the same techniques in my own line of work.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.sh: All these animals are friendly and love to get massaged.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ma: I tried my best, but my display is pretty weak compared to Pierre's.$s#$e#Well, maybe the judges will give me bonus points for the massive cheese wheel.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.el: I'm trying to get Gus to tell me his sauce recipe, but he won't budge.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.gu: Eat as much as you like! It's all free today... compliments of Mayor Lewis.$h#$e#Oh! Make sure to dribble some of my secret sauce on there.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.dw: You say it's raining up above? *gasp*#$e#Rain... It's almost mythical to us. Some of us live our entire lives without ever experiencing it.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.wi: Welwick and I have known each other for a long time... she is a remarkable diviner, and a good friend.#$e#...#$e#That clown... I know him from somewhere.#$e#Was it the school of illusion? Or maybe the Carnival of Secrets? Hmm...
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ha: And just a few steps over there, Gus is grilling up a batch of pork ribs... Yikes.$s#$e#I've got some soul-searching to do...$11
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.sa: I heard it's raining back home. Is that why you came here?$h#$e#I kind of miss the rain, actually...$s
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ja: Ow! A hen pecked my little finger!$u
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ma: Clint's blades get sharper every year.#$e#So do his prices...
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.wi: Are you setting up a grange display, @? It's your chance to show off all the good produce from %farm!
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.le: Haha! I've never seen anything like this before...$h
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ab: Aren't these weapons cool? I might have to bring one of these home with us today.$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.le: Hey, Robin is teaching me some innovative techniques this year.#$e#I'll have to show you later...$1
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ma: I hope we win the grange display contest! You worked really hard this year.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.pe: Come here, sit for a while! There's space on the bench for the both of us.$1
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ha: It's a little funny seeing Alex stuff his face. He seems to be doing well.#$e#I hope we win the grange display contest this year!$1
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.em: Sandy traveled all the way from Calico Desert to be here today.#$b#It's not very often that I get to see her!
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.se: That lady in the graveyard predicted our future...$0#$b#Apparently, we're destined to live a happy life together.$1
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.sa: Hey, are you enjoying the festival? I'll be rooting for our grange display!$0#$e#Psst... If you're going to bet your tokens on the wheel... bet on green!$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.al: Did you eat yet? There's almost too much to go around!$0#$e#I already ate three sandwiches... Mmm... that sauce...
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ha: Hi, honey. Good luck today in the competition. I just know you're going to shine!$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.el: Victory! I achieved a score of '216' with five fish caught... a new personal best!$1#$e#Now, I must choose a fitting prize to purchase for you with these star tokens...$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.sh: I might ask you to watch the animals soon so I can grab some food.$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ab: This blade is so elegant. Maybe some day I'll have enough money to buy one!$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ro: If you want to master the wood, you have to think like a tree...$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.de: Sheep have remarkable memory capabilities... retaining familiarity with both fellow sheep and humans...$0#$e#They even form friendships, mirroring the close bonds we humans cultivate with one another!$1
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ma: There's so much to do! I don't know where to begin.$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.se: That lady told me my fortune. I don't know what to make of it...$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.li: Animals are kind of like little people... they also have feelings and emotions.$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.pi: I'm confident that I'll emerge victorious in this year's grange display competition!$1
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ca: Some of the produce in our grange display came from my little greenhouse. We've been carefully growing this stuff all year!$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.al: Every hundred rounds of the strength game I win, I eat another BBQ sandwich.$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ge: %George is on the verge of falling asleep.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ev: Hee hee... Maybe I should start a collection of clown figurines...
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.le: Greetings, @! The 'Stardew Valley Fair' is finally here and the crowd is growing by the minute.#$b#Just like last year, I've set up an empty grange display for you. Speak with me when you're ready to commence the judging.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.cl: It's heartening to see others take an interest in my work. Makes me feel like I'm doing something good in the world.#$e#I finished some of these pieces just last week. Please inspect them closely, I stand behind my work!
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.pe: *phew* After being on my feet all day, it's nice to finally take a moment to relax.$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.pa: Life don't get much better than this, kid!$1
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.em: When Sandy and I were kids, we joked about running away from it all and joining the circus.$0#$e#I don't think we would've actually gone through with it, but it's fun to imagine.$1
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ha: I'm trying to maintain a diet this fall... but I can't resist these juicy burgers!$h
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.jo: Oh no. Who's responsible for littering here?$2#$e#Every year we get some tourists that don't respect our town...$2
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ke: *chuckle* My son has a knack for accuracy. I wonder if he got it from me.$1
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ma: I'm in the market for a new weapon. I wonder if I could negotiate a trade with Clint...
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.sa: Ugh... I gambled and lost it all to the spinning wheel...$2#$e#I should've went with green.$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.le: I think Robin and I make a pretty good team, don't you think?
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.sh: The animals have been given their favorite foods, so they're happy.$h#$e#Feel free to pet them, they won't bite.
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ma: My animals had a successful year! I'm hoping the high-quality produce will impress the judges.$1#$e#How's your grange display, @? It's your moment to showcase the fruits of your labor.$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.el: Ah, don't mind the smell... I just emerged from the fishing booth with a sizable haul!$1#$e#Now, I must decide what to do with all these star tokens...$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.gu: Working four grills simultaneously is hard work! There's a large and hungry crowd to cater to today.$0#$e#I put a little dash of my zesty sauce in each patty. *wink*
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.dw: I was curious about this human gathering... $0#$e#Please don't tell anyone. I'm hoping to remain hidden here...$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.wi: If you wish to peer through the mists of tomorrow, speak to my colleague Welwick.$0#$b#She has an uncommon gift...#$e#That young man by the tree seemed intrigued by his reading, but even with my powers, I cannot probe the innermost secrets of the heart...$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ha: I'm astonished by the level of craftsmanship on display here. Some people are so talented!$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.sa: The Stardew Valley community is truly one-of-a-kind...$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.ja: Mooo! Moooooo!$1#$e#I'm trying to talk to the baby cows.$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.vi: Can I play the slingshot game again, Dad!? Please?$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.wi: I managed to catch several iridium-quality beauties, just in time for this year's fair!$1#$e#After our grange displays are judged I'll have to try my hand at the fishing game tent.$0
stardewcraft.festival.fall16.dialogue.le: I'm making friends with these birds!$1
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.ab: You'll have to tell me what's beyond, I can't go on... spiders...$s
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.le: I may have had a little too much pumpkin ale...
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.ma: I'm confused... you go on ahead and let me figure this out.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.pe: Oh... These vapors... Hmmm... You look nice tonight.$l
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.ha: I get scared easily... I think I'm just going to stay right here.$s
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.se: It would be interesting to have one of these on the farm.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.sa: Hey, I was wondering when you'd show up!$h
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.ha: Hi... I was hoping you'd find me here...$l
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.el: Mmph... I believe I've eaten a few too many slices of pumpkin pie.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.ro: Well, winter's almost here. It's a great time to stockpile wood and stone.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.de: I haven't seen Maru in hours... I hope she's alright.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.ma: I think I've already been this way... no, wait...$s#$e#I'm lost...$s
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.se: I have no idea how these skeletons are walking... creepy.#$e#It's pretty cool though.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.ca: I get scared very easily. I'll leave the haunted maze to the younger people.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.al: There's something weird over there. But how do I get to it?#$e#There's gotta be a secret passage somewhere around here.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.ge: Hmm... smoked turkey haunch? I guess this festival isn't all bad.$h
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.ev: I wish Gus would include a vegetarian option. Some zucchini skewers, maybe?
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.le: Good evening, @. Have you ventured into the haunted maze yet? It's quite spooky.#$e#That strange man who lives in the tower set it all up himself. He wouldn't let anyone near while he was working on it.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.cl: One of my iridium-infused maces would make quick work of these things.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.em: Do you like the jack-o-lanterns? I carved them myself.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.pe: The vapor from this cauldron... it's making my head spin, but I can't seem to leave...$u
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.pa: I'll come to any event with free grub! You won't see me in the haunted maze, though.
stardewcraft.festival.fall27.dialogue.jo: Vincent's upset that I won't let him go into the haunted maze... but he's just a little boy!

stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.p: Are you entering the fishing contest this year, @? My mom's pretty serious about winning.

Aren't you cold? Are you sure you don't want my jacket?
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.a: I'll be rooting for you in the fishing competition.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.h: I'm dreaming of our warm fire back home...$l

stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.a: What do you think of my snow-goon?
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.r: I'm sorry, but carving ice parapets requires my undivided attention!

stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.g: Hmmph... Wife dragged me out into the cold for this?
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.e: Did I ever tell you how George and I first met? He actually pelted me with a snowball in this very festival.#$e#He was a gentleman back then, and came over to see if I was okay.$h
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.l: Welcome to the Festival of Ice!#$e#The highlight of today's festival is the ice fishing competition. We set up this 'frozen lake' and stocked it full of fish.#$b#Just let me know when you're ready to compete.

stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.v: I saw a big fish down there!
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.l: You could make an igloo twice as warm if you stuffed feathers in the walls!
