stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.a: Imagine if we lived in an igloo together!$h#$e#It would be fun, but I'm happy living anywhere with you.$l
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.l: Someday, I should teach you how to sculpt with ice! It would be fun!$h#$e#I'd be very curious to see what you'd come up with.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.m: You'll do great out there, honey! Just stay calm and focused.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.p: When we get home, let's make a fire and have some hot cocoa.$0#$e#...with marshmallows?$h
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.h: Come here, let me fix your hair... I'm going to take an action shot of you during the contest!
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.e: Ta da! It's you!#$e#What? You don't see the resemblance? I think it's perfect!
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.s: Hey, you really need to win the contest today.$0#$e#Uh... well, I guess I made a little bet with Marlon...$1
You should teach me how to use a fishing rod sometime. I think I'd be good at it.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.a: Hey! You're going to win by a longshot today, I know it. Make us proud!
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.h: Hi, honey. Good luck today in the ice fishing contest.$0
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.e: I've been practicing my fishing technique. I won't hold back against you, my dear.$1
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.s: Remember when we sat at the old pond and shared a beer? That was around here somewhere.#$e#Well, it's best not to dwell in the past... even the good memories bring me pain.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.a: Have you ever thrown a bunch of pebbles on a frozen lake? It makes a very nice sound.#$e#...Don't tell my dad, but I'm wearing the Winter Star sweater under this coat.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.r: Ice sculpting is a rewarding challenge for me. It's a distinct material that I'm not used to!
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.d: Water ice... a most profound substance, indeed. Necessary for life, it makes a fitting material for statuary meant to represent the living form.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.m: The key to making a well-crafted snowman begins with ensuring a level foundation and avoiding excessive weight on the upper section.$3
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.s: You ever notice how quiet it is in the snow?
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.l: Ahh... The forest has entered her long slumber for the winter...$1
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.p: Our family has matching Winter Star sweaters.#$e#Now, if only Abigail would wear hers...$2
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.c: Hi, @. Are you finding any time to relax from your farming duties this winter?$0
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.a: You think anyone would mind if I took a dip in the frozen lake after the festival?#$e#I've heard ice baths are good for the muscles.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.g: When you get old and bald like me, you need a good, warm hat.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.e: You never know... this could be the last time I ever make a snowman with Alex.#$e#Life is short, dear. Make sure to treasure every moment.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.l: Hello, @. It's that time of the year again for the ice fishing festival.#$b#Speak with me when you're ready to start the competition!$1
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.c: These lumps of snow won't form into balls...$0#$e#I think I'm better working in the heat than in the cold.$2
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.p: I'm too nervous to walk on the frozen lake...#$e#I read a book once, where a girl fell through the ice.#$b#She was okay! But... I've been cautious about it ever since.

$y 'I lost last year because I chose a bad spot. I have a good feeling things will be different this time around._I don't think the location matters._Hah. Says you! I'll prove you wrong._I'll beat you anyway._...$4_Well, good luck._Same to you, kid.'
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.e: A snowman has to look the part! Isn't the top hat and scarf stylish?
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.h: I'm glad I wore earmuffs, it's freezing out here!$0#$e#I brought my camera this year. It's perfect lighting for a winter photoshoot!
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.j: Gatherings like this are a good way to build community with our neighbors.#$e#It's nice how cold weather seems to bring people together.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.k: You ready for the contest? We all think you're going to win.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.m: This time of year isn't so bad. No bugs during winter...#$e#Think you can beat Willy this year? He's a tough competitor...
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.s: Hey, why are you laughing? He's not even done yet!#$e#You just wait... once we're finished, he'll be one fine snowman.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.l: You have to temper ice before cutting it, otherwise you can't shape it!
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.s: Winter can be really hard on animals. Did you install heaters in your coops and barns?
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.m: Aww... That piggy looks adorable all bundled up!$1
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.e: Look here, it's my secret weapon... a flask of fine spirits, to wet my lips a moment before the whistle sounds...
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.g: I've been spending too much time holed up inside, watching Gridball... it's good to get outside in the crisp winter air.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.w: Hmm? How did you get here?#$e#Pay no attention to me. I'm simply observing...
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.h: I shouldn't have waxed my moustache this morning, it's frozen solid! Oh dear...$2#$e#Well, if you need an ice pick, you know where to find me...$h
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.j: Don't the fish get cold under there?$3
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.v: My big brother is helping me build a snowman!$0
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.w: Aye, the whole town'll be watchin' our little tournament today. Let's give them all a good show.
stardewcraft.festival.winter8.dialogue.l: *crunch* *crunch* Snow makes a funny noise when you step on it!$1
stardewcraft.mail.pamNewChannel: Hey kid,^^Thanks for the 'juice'. It definitely had a ...one-of-a-kind... flavor.^^By the way, have you ever tuned in to channel 736? It's a seasonal fishing program that you might find interesting.^^Take care,^-Pam[#]Pam's Tip
stardewcraft.npc.morris.first_greeting: Welcome to JojaMart! How are you doing today?#$b#We're currently in the process of setting up a brand-new membership system for our customers. Please check back soon to join!
stardewcraft.npc.morris.second_player: Welcome to JojaMart! How are you doing today?#$b#Hmm... Our records show that you live on a farm with some other folks... I'm sorry, but we can only sell a membership to the owner of your residence.
stardewcraft.npc.morris.weekend_greeting: Welcome to JojaMart! How is your weekend going?#$b#We're currently in the process of setting up a brand-new membership system for our customers. Please check back soon to join!
stardewcraft.trout_derby.booth.explanati: During this event, Rainbow Trout have a chance of carrying a 'Golden Tag'. If you find one, turn it in here for a prize!
During this event, Rainbow Trout have a chance of carrying a 'Golden Tag'. If you find one, turn it in here for a prize!
stardewcraft.trout_derby.booth.intro: Welcome to the Trout Derby! What can I do for you?
stardewcraft.trout_derby.booth.no_tags: Seems like you don't have any Golden Tags... better get fishing!
gui.stardewcraft.farm_selection.pending_: Creating a new farm will cancel your pending join request. Continue?

stardewcraft.shop.luau.dialogue: Enjoy the Luau! Take a look at these summer festival goods.
Check here for special orders from townsfolk.
block.stardewcraft.mini_obelisk.desc: Place two on the farm to warp between them.
block.stardewcraft.farm_computer.desc: Scans the farm and displays useful information.
block.stardewcraft.coffee_maker.desc: Automatically brews a fresh cup every morning.
item.stardewcraft.ectoplasm.desc: A thick, slimy goop that the Wizard wants for some reason.
item.stardewcraft.prismatic_jelly.desc: Harvested from the rare and elusive prismatic slime.
item.stardewcraft.monster_musk.desc: Spray this on to draw more monsters out of hiding.
item.stardewcraft.fiber_seeds.desc: Plant these in any season. Does not require watering. Harvest with the scythe. Takes 7 days to grow.
item.stardewcraft.rare_seed.desc: Sow in fall. Takes all season to grow.
item.stardewcraft.sweet_gem_berry.desc: It's by far the sweetest thing you've ever smelled.
stardewcraft.special_orders.board.placeh: The Special Orders Board is not available yet.

block.stardewcraft.mystic_tree_fishscale: Mystic Tree Fish-scale Planks Fence Gate
stardewcraft.mini_obelisk.own_farm_only: Mini-Obelisks can only be placed on your own farm.
stardewcraft.special_orders.none_availab: No special orders are posted right now.
stardewcraft.special_orders.board.locked: The Special Orders Board is not available yet.
stardewcraft.special_orders.accept.alrea: You already have a special order in progress.
stardewcraft.special_orders.dropbox.need: Hold a matching item to deliver it to %s.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Willy.name: Juicy Bugs Wanted!
stardewcraft.special_orders.Willy.text: Hey there, I'm looking for a big wad o' bug guts. The juicier the better... at least that's what the crabs seem to like... 100 pieces should do the trick.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Willy_Object: Collect a bunch of bug meat
Place the bug meat in the barrel next to Willy's house.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Pam.name: The Strong Stuff
stardewcraft.special_orders.Pam.text: Heard there's a spirit made out of potatoes that really packs a whallop, if you know what I mean. Mind dropping a few taters into a keg and bringing me a batch or two?
stardewcraft.special_orders.Pam_Objectiv: Keg a few potatoes and collect 12 batches
Place the product in Pam's kitchen.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Pierre.name: Pierre's Prime Produce
stardewcraft.special_orders.Pierre.text: Hello there. For an upcoming promotion, I'm thinking of offering some high-quality vegetables at a slight premium... Know where a thrifty shopkeep might find 25 gold-star vegetables?
stardewcraft.special_orders.Pierre_Objec: Place the crops in the empty produce box in Pierre's shop.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Robin.name: Robin's Project
stardewcraft.special_orders.Robin.text: Hey! I have an idea for a new style of bed, but I'll need 80 hardwood to make it happen. Can anyone help?                     -Robin
stardewcraft.special_orders.Robin_Object: Add the hardwood to the stockpile in Robin's house.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Emily.name: Rock Rejuvenation
stardewcraft.special_orders.Emily.text: Hey! I'm going to invite some friends over to do a "rock rejuvenation" ceremony, but I'll need some crystals to channel the right energies. Do you think you could lend me a hand?
stardewcraft.special_orders.Demetrius.te: For unknown reasons, the local population of {FishType:Text} has grown to an unsustainable level. I need a local angler to help reduce their numbers.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Demetrius2.t: For unknown reasons, the local population of {FishType:Text} has grown to an unsustainable level. I need a local angler to help reduce their numbers.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Gus.name: Gus' Famous Omelet
stardewcraft.special_orders.Gus.text: {Greeting}... but I'll need two dozen eggs. Any takers?                -Gus
stardewcraft.special_orders.Gus_Objectiv: Put the eggs in Gus' fridge.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Gus_RE_Greet: I've got the urge to make my famous giant omelet
I've got the urge to make another giant omelet
stardewcraft.special_orders.Lewis.name: Crop Order
stardewcraft.special_orders.Lewis.text: {Text} Anyone who ships 100 {Crop:TextPlural} by the end of the season will earn a substantial reward from the Pelican Town Agricultural Fund.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Lewis_RE_Tex: {Crop:TextPluralCapitalized} are in high demand this year.
Apparently, {Crop:TextPlural} are considered the latest 'superfood' in Zuzu City.
There's a new beauty craze in Zuzu City... apparently, a lotion made from {Crop:Text} is said to remove wrinkles.
The Queen of Sauce was recently spotted dining on fresh {Crop:Text}. Now everyone in the world wants one!
The Governor is holding a banquet, and his Chefs are ordering huge numbers of {Crop:TextPlural}.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Wizard.name: A Curious Substance
stardewcraft.special_orders.Wizard.text: I seek an extremely rare and powerful goop, known as 'ectoplasm'. It can be found in the remains of slain ghosts.      -M. Rasmodius
stardewcraft.special_orders.Wizard_Objec: Ah, it's brimming with the energy of forgotten souls... perfect.$h#$b#Now, begone! I shall require perfect silence to discern the true nature of this substance.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Clint.name: Cave Patrol
stardewcraft.special_orders.Clint.text: The number of {Monster:LocalizedName} in the local caves have made mining dangerous... for other people, not me! There's good money for anyone willing to slay 50 of them.          -Clint
stardewcraft.special_orders.Linus.name: Community Cleanup
stardewcraft.special_orders.Linus.text: I have an idea. There's a lot of trash in the water. Why don't we fish some out to make the valley more beautiful?                     -Linus
stardewcraft.special_orders.Linus_Object: Dump the trash in the recycling bin behind the train platform.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Evelyn.name: Gifts for George
stardewcraft.special_orders.Evelyn.text: George thinks no one in town cares about him. I'd like to prove him wrong! A dozen leeks should do the trick... they're his favorite.                      -Evelyn
stardewcraft.special_orders.Evelyn_Objec: Place the leeks in Evelyn's kitchen.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Wizard2.name: Prismatic Jelly
stardewcraft.special_orders.Wizard2.text: I require assistance in tracking down the rare and dangerous prismatic slime, within the local caves. Bring me a jar of its prismatic jelly and you will be duly rewarded.        -M. Rasmodius
stardewcraft.special_orders.Wizard2_Obje: Deliver a prismatic jelly to Wizard
Ah... you've returned from the hunt. I sense that you were successful!$h#$b#Now, hand over the jelly and begone! I have important work to do.
stardewcraft.special_orders.Robin2.name: Robin's Resource Rush
stardewcraft.special_orders.Robin2.text: I'm putting on a little promotion, just for fun. If anyone can collect 1000 pieces of {Resource:Text} in a week, they'll earn a reward. And you can keep the {Resource:Text}!             -Robin
stardewcraft.special_orders.Gunther.name: Fragments of the past
stardewcraft.special_orders.Gunther.text: Calling all amateur paleontologists! I need 100 pieces of bone for my studies. Please drop them off at the museum counter!          -Gunther
stardewcraft.special_orders.Gunther_Obje: Place the bones in the drop box at the museum counter.
item.stardewcraft.money_contract.desc:
A gold document registered by Lewis.
Right-click an online player to sign shared gold, or transfer a sum of gold.
The contract is not consumed; Lewis can issue one per day.
stardewcraft.item.money_contract.tooltip: The gilt seal glints slowly across the page.
Right-click an online player to handle shared gold or a gold transfer.
The contract is not consumed, and cannot be sold.
stardewcraft.lewis.menu.question: What can the mayor's office help you with? If the paperwork is clear, I'm happy to assist.
stardewcraft.lewis.money_contract.intro_: Ah, the Money Contract? It's a new civil form kept here at the mayor's office. Hold it and right-click another farmer to propose shared gold, or to transfer a sum directly. The paper itself won't be taken, but I can only issue one replacement per day. Would you like one now?
stardewcraft.lewis.money_contract.repeat: Would you like another Money Contract? Remember, I can only issue one per day. Hold it and right-click another player to handle shared gold or a transfer.
stardewcraft.lewis.money_contract.claime: I've already entered your Money Contract in today's ledger. The mayor's office can only issue one per day, so please come back tomorrow.
stardewcraft.lewis.money_contract.receiv: There you are. Your Money Contract is registered. Keep it handy, and right-click another player to handle gold affairs.
stardewcraft.money_contract.players_only: Money Contracts can only be offered to online players.
stardewcraft.money_contract.action.quest: You present the Money Contract to %s. Which gold matter should it handle?
stardewcraft.lewis.money_share.self: You cannot sign a Money Contract with yourself.
stardewcraft.lewis.money_share.already_s: You already share the same gold ledger with %s.
stardewcraft.lewis.money_share.sent: The Money Contract has been offered to %s. Waiting for their signature.
stardewcraft.lewis.money_share.target_qu: %s wants to sign a Money Contract with you. If you sign, %s and %s will merge gold into one ledger, and future income and spending will be shared. Agree?
stardewcraft.lewis.money_share.member_qu: %s will be connected into one shared gold ledger. %s wants to share gold with %s. Do you approve this change?
stardewcraft.lewis.money_share.accepted: Contract filed: %s and %s now share gold.
stardewcraft.lewis.money_share.rejected: %s did not sign the Money Contract.
stardewcraft.lewis.farm_cancel.question: Deregister "%s"? This will clear the farm region and cancel the farm's registration. All members will need to create a new farm afterward.
stardewcraft.lewis.farm_cancel.offline_b: Every farm member must be online and personally approve deregistration. I can't stamp this while someone is absent.
stardewcraft.lewis.farm_cancel.rejected: %s did not approve farm deregistration. The filing has been cancelled.
stardewcraft.lewis.farm_cancel.completed: The current farm has been deregistered. Please create a new farm.
stardewcraft.money_contract.transfer.sel: You cannot transfer gold to yourself.
stardewcraft.money_contract.transfer.sam: You already share gold, so no transfer is needed.
stardewcraft.money_contract.transfer.sen: Transferred %1$sg to %2$s through the Money Contract.
stardewcraft.money_contract.transfer.rec: You received %1$sg from %2$s through the Money Contract.

Right-click during an auction to open the bid screen.
It is returned to Lewis when you leave.
stardewcraft.item.auction_paddle.tooltip: A little wooden paddle handed out by Lewis himself. Raise it, and your bid counts.

Returned to Lewis after you leave the auction.

stardewcraft.auction.start.question: The ledger is open: %s is ready with %s lots. Open the bidding now?
stardewcraft.auction.start.cancelled: The gavel goes back on the desk for now.
stardewcraft.auction.opening: Good evening, everyone! Welcome to "%s". %s Tonight we have %s lots. Listen carefully: a raised paddle confirms your bid.
stardewcraft.auction.paddle.inactive: Auction paddles only work during an auction.
stardewcraft.auction.bid.title: Bid
stardewcraft.auction.bid.call_open: Opening at %1$sg — do I hear a bid?
stardewcraft.auction.bid.blocked_hint: You cannot bid on this lot.
stardewcraft.auction.bid.ready_hint: Raising your paddle freezes this gold.
stardewcraft.auction.unsold: %s passed in and will be returned to the owner.
stardewcraft.auction.finished: "%s" is closed. Thank you, everyone; the ledger is settled.
stardewcraft.mail.georgeGifts: Dear @,^^Thank you so much for the leeks. They look fresh and delicious. George will love them.^^Today, I'm going to surprise him with 12 little gift-wrapped treasures (thanks to you!). Stop by if you want to be there!^^-Evelyn^^P.S. Please accept this gift. I think you'll enjoy it![#]Evelyn's thank-you note
stardewcraft.mail.robinResource: Hey @,^^Congratulations on completing my little challenge. I'm impressed!^^As an added bonus, I've included the blueprints for a new type of chest. Enjoy!^^-Robin^^^^P.S. -- Now that you have all those resources laying around, why not swing by for some construction work?[#]Robin's Resource Rush
stardewcraft.mail.ClintReward: Um, Hello...     ^Thanks for helping me clear out those monsters.^^I'm not scared at all! ...But it should make the mines safer for everyone else... right?^^Take this blueprint. (Hope it doesn't make me obsolete...)^^   -Clint, the blacksmith[#]Clint's Thank-you
stardewcraft.mail.ClintReward2: Um, Hello...     ^Thanks for helping me clear out more monsters.^^Maybe next time, I'll take care of them myself... if I have time!^^Take this item. I found it in the back room...^^   -Clint, the blacksmith[#]Clint's Alternate Thank-you
stardewcraft.mail.MSB_Lewis: @,^I wanted to thank you for taking care of my special order. All of the hard work you've done has been a great boost to Pelican Town's image.^Here's a Shipping Bin as a token of my appreciation.^Place it anywhere and I'll be sure to make a stop when I make my rounds.^^   -Lewis[#]Lewis's Thank You
stardewcraft.mail.MSB_Pierre: Dear @,^^I guess people didn't take to 'Pierre's Prime Produce' like I'd hoped...^^Anyways, here's my old 'Mini-Shipping Bin'.^The next time you get your hands on some produce worthy of the 'Pierre's Prime' luxury brand, maybe you could have them shipped my way?^^   -Pierre[#]Pierre's Prime Produce
stardewcraft.mail.WizardReward: The specimen you delivered offered great insight into the machinations of the fell beings we call 'monsters'.^^I've formulated a pungent tincture that these beings find intoxicating. Use it with caution...^^   -M. Rasmodius, Wizard[#]The Wizard's Discovery
stardewcraft.mail.WizardReward2: Thanks to the ectoplasm you delivered to me, I've made a major breakthrough in the field of arcane engineering.^^Enclosed, you'll find blueprints for a most useful machine...^^   -M. Rasmodius, Wizard[#]The Wizard's Breakthrough
stardewcraft.mail.DemetriusReward: Hi @,^^Thanks for your help with the fish.^Nature is usually good at keeping things balanced, but sometimes artificial factors can cause an imbalance.^^I've enclosed a blueprint from a science magazine that you might find interesting.^^-Demetrius[#]Demetrius' Thank You
stardewcraft.mail.linusTrashCleanup: Hi @,^^Thanks for helping me clean up around the valley.^The waters are looking much cleaner. I think everyone will appreciate it. I know I will.^As a way of saying 'thanks', I wanted to teach you how to grow your own fiber. I hope it's useful.^^-Linus[#]Linus' Thank You
stardewcraft.mail.gusGiantOmelet: Hi @,^^Thanks for the eggs.^The yolks look amazing... I think this will be my best omelet yet!^^Please accept this gift.^^-Gus[#]Gus' Famous Omelet
stardewcraft.mail.emilyStones: Hi @,^^Thanks again for the wonderful gemstones.^These will be perfect for my energy re-alignment work!^I wanted to thank you with this special gift. I hope you create some wonderful items with it!^^-Emily[#]Emily's Gemstones
stardewcraft.mail.guntherBones: Hi @,^^Thanks for all the bones. I've got a lot to sort through here! To think, each fragment belonged to a living, breathing body from the past. Fascinating.^^Please accept this unique crafting recipe as a thank-you gift!^^-Gunther[#]Gunther's Note
stardewcraft.special_orders.returned_don: Returned donations from a failed special order have been placed in your inventory.
stardewcraft.fair.strength.title: Strength Game
stardewcraft.fair.strength.result.perfec: HA! Now that's what I like to see! Here, have a star token.
stardewcraft.fair.strength.result.zero: Wow. Zero strength. I'm actually impressed with how weak you are. Here's a star token.
